english: I followed the instructions religiously.
chinese: 我认真地按指示办事.
pinyin: wǒ rèn zhēn de àn zhǐ shì bàn shì.

english: They discharged their arrows at the enemy.
chinese: 他们把箭射向敌人。
pinyin: tā men bǎ jiàn shè xiàng dí rén。

english: Her handwriting slants from left to right.
chinese: 她写的字从左往右斜.
pinyin: tā xiě de zì zòng zuǒ wàng yòu xié.

english: The sound of the cheering faded away.
chinese: 欢呼声在逐渐消失。
pinyin: huān hū shēng zài zhú jiàn xiāo shī。

english: The excitement quickened my pulse.
chinese: 激动使我的心跳加快。
pinyin: jī dòng shǐ wǒ de xīn tiào jiā kuài。

english: His explanation is full of contradictions.
chinese: 他的解释充满矛盾。
pinyin: tā de jiě shì chōng mǎn máo dùn。

english: We grind up the wheat to make flour.
chinese: 我们把小麦磨成面粉。
pinyin: wǒ men bǎ xiǎo mài mò chéng miàn fěn。

english: Water is spouting out of the pipe.
chinese: 水正从管子里喷出来。
pinyin: shuǐ zhèng zòng guǎn zi lǐ pèn chū lái。

english: The drainage system has been aged.
chinese: 排水系统已经老化了。
pinyin: pái shuǐ xì tǒng yǐ jīng lǎo huà le。

english: The apples are full of worms.
chinese: 这些苹果生了很多虫子.
pinyin: zhè xie píng guǒ shēng le hěn duō chóng zi.

english: He worked in internal trade.
chinese: 他的工作是做国内贸易。
pinyin: tā de gōng zuò shì zuò guó nèi mào yì。

english: Please pass me a piece of paper handkerchief.
chinese: 请递给我一张纸巾。
pinyin: qǐng dì jǐ wǒ yī zhāng zhǐ jīn。

english: The truth verified the allegations.
chinese: 事实证明了这些说法。
pinyin: shì shí zhèng míng le zhè xie shuō fa。

english: She's an excellent administrator.
chinese: 她是个优秀的管理人员.
pinyin: tā shì gè yōu xiù de guǎn lǐ rén yuán.

english: His Chinese kung fu is peerless.
chinese: 他的中国功夫是无敌的。
pinyin: tā de Zhōng guó gōng fu shì wú dí de。

english: There is an imperceptible change in temperature.
chinese: 温度有细微的变化。
pinyin: wēn dù yǒu xì wēi de biàn huà。

english: Just take care of yourself and don't worry.
chinese: 别着急，安心养病。
pinyin: biè zháo jí， ān xīn yǎng bìng。

english: I really hate being kept waiting.
chinese: 我实在讨厌让我等着。
pinyin: wǒ shí zài tǎo yàn ràng wǒ děng zhuó。

english: The soil is too dry for planting.
chinese: 土太干了，不能种东西。
pinyin: tǔ tài gàn le， bù néng zhòng dōng xi。

english: His ideas do not conform to mine.
chinese: 他的想法和我的不一致。
pinyin: tā de xiǎng fǎ huò wǒ de bù yī zhì。

english: The play was very well reviewed.
chinese: 这出戏得到很好的评价。
pinyin: zhè chū xì dé dào hěn hǎo de píng jià。

english: He took the watch apart to repair it.
chinese: 他把手表拆开来修理。
pinyin: tā bǎ shǒu biǎo chāi kāi lái xiū lǐ。

english: He works in a private enterprise.
chinese: 他在一家私人企业工作。
pinyin: tā zài yī jiā sī rén qǐ yè gōng zuò。

english: She is weak from lack of sustenance.
chinese: 她因缺乏营养而虚弱。
pinyin: tā yīn quē fá yíng yǎng ér xū ruò。

english: They have to skimp on fuel in winter.
chinese: 冬天他们得节省燃料.
pinyin: dōng tiān tā men de jié shěng rán liào.

english: He is honest only on the surface.
chinese: 他只是表面诚实而已。
pinyin: tā zhǐ shì biǎo miàn chéng shí ér yǐ。

english: His honesty is beyond dispute.
chinese: 他的诚实是无可争议的。
pinyin: tā de chéng shí shì wú kě zhēng yì de。

english: Their merchandise is of high quality.
chinese: 他们的货物质量很好。
pinyin: tā men de huò wù zhì liàng hěn hǎo。

english: His successes were largely due to luck.
chinese: 他的成功主要靠运气。
pinyin: tā de chéng gōng zhǔ yào kào yùn qi。

english: They exchanged hostages with each other.
chinese: 他们相互交换了人质.
pinyin: tā men xiāng hù jiāo huàn le rén zhì.

english: We hope to be back by nightfall.
chinese: 我们希望傍晚时能回来.
pinyin: wǒ men xī wàng bàng wǎn shí néng huí lai.

english: He stabbed the meat with his fork/stabbed his fork into the meat.
chinese: 他用叉子叉肉.
pinyin: tā yòng chā zi chǎ ròu.

english: France is one of the develop countries.
chinese: 法国是发达国家之一。
pinyin: fǎ guó shì fā dá guó jiā zhī yī。

english: The boy has quite recovered.
chinese: 这男孩已彻底恢复健康。
pinyin: zhè nán hái yǐ chè dǐ huī fù jiàn kāng。

english: Do not fear; I will support you.
chinese: 别担心，我会支持你的。
pinyin: biè dān xīn， wǒ kuài zhī chí nǐ de。

english: He scooped the coins up in his hands.
chinese: 他用手把硬币捧了起来.
pinyin: tā yòng shǒu bǎ yìng bì pěng le qǐ lai.

english: Do not fear; I will support you.
chinese: 别担心，我会支持你的。
pinyin: biè dān xīn， wǒ kuài zhī chí nǐ de。

english: I don't know which advise to follow.
chinese: 不晓得该听谁的劝告。
pinyin: bù xiǎo de gāi tìng shéi de quàn gào。

english: These facts are relevant to the case.
chinese: 这些事实和此案有关。
pinyin: zhè xie shì shí huò cǐ àn yǒu guān。

english: This magazine has a large circulation.
chinese: 这本杂志发行量很大。
pinyin: zhè běn zá zhì fā xíng liàng hěn dà。

english: I hereby declare her elected.
chinese: 我特此宣布她已经当选。
pinyin: wǒ tè cǐ xuān bù tā yǐ jīng dāng xuǎn。

english: Her words mitigated my suffering.
chinese: 她的话减轻了我的痛苦。
pinyin: tā de huà jiǎn qīng le wǒ de tòng kǔ。

english: This glass plate is very fragile.
chinese: 这个玻璃盘子很容易碎。
pinyin: zhè gè bō li pán zi hěn róng yì suì。

english: They exchanged hostages with each other.
chinese: 他们相互交换了人质.
pinyin: tā men xiāng hù jiāo huàn le rén zhì.

english: He was the world tennis champion.
chinese: 他曾是世界网球冠军。
pinyin: tā zēng shì shì jiè wǎng qiú guàn jūn。

english: The doctor cured him of his stomach trouble.
chinese: 大夫治好了他的胃病。
pinyin: dài fu zhì hào le tā de wèi bìng。

english: Many problems occupied his mind.
chinese: 他脑子里装著许多问题。
pinyin: tā nǎo zi lǐ zhuāng著 xǔ duō wèn tí。

english: Magnetism is a natural phenomenon.
chinese: 磁力是一种自然现象。
pinyin: cí lì shì yī zhòng zì rán xiàn xiàng。

english: He put his bag on the luggage rack.
chinese: 他把包放在行李架上。
pinyin: tā bǎ bāo fàng zài xíng li jià shàng。

english: She lifted the lid of the pot to add some salt.
chinese: 她掀起锅盖加点盐。
pinyin: tā xiān qǐ guō gě jiā diǎn yán。

english: The people want him as their leader.
chinese: 大家都想让他当领袖.
pinyin: dà jiā dōu xiǎng ràng tā dàng lǐng xiù.

english: I could not stand parting from her.
chinese: 我不能承受和她分别。
pinyin: wǒ bù néng chéng shòu huò tā fēn bié。

english: I can not help think the same.
chinese: 我不禁也有同样的想法。
pinyin: wǒ bù jīn yě yǒu tóng yàng de xiǎng fǎ。

english: He spread the map flat out on the floor.
chinese: 他把地图平铺在地上。
pinyin: tā bǎ dì tú píng pù zài dì shang。

english: He is the strong, silent type.
chinese: 他是个坚强而沉默的人。
pinyin: tā shì gè jiān qiáng ér chén mò de rén。

english: I really feel bad about that.
chinese: 我为此实在感到很抱歉。
pinyin: wǒ wèi cǐ shí zài gǎn dào hěn bào qiàn。

english: We grind up the wheat to make flour.
chinese: 我们把小麦磨成面粉。
pinyin: wǒ men bǎ xiǎo mài mò chéng miàn fěn。

english: I may vote for her at the next election.
chinese: 下届选举我可能选她。
pinyin: xià jiè xuǎn jǔ wǒ kě néng xuǎn tā。

english: She was sitting immediately to my left.
chinese: 她挨著我坐在我的左边.
pinyin: tā ái著 wǒ zuò zài wǒ de zuǒ biān.

english: I'm never one to pick and choose.
chinese: 我从来不是爱挑拣的人。
pinyin: wǒ cóng lái bù shì ài tiǎo jiǎn de rén。

english: Just for once he arrived on time.
chinese: 只有这次他是按时到了。
pinyin: zhǐ yǒu zhè cì tā shì àn shí dào le。

english: I'll stand by you whatever happens.
chinese: 无论如何，我都支持你。
pinyin: wú lùn rú hé， wǒ dōu zhī chí nǐ。

english: He threw a stone into the lake.
chinese: 他向湖里扔了一块石头。
pinyin: tā xiàng hú lǐ rēng le yī kuài shí tou。

english: The price of oil has gone up.
chinese: 石油的价格已经上涨了。
pinyin: shí yóu de jià gé yǐ jīng shàng zhǎng le。

english: He always speaks well of his daughter.
chinese: 他总是称赞他的女儿。
pinyin: tā zǒng shì chēng zàn tā de nu:3 ér。

english: I feel it is absolutely necessary.
chinese: 我觉得这是绝对必要的。
pinyin: wǒ jué de zhè shì jué duì bì yào de。

english: Please back the check.
chinese: 请在这张支票背后签名。
pinyin: qǐng zài zhè zhāng zhī piào bèi hòu qiān míng。

english: Her secret remains untold by now.
chinese: 她的秘密至今仍未透露。
pinyin: tā de mì mì zhì jīn réng wèi tòu lù。

english: He gave me a reasonable explanation.
chinese: 他对我作了合理的解释。
pinyin: tā duì wǒ zuò le hé lǐ de jiě shì。

english: I can certify to her honesty.
chinese: 我可以证明她是诚实的。
pinyin: wǒ kě yǐ zhèng míng tā shì chéng shí de。

english: It is a pleasure to converse with her.
chinese: 和她谈话是一种乐趣。
pinyin: huò tā tán huà shì yī zhòng lè qù。

english: The troops took up offensive positions.
chinese: 部队已准备发起攻击。
pinyin: bù duì yǐ zhǔn bèi fā qǐ gōng jī。

english: We hope to make great profit in the long term.
chinese: 我们希望长期获利。
pinyin: wǒ men xī wàng cháng qī huò lì。

english: We enjoyed the quietness of the country.
chinese: 我们喜欢乡村的平静。
pinyin: wǒ men xǐ huan xiāng cūn de píng jìng。

english: Fresh air is beneficial to our health.
chinese: 新鲜空气有益于健康。
pinyin: xīn xiān kōng qì yǒu yì yú jiàn kāng。

english: He sets aside part of his salary.
chinese: 他把工资的一部份存起来。
pinyin: tā bǎ gōng zī de yī bù fen cún qǐ lai。

english: He works in a private enterprise.
chinese: 他在一家私人企业工作。
pinyin: tā zài yī jiā sī rén qǐ yè gōng zuò。

english: These facts negate your theory.
chinese: 这些事实否定了你的理论.
pinyin: zhè xie shì shí fǒu dìng le nǐ de lǐ lùn.

english: The bank is opposite the supermarket.
chinese: 银行在超级市场对面.
pinyin: yín háng zài chāo jí shì chǎng duì miàn.

english: It's a dark and moonless night.
chinese: 这是一个黑暗无月的夜晚。
pinyin: zhè shì yī gè hēi àn wú yuè de yè wǎn。

english: Please throw me that towel.
chinese: 请把那条毛巾给我扔过来.
pinyin: qǐng bǎ nà tiáo máo jīn jǐ wǒ rēng guò lai.

english: It's cold I need another blanket.
chinese: 太冷了--我再要一条毯子.
pinyin: tài lěng le-- wǒ zài yào yī tiáo tǎn zi.

english: There is an imperceptible change in temperature.
chinese: 温度有细微的变化。
pinyin: wēn dù yǒu xì wēi de biàn huà。

english: She gave the boys a dollar apiece.
chinese: 她给孩子们每人一美元。
pinyin: tā jǐ hái zi men měi rén yī měi yuán。

english: Her secret remains untold to this day.
chinese: 她的秘密至今仍未透露.
pinyin: tā de mì mì zhì jīn réng wèi tòu lù.

english: Mother pieced a quilt yesterday.
chinese: 母亲昨天补了一床被子。
pinyin: mǔ qīn zuó tiān bǔ le yī chuáng bèi zi。

english: She is a sultry western beauty.
chinese: 她是位性感的西方美人。
pinyin: tā shì wèi xìng gǎn de xī fāng měi rén。

english: They finished the preparatory training.
chinese: 他们完成了预备训练。
pinyin: tā men wán chéng le yù bèi xùn liàn。

english: Her services to the state have been immense.
chinese: 她对国家的贡献极大.
pinyin: tā duì guó jiā de gòng xiàn jí dà.

english: Don't forget to bring your fishing tackle.
chinese: 别忘了带上你的钓具。
pinyin: biè wàng le dài shàng nǐ de diào jù。

english: The ship was attacked by torpedo.
chinese: 那条船遭到鱼雷的攻击。
pinyin: nà tiáo chuán zāo dào yú léi de gōng jī。

english: Nothing worth doing is easy.
chinese: 值得做的事没有容易做的。
pinyin: zhí de zuò de shì méi yǒu róng yì zuò de。

english: Her motherland is in the tropical region.
chinese: 她的祖国位于热带地区。
pinyin: tā de zǔ guó wèi yú rè dài dì qū。

english: The missile is delivered from underground.
chinese: 这种导弹由地下发射.
pinyin: zhè zhǒng dǎo dàn yóu dì xià fā shè.

english: These conditions no longer obtain.
chinese: 这些条件已不复存在了。
pinyin: zhè xie tiáo jiàn yǐ bù fù cún zài le。

english: He spent his declining years in the country.
chinese: 他在乡间度过晚年。
pinyin: tā zài xiāng jiàn dù guò wǎn nián。

english: The chair casts a shadow on the wall.
chinese: 椅子的影子映到墙上了.
pinyin: yǐ zi de yǐng zi yìng dào qiáng shàng le.

english: Accidents often arise from carelessness.
chinese: 事故往往起因于粗心。
pinyin: shì gù wǎng wǎng qǐ yīn yú cū xīn。

english: The heart pumps blood into the veins.
chinese: 心脏把血液送至血管。
pinyin: xīn zàng bǎ xuè yè sòng zhì xuè guǎn。

english: I don't plan to take the job.
chinese: 我不打算担任这项工作。
pinyin: wǒ bù dǎ suàn dān rèn zhè xiàng gōng zuò。

english: I advocate a policy of gradual reform.
chinese: 我拥护逐步改革的政策.
pinyin: wǒ yōng hù zhú bù gǎi gé de zhèng cè.

english: He drew an oblique line on paper.
chinese: 他在纸上划了一条斜线。
pinyin: tā zài zhǐ shàng huà le yī tiáo xié xiàn。

english: Billows of flame swept through the forest.
chinese: 熊熊烈火席卷森林。
pinyin: xióng xióng liè huǒ xí juǎn sēn lín。

english: Not at the moment, thank you.
chinese: 暂时还用不着，谢谢你。
pinyin: zàn shí huán yòng bù zhuó， xiè xie nǐ。

english: This is an area rich in ore.
chinese: 这里是个矿产丰富的地区。
pinyin: zhè lǐ shì gè kuàng chǎn fēng fù de dì qū。

english: Everyone must abide by the law.
chinese: 所有的人都应遵守法律。
pinyin: suǒ yǒu de rén dōu yìng zūn shǒu fǎ lu:4。

english: He still worked at his biology.
chinese: 他仍然钻研他的生物学。
pinyin: tā réng rán zuān yán tā de shēng wù xué。

english: There was a steady increase in population.
chinese: 人口在不断增长中。
pinyin: rén kǒu zài bù duàn zēng zhǎng zhòng。

english: The brain needs a continuous supply of blood.
chinese: 大脑需要不断地供血。
pinyin: dà nǎo xū yào bù duàn de gòng xuè。

english: Some advertisements have no pull at all.
chinese: 有些广告毫无吸引力。
pinyin: yǒu xiē guǎng gào háo wú xī yǐn lì。

english: The information ought to be made more accessible.
chinese: 资料应该明白易懂。
pinyin: zī liào yīng gāi míng bai yì dǒng。

english: She felt a pricking on her scalp.
chinese: 她感到头皮上被扎了一下.
pinyin: tā gǎn dào tóu pí shàng bèi zhá le yī xià.

english: The nurse executed the doctor's orders.
chinese: 护士执行医生的命令。
pinyin: hù shi zhí xíng yī shēng de mìng lìng。

english: There is not a vestige of truth in the report.
chinese: 该报告毫无真实性。
pinyin: gāi bào gào háo wú zhēn shí xìng。

english: We barely had time to catch the train.
chinese: 我们几乎来不及赶火车.
pinyin: wǒ men jī hū lái bù jí gǎn huǒ chē.

english: The climate on grassland is capricious.
chinese: 草原的气候变化无常。
pinyin: cǎo yuán de qì hòu biàn huà wú cháng。

english: There is not a vestige of truth in the report.
chinese: 该报告毫无真实性。
pinyin: gāi bào gào háo wú zhēn shí xìng。

english: It is an experience of humiliation.
chinese: 那是一次不光彩的经历。
pinyin: nà shì yī cì bù guāng cǎi de jīng lì。

english: We were rationed to two eggs a week.
chinese: 每周配给我们两个鸡蛋。
pinyin: měi zhōu pèi jǐ wǒ men liǎng gè jī dàn。

english: Please add more spices to the cake.
chinese: 请给蛋糕多加点香料。
pinyin: qǐng jǐ dàn gāo duō jiā diǎn xiāng liào。

english: Winds are mainly light and variable.
chinese: 风力较弱，风向多变。
pinyin: fēng lì jiào ruò， fēng xiàng duō biàn。

english: They gave the chairman a tumultuous welcome.
chinese: 他们热烈地欢迎主席。
pinyin: tā men rè liè de huān yíng zhǔ xí。

english: Don't read in poor light.
chinese: 别在光线不好的地方看书。
pinyin: biè zài guāng xiàn bù hǎo de dì fang kàn shū。

english: He suffered a few cuts and scrapes.
chinese: 他割破和擦伤了几个地方。
pinyin: tā gē pò huò cā shāng le jǐ ge dì fang。

english: Her grief is a heavy load to bear.
chinese: 她心情沉重得难以忍受。
pinyin: tā xīn qíng chén zhòng de nán yǐ rěn shòu。

english: I didn't like it because it was noisy.
chinese: 我不喜欢它因为很吵闹。
pinyin: wǒ bù xǐ huan tā yīn wèi hěn chǎo nào。

english: I'm much obliged to you for helping us.
chinese: 非常感激你帮助了我们.
pinyin: fēi cháng gǎn jī nǐ bāng zhù le wǒ men.

english: She pricked her finger on/with a needle.
chinese: 她的手指叫针给扎伤了.
pinyin: tā de shǒu zhǐ jiào zhēn jǐ zhá shāng le.

english: A critical comment or judgment.
chinese: 批判批判性的评论或判断
pinyin: pī pàn pī pàn xìng de píng lùn huò pàn duàn

english: There are numberless stars in the sky.
chinese: 天空中有无数的星星。
pinyin: tiān kōng zhòng yǒu wú shù de xīng xing。

english: Go and fill this bucket with water for me.
chinese: 去替我装满一桶水来。
pinyin: qù tì wǒ zhuāng mǎn yī tǒng shuǐ lái。

english: The army is an extremely complex organism.
chinese: 军队是极其复杂的组织。
pinyin: jūn duì shì jí qí fù zá de zǔ zhī。

english: The aircraft was flying above thick fog.
chinese: 飞机在浓雾上空飞行。
pinyin: fēi jī zài nóng wù shàng kōng fēi xíng。

english: That party is only too exciting.
chinese: 那个晚会真是激动人心。
pinyin: nèi gè wǎn huì zhēn shì jī dòng rén xīn。

english: He talked about it in a similar way.
chinese: 他对此事有相似的说法。
pinyin: tā duì cǐ shì yǒu xiāng sì de shuō fa。

english: He was hewing away at the trunk of the tree.
chinese: 他不停地照著树干砍去.
pinyin: tā bù tíng de zhào著 shù gàn kǎn qù.

english: A plane is gone to order from France.
chinese: 从法国去订购一架飞机。
pinyin: zòng fǎ guó qù dìng gòu yī jià fēi jī。

english: She sent him off in high spirits.
chinese: 她兴高采烈地为他送行。
pinyin: tā xìng gāo cài liè de wèi tā sòng xíng。

english: There's a tear in the arm of my jacket.
chinese: 我上衣袖子上有个破口.
pinyin: wǒ shàng yī xiù zi shàng yǒu gè pò kǒu.

english: She looked very embarrassed.
chinese: 她显得很不好意思的样子。
pinyin: tā xiǎn de hěn bù hào yì si de yàng zi。

english: He looked at her with a solemn expression.
chinese: 他表情严肃地望着她。
pinyin: tā biǎo qíng yán sù de wàng zhuó tā。

english: The price of this dress is unreasonable.
chinese: 这件衣服的价格太高了。
pinyin: zhè jiàn yī fu de jià gé tài gāo le。

english: This work needs care; it mustn't be hurried.
chinese: 这活儿需要细心, 催不得.
pinyin: zhè huór xū yào xì xīn,  cuī bù dé.

english: Hurry up or else you'll be late.
chinese: 快，否则你就要来不及了。
pinyin: kuài， fǒu zé nǐ jiù yào lái bù jí le。

english: She's aiming at (ie trying to win) a scholarship.
chinese: 她争取获得奖学金.
pinyin: tā zhēng qǔ huò dé jiǎng xué jīn.

english: He won honor for his courage.
chinese: 他以勇气赢得大家的尊敬。
pinyin: tā yǐ yǒng qì yíng dé dà jiā de zūn jìng。

english: The gang is being hunted by the police.
chinese: 这帮人正被警方追捕。
pinyin: zhè bāng rén zhèng bèi jǐng fāng zhuī bǔ。

english: Look how our plants have shot up.
chinese: 瞧我们的庄稼长得多快。
pinyin: qiáo wǒ men de zhuāng jia zhǎng de duō kuài。

english: They received baptism at the church.
chinese: 他们在教堂接受了洗礼。
pinyin: tā men zài jiào táng jiē shòu le xǐ lǐ。

english: Owing to the rain, the match was cancelled.
chinese: 由于下雨，取消了比赛。
pinyin: yóu yú xià yǔ， qǔ xiāo le bǐ sài。

english: They emptied the biscuits onto the plate.
chinese: 他们把饼干倒在盘子里。
pinyin: tā men bǎ bǐng gān dào zài pán zi lǐ。

english: The views between us are discordant.
chinese: 我们之间的观点不一致。
pinyin: wǒ men zhī jiān de guān diǎn bù yī zhì。

english: It's dangerous to overtake on a bend.
chinese: 在转弯处超车十分危险.
pinyin: zài zhuǎn wān chù chāo jū shí fēn wēi xiǎn.

english: Copper conducts electricity better than iron does.
chinese: 铜的导电性比铁强。
pinyin: tóng de dǎo diàn xìng bì tiě qiáng。

english: He's a follower, not a leader.
chinese: 他是追随者，不是领导者。
pinyin: tā shì zhuī suí zhě， bú shì lǐng dào zhě。

english: There were some strange goings-on next door last night.
chinese: 昨夜隔壁有些异常.
pinyin: zuó yè gé bì yǒu xiē yì cháng.

english: She hopes to win the presidency.
chinese: 她希望争取到总统职位。
pinyin: tā xī wàng zhēng qǔ dào zǒng tǒng zhí wèi。

english: Things of that nature do not interest me.
chinese: 我对那种事物不感兴趣.
pinyin: wǒ duì nà zhòng shì wù bù gǎn xìng qu.

english: I'll have my watch repaired; it doesn't work.
chinese: 我得修修表，它不走了。
pinyin: wǒ de xiū xiū biǎo， tā bù zǒu le。

english: We're late; I must hurry you.
chinese: 咱们迟到了, 我必须催你一下.
pinyin: zán men chí dào le,  wǒ bì xū cuī nǐ yī xià.

english: He arrived at the meeting place beforehand.
chinese: 他提前到达会面地点。
pinyin: tā tí qián dào dá huì miàn dì diǎn。

english: We must maintain a firm attitude.
chinese: 我们必须采取坚定的态度。
pinyin: wǒ men bì xū cǎi qǔ jiān dìng de tài du。

english: The food should be kept at low temperature.
chinese: 这种食品应低温保存。
pinyin: zhè zhǒng shí pǐn yìng dī wēn bǎo cún。

english: He dislikes his wide nostrils.
chinese: 他不喜欢自己的宽大的鼻孔。
pinyin: tā bù xǐ huan zì jǐ de kuān dà de bí kǒng。

english: That woman has a very sharp tongue.
chinese: 那个女人说话非常尖刻。
pinyin: nèi gè nu:3 rén shuō huà fēi cháng jiān kè。

english: I asked the teacher for her advice.
chinese: 我征求这位老师的意见。
pinyin: wǒ zhēng qiú zhè wèi lǎo shī de yì jiàn。

english: He regained his health after the operation.
chinese: 手术后他恢复了健康。
pinyin: shǒu shù hòu tā huī fù le jiàn kāng。

english: She gave her mother an affectionate hug.
chinese: 她紧紧拥抱著她的母亲。
pinyin: tā jǐn jǐn yōng bào著 tā de mǔ qīn。

english: He knocked the old man down on purpose.
chinese: 他故意把那个老人撞倒。
pinyin: tā gù yì bǎ nèi gè lǎo rén zhuàng dào。

english: The news comes from a reliable source.
chinese: 这消息来自可靠的来源。
pinyin: zhè xiāo xi lái zì kě kào de lái yuán。

english: She wears a skirt of cambric.
chinese: 她穿着一条细棉布的裙子。
pinyin: tā chuān zhuó yī tiáo xì mián bù de qún zi。

english: The five-star red flag is fluttering in the wind.
chinese: 五星红旗迎风飘扬。
pinyin: wǔ xīng hóng qí yíng fēng piāo yáng。

english: Let me row you over to the other side of the lake.
chinese: 我把你划到湖对岸去吧.
pinyin: wǒ bǎ nǐ huà dào hú duì àn qù ba.

english: Not all metals work easily.
chinese: 不是所有的金属都容易加工
pinyin: bú shì suǒ yǒu de jīn shǔ dōu róng yì jiā gōng

english: Ancient people wore tunics.
chinese: 在古代人们穿着束腰外衣。
pinyin: zài gǔ dài rén men chuān zhuó shù yāo wài yī。

english: The heavy rain compelled us to stay indoors.
chinese: 大雨迫使我们呆在户内。
pinyin: dà yǔ pò shǐ wǒ men dāi zài hù nèi。

english: I wish I knew his address.
chinese: 要是我知道他的地址就好了。
pinyin: yào shì wǒ zhī dào tā de dì zhǐ jiù hào le。

english: We participated in the spring fair.
chinese: 我们参加了春季展览会。
pinyin: wǒ men cān jiā le chūn jì zhǎn lǎn huì。

english: I have to buy a new dry cell.
chinese: 我必须买一节新的干电池了。
pinyin: wǒ bì xū mǎi yī jié xīn de gàn diàn chí le。

english: He's entrusted his children to my care for a day.
chinese: 他托我照看一天孩子。
pinyin: tā tuō wǒ zhào kàn yī tiān hái zi。

english: The protesters were dragged away by the police.
chinese: 抗议者被警察拖走了。
pinyin: kàng yì zhě bèi jǐng chá tuō zǒu le。

english: He struggled to control his temper.
chinese: 他努力控制住自己的脾气。
pinyin: tā nǔ lì kòng zhì zhù zì jǐ de pí qì。

english: She has the ability to keep calm in an emergency.
chinese: 她有处变不惊的本事.
pinyin: tā yǒu chù biàn bù jīng de běn shì.

english: Reservations can be made by letter or fax.
chinese: 可以来信或传真预订。
pinyin: kě yǐ lái xìn huò chuán zhēn yù dìng。

english: The waves gently lap against the shore.
chinese: 海浪轻轻地拍打着海岸。
pinyin: hǎi làng qīng qīng de pāi da zhuó hǎi àn。

english: The sheets have worn thin in the middle.
chinese: 床单的中间部分磨薄了。
pinyin: chuáng dān de zhōng jiān bù fen mò bò le。

english: The road was blocked by a huge rock.
chinese: 道路被一块大石头堵住了。
pinyin: dào lù bèi yī kuài dà shí tou dǔ zhù le。

english: Sheer obstinacy prevented her from apologizing.
chinese: 她固执得就是不道歉。
pinyin: tā gù zhí de jiù shì bù dào qiàn。

english: Pleasant intoxication, as from alcohol.
chinese: 醉酒愉快的沉醉，如酒精
pinyin: zuì jiǔ yú kuài de chén zuì， rú jiǔ jīng

english: He unfurled the newspaper and began to read.
chinese: 他展开报纸开始阅读。
pinyin: tā zhǎn kāi bào zhǐ kāi shǐ yuè dú。

english: The reform is at its critical stage now.
chinese: 改革正处于关键阶段。
pinyin: gǎi gé zhèng chǔ yú guān jiàn jiē duàn。

english: I saw a couple of cats in the yard.
chinese: 在院子里我看见两只猫。
pinyin: zài yuàn zi lǐ wǒ kàn jiàn liǎng zhǐ māo。

english: Do keep out of the rain if you haven't a coat.
chinese: 没带雨衣那就避一下雨.
pinyin: mò dài yǔ yī nà jiù bì yī xià yǔ.

english: His father reminds him not to be careless.
chinese: 他父亲提醒他不要马虎。
pinyin: tā fù qīn tí xǐng tā bù yào mǎ hu。

english: Bitterly did we repent our decision.
chinese: 我们非常后悔做此决定。
pinyin: wǒ men fēi cháng hòu huǐ zuò cǐ jué dìng。

english: I consulted with her about my report.
chinese: 我和她商量过我的报告。
pinyin: wǒ huò tā shāng liàng guò wǒ de bào gào。

english: He entered the room with deliberate steps.
chinese: 他从容不迫地走进室内。
pinyin: tā cōng róng bù pò de zǒu jìn shì nèi。

english: I'll do everything possible to help you.
chinese: 我会尽一切可能帮助你。
pinyin: wǒ kuài jìn yī qiè kě néng bāng zhù nǐ。

english: Take the second turning on the left.
chinese: 在第二个转弯处向左转。
pinyin: zài dì èr gè zhuǎn wān chù xiàng zuǒ zhuàn。

english: The battlefield was a fearsome sight.
chinese: 这战场的情景触目惊心.
pinyin: zhè zhàn chǎng de qíng jǐng chù mù jīng xīn.

english: I gave my finger a prick with a needle.
chinese: 我的手指叫针给扎了一下.
pinyin: wǒ de shǒu zhǐ jiào zhēn jǐ zhá le yī xià.

english: He picked the watch up from the carpet.
chinese: 他从地毯上把表捡起来。
pinyin: tā zòng dì tǎn shàng bǎ biǎo jiǎn qǐ lai。

english: Stones were flying about in every direction.
chinese: 石块朝四面八方乱飞。
pinyin: shí kuài cháo sì miàn bā fāng luàn fēi。

english: He made no mention of having met her.
chinese: 他不提他曾经和她见面。
pinyin: tā bù tí tā céng jīng huò tā jiàn miàn。

english: Everyone should comply with the law.
chinese: 每个人都应该遵守法律。
pinyin: měi gè rén dōu yīng gāi zūn shǒu fǎ lu:4。

english: I need to change my dollars into francs.
chinese: 我需要把美金换成法郎.
pinyin: wǒ xū yào bǎ měi jīn huàn chéng fǎ láng.

english: Don't drop cigarette ash on the carpet.
chinese: 不要把烟灰掉在地毯上。
pinyin: bù yào bǎ yān huī diào zài dì tǎn shàng。

english: We have similar tastes in music.
chinese: 我们在音乐方面爱好相似.
pinyin: wǒ men zài yīn yuè fāng miàn ài hào xiāng sì.

english: May we proffer you our congratulations?
chinese: 请让我们向你表示祝贺.
pinyin: qǐng ràng wǒ men xiàng nǐ biǎo shì zhù hè.

english: The dancer was showered with praise.
chinese: 那个跳舞的人备受称赞。
pinyin: nèi gè tiào wǔ de rén bèi shòu chēng zàn。

english: This work needs care; it mustn't be hurried.
chinese: 这活儿需要细心, 催不得.
pinyin: zhè huór xū yào xì xīn,  cuī bù dé.

english: She spent the evening marking examination papers.
chinese: 她一晚上都在批试卷.
pinyin: tā yī wǎn shang dōu zài pī shì juàn.

english: The news of her death circulated quickly.
chinese: 她死去的消息迅速传开。
pinyin: tā sǐ qù de xiāo xi xùn sù zhuàn kāi。

english: Politics can be an explosive subject.
chinese: 政治问题容易引起争论。
pinyin: zhèng zhì wèn tí róng yì yǐn qǐ zhēng lùn。

english: They emptied the biscuits onto the plate.
chinese: 他们把饼干倒在盘子里。
pinyin: tā men bǎ bǐng gān dào zài pán zi lǐ。

english: This regulation refers only to children.
chinese: 这些规定仅适用于儿童。
pinyin: zhè xie guī dìng jǐn shì yòng yú ér tóng。

english: I'm full of the joys of spring.
chinese: 我心里充满了青春的欢乐。
pinyin: wǒ xīn lǐ chōng mǎn le qīng chūn de huān lè。

english: He was involved in working out a plan.
chinese: 他专心致志地制订计划。
pinyin: tā zhuān xīn zhì zhì de zhì dìng jì huà。

english: A man can do no more than he can.
chinese: 人只能做力所能及的事。
pinyin: rén zhǐ néng zuò lì suǒ néng jí de shì。

english: The people are oppressed by the military goverment.
chinese: 人民受军政府的压迫.
pinyin: rén mín shòu jūn zhèng fǔ de yā pò.

english: He was excused from attendance at the lecture.
chinese: 他获准可以不去听讲。
pinyin: tā huò zhǔn kě yǐ bù qù tīng jiǎng。

english: Potatoes can be parboiled before roasting.
chinese: 土豆可先煮至半熟再烤.
pinyin: tǔ dòu kě xiān zhǔ zhì bàn shú zài kǎo.

english: The luminous intensity on unit area.
chinese: 单位面积上的发光强度。
pinyin: dān wèi miàn ji shàng de fā guāng qiáng dù。

english: He's just trifling with her affections.
chinese: 他只是在玩弄她的感情。
pinyin: tā zhǐ shì zài wán nòng tā de gǎn qíng。

english: Better reduce the price than allow a discount.
chinese: 与其给折扣，不如减价。
pinyin: yǔ qí jǐ zhé kòu， bù rú jiǎn jià。

english: He acted in accordance with his beliefs.
chinese: 他按照自己的信念行事。
pinyin: tā àn zhào zì jǐ de xìn niàn xìng shì。

english: His speech followed the usual pattern.
chinese: 他按照通常的方式讲话.
pinyin: tā àn zhào tōng cháng de fāng shì jiǎng huà.

english: She waved them away impatiently.
chinese: 她不耐烦地挥手让他们走开.
pinyin: tā bù nài fán de huī shǒu ràng tā men zǒu kāi.

english: The expenditure of money on weapons is very large.
chinese: 购置武器的开支很大。
pinyin: gòu zhì wǔ qì de kāi zhī hěn dà。

english: She turned down the blankets and climbed into bed.
chinese: 她掀起毯子上床去了.
pinyin: tā xiān qǐ tǎn zi shàng chuáng qù le.

english: She arranged some flowerets in the vase.
chinese: 她往瓶子里插了些小花。
pinyin: tā wàng píng zi lǐ chā le xiē xiǎo huā。

english: I work for a commercial radio station.
chinese: 我在商业广播电台工作.
pinyin: wǒ zài shāng yè guǎng bō diàn tái gōng zuò.

english: He was only eight when he ascended the throne.
chinese: 他登上王位时才八岁。
pinyin: tā dēng shàng wáng wèi shí cái bā suì。

english: Her shoes chafed the skin on her feet.
chinese: 鞋子擦破了她脚上的皮肤。
pinyin: xié zi cā pò le tā jué shàng de pí fū。

english: The monument was fronted with stone.
chinese: 纪念碑的正面是石料做的.
pinyin: jì niàn bēi de zhèng miàn shì shí liào zuò de.

english: This dress is made of artificial fibers.
chinese: 这件衣服是人造纤维的。
pinyin: zhè jiàn yī fu shì rén zào xiān wéi de。

english: She makes mean little digs at him.
chinese: 她冲他说一些刻薄的挖苦话.
pinyin: tā chòng tā shuō yī xiē kē bó de wā kǔ huà.

english: Her skirt has a long slit.
chinese: 她的裙子上有个细长的开口。
pinyin: tā de qún zi shàng yǒu gè xì cháng de kāi kǒu。

english: He drew up a brief for his speech.
chinese: 他起草了一份讲话的概要。
pinyin: tā qǐ cǎo le yī fèn jiǎng huà de gài yào。

english: It's only the initiative of the investigation.
chinese: 这仅仅是调查的开始。
pinyin: zhè jǐn jǐn shì diào chá de kāi shǐ。

english: In saying this I am not aiming at you.
chinese: 这样说不是在针对你的。
pinyin: zhè yàng shuō bú shì zài zhēn duì nǐ de。

english: She went on a long sea voyage.
chinese: 她乘船在海上长途旅行。
pinyin: tā chéng chuán zài hǎi shàng cháng tú lu:3 xíng。

english: Please focus your minds on the following problem.
chinese: 请集中考虑以下问题.
pinyin: qǐng jí zhōng kǎo lu:4 yǐ xià wèn tí.

english: He is on a diet to reduce some weight.
chinese: 他正在节食以减轻体重。
pinyin: tā zhèng zài jié shí yǐ jiǎn qīng tǐ zhòng。

english: His pocket was all gummed up with candy.
chinese: 他的口袋全被糖粘住了。
pinyin: tā de kǒu dài quán bèi táng zhān zhù le。

english: I chanced to be thinking of the same thing.
chinese: 我碰巧想到同样的事。
pinyin: wǒ pèng qiǎo xiǎng dào tóng yàng de shì。

english: Most handwriting slants to the right.
chinese: 大多数手写体都向右斜。
pinyin: dà duō shù shǒu xiě tǐ dōu xiàng yòu xié。

english: Smoking is not good for your health.
chinese: 吸烟对你的健康没有好处。
pinyin: xī yān duì nǐ de jiàn kāng méi yǒu hǎo chu。

english: It's time to tackle my homework.
chinese: 现在该对付我的家庭作业了.
pinyin: xiàn zài gāi duì fu wǒ de jiā tíng zuò yè le.

english: There is a specific tool for each job.
chinese: 各工种配备特定的工具。
pinyin: gè gōng zhòng pèi bèi tè dìng de gōng jù。

english: He was too weak even to lift his hand.
chinese: 他虚弱得连手都抬不起来。
pinyin: tā xū ruò de lián shǒu dōu tái bù qǐ lai。

english: She tried to needle me into losing my temper.
chinese: 她想方设法惹我发脾气。
pinyin: tā xiǎng fāng shè fǎ rě wǒ fà pí qì。

english: You have only to show your passport.
chinese: 你只要出示你的护照即可。
pinyin: nǐ zhǐ yào chū shì nǐ de hù zhào jí kě。

english: He pulled out a pile of used bank note.
chinese: 他掏出一叠用旧了的纸币。
pinyin: tā tāo chū yī dié yòng jiù le de zhǐ bì。

english: The jungle swallowed up the explorers.
chinese: 探险人员消失在密林里了.
pinyin: tàn xiǎn rén yuán xiāo shī zài mì lín lǐ le.

english: The project was completed ahead of the schedule.
chinese: 这项工程提前完工。
pinyin: zhè xiàng gōng chéng tí qián wán gōng。

english: No doubt her death is related to politics.
chinese: 她的死无疑和政治有关。
pinyin: tā de sǐ wú yí Hé zhèng zhì yǒu guān。

english: Follow the text while I read it out to you.
chinese: 看著课文, 听我给你朗读.
pinyin: kàn著 kè wén,  tìng wǒ jǐ nǐ lǎng dú.

english: It is said that our progenitors are monkeys.

chinese: 我站在那里，害怕得直发抖。

chinese: 警察找回了被盗的珠宝。

english: I've got no record of this horse's form.
chinese: 我没有这匹马的情况记录。
pinyin: wǒ méi yǒu zhè pǐ mǎ de qíng kuàng jì lù。

english: I detected a change in her attitude.
chinese: 我发觉她态度上有所转变。
pinyin: wǒ fā jué tā tài du shàng yǒu suǒ zhuǎn biàn。

english: We differ about moral standards.
chinese: 我们对道德标准看法不一致。
pinyin: wǒ men duì dào dé biāo zhǔn kàn fǎ bù yī zhì。

english: The sheriff ordered the policemen to gather.
chinese: 警察局长命令警察集合。
pinyin: jǐng chá jú zhǎng mìng lìng jǐng chá jí hé。

english: I'll plump for noodles rather than buns.
chinese: 我要吃面条而不要吃馒头。
pinyin: wǒ yào jí miàn tiáo ér bù yào jí mán tou。

english: He is always happy whether rich or not.
chinese: 不管穷还是富，他都快活。
pinyin: bù guǎn qióng hái shì fù， tā dōu kuài huo。

english: The nurse was all kindness. (=The nurse was kindness itself.)
chinese: 这位护士非常亲切。
pinyin: zhè wèi hù shi fēi cháng qīn qiè。

english: His wretchedness aroused our sympathy.
chinese: 他的不幸激起了我们的同情。
pinyin: tā de bù xìng jī qǐ le wǒ men de tóng qíng。

english: West Coast Corps is a large corporation.
chinese: 西海岸公司是个大型公司。
pinyin: xī hǎi àn gōng sī shì gè dà xíng gōng sī。

english: They are grinding wheat into flour.
chinese: 他们正在把小麦磨成面粉。
pinyin: tā men zhèng zài bǎ xiǎo mài mò chéng miàn fěn。

english: The government has introduced a wage freeze.
chinese: 政府已宣布要冻结工资。
pinyin: zhèng fǔ yǐ xuān bù yào dòng jié gōng zī。

english: The road curved sharply to the right.
chinese: 道路有个急转弯拐向右边。
pinyin: dào lù yǒu gè jí zhuǎn wān guǎi xiàng yòu biān。

english: The President announced the dissolution of Parliament.
chinese: 总统宣布了议会解散。
pinyin: zǒng tǒng xuān bù le yì huì jiě sàn。

english: He moved into this house in April.
chinese: 他是四月份搬进这所房子的。
pinyin: tā shì sì yuè fèn bān jìn zhè suǒ fáng zi de。

english: She dressed up for the party.
chinese: 她打扮停当准备去参加晚会。
pinyin: tā dǎ bàn tíng dàng zhǔn bèi qù cān jiā wǎn huì。

english: The number of fish in coastal waters has decreased.
chinese: 沿海鱼的数量已减少了.
pinyin: yán hǎi yú de shù liàng yǐ jiǎn shǎo le.

english: I have mixed pigment with oil.
chinese: 我已经把颜料和油混合起来了。
pinyin: wǒ yǐ jīng bǎ yán liào huò yóu hùn hé qǐ lai le。

english: I'm really very excited by the story.
chinese: 这故事的确令我非常激动。
pinyin: zhè gù shì dí què lìng wǒ fēi cháng jī dòng。

english: I had two slices of toast as breakfast.
chinese: 我吃了两片烤面包当早餐。
pinyin: wǒ jí le liǎng piàn kǎo miàn bāo dàng zǎo cān。

english: She is an announcer in TV broadcast.
chinese: 她是电视台的一名主持人。
pinyin: tā shì diàn shì tái de yī míng zhǔ chí rén。

english: That girl likes to wear purple dresses.
chinese: 那个女孩喜欢穿紫色的衣服。
pinyin: nèi gè nu:3 hái xǐ huan chuān zǐ sè de yī fu。

english: There is a group of monkeys in the innermost depths of the forest.
chinese: 密林深处有群猴子。
pinyin: mì lín shēn chù yǒu qún hóu zi。

english: The doctor says it's just a touch of liver.
chinese: 医生说肝脏稍有些毛病。
pinyin: yī shēng shuō gān zàng shāo yǒu xiē máo bìng。

english: His behavior called forth sharp criticism.
chinese: 他的行为招致尖锐的批评。
pinyin: tā de xíng wéi zhāo zhì jiān ruì de pī píng。

english: She talked with him with sarcastic tones.
chinese: 她用挖苦的语调和他说话。
pinyin: tā yòng wā kǔ de yǔ diào huò tā shuō huà。

english: I am a regular reader of this newspaper.
chinese: 我是这份报纸的长期读者。
pinyin: wǒ shì zhè fèn bào zhǐ de cháng qī dú zhě。

english: I greet you in the name of the President.
chinese: 我代表总统前来迎接您。
pinyin: wǒ dài biǎo zǒng tǒng qián lái yíng jiē nín。

english: He sprinkled vinegar on his fish and chips.
chinese: 他把醋洒在鱼和土豆片上。
pinyin: tā bǎ cù sǎ zài yú huò tǔ dòu piàn shàng。

english: The boat pulled out into the middle of the river.
chinese: 那只船划出到了河中央.
pinyin: nà zhǐ chuán huà chū dào le hé zhōng yāng.

english: I've never made payment in Renminbi before.
chinese: 我从未用过人民币付款。
pinyin: wǒ zòng wèi yòng guò rén mín bì fù kuǎn。

english: The theater gives two performances a day.
chinese: 这座剧场一天演出两场。
pinyin: zhè zuò jù chǎng yī tiān yǎn chū liǎng chǎng。

english: The child is going through a difficult phase.
chinese: 那孩子正经历困难的阶段。
pinyin: nà hái zi zhèng jing lì kùn nan de jiē duàn。

english: Women don't wear corset nowadays.
chinese: 现在的妇女不再穿紧身衣了。
pinyin: xiàn zài de fù nu:3 bù zài chuān jǐn shēn yì le。

english: He greeted me with a greasy smile.
chinese: 他皮笑肉不笑地和我打了招呼.
pinyin: tā pí xiào ròu bù xiào de huò wǒ dǎ le zhāo hu.

english: The kid dug a tunnel in the sand.
chinese: 小孩们在沙堆里挖了一个地道。
pinyin: xiǎo hái men zài shā duī lǐ wā le yī gè dì dao。

english: It's time to shake out the red flag.
chinese: 是把这面红旗打开的时候了。
pinyin: shì bǎ zhè miàn hóng qí dǎ kāi de shí hou le。

english: The tiger is a representative of the cat family.
chinese: 老虎是猫科动物的典型。
pinyin: lǎo hǔ shì māo kē dòng wù de diǎn xíng。

english: Compare the areas of these triangles.
chinese: 比较一下这些三角形的面积.
pinyin: bǐ jiào yī xià zhè xie sān jiǎo xíng de miàn ji.

english: Her teaching was highly commended.
chinese: 她的教学工作受到高度赞扬.
pinyin: tā de jiào xué gōng zuò shòu dào gāo dù zàn yáng.

english: The quality is not so poor but it is acceptable.
chinese: 质量虽差，但仍能接受。
pinyin: zhì liàng suī cī， dàn réng néng jiē shòu。

english: He sent his car to the garage for repair.
chinese: 他把汽车送到修车厂修理。
pinyin: tā bǎ qì chē sòng dào xiū jū chǎng xiū lǐ。

english: The light was too dim for me to read easily.
chinese: 光线太暗，我看书有困难。
pinyin: guāng xiàn tài àn， wǒ kàn shū yǒu kùn nan。

english: This document carries the royal seal.
chinese: 这份文件上盖有王室印章。
pinyin: zhè fèn wén jiàn shàng gě yǒu wáng shì yìn zhāng。

english: I feel unqualified to speak on the subject.
chinese: 我自觉无资格就此问题发言.
pinyin: wǒ zì jué wú zī gé jiù cǐ wèn tí fā yán.

english: The sun emerged from behind the clouds.
chinese: 太阳从云层后面露出来了。
pinyin: tài yáng zòng yún céng hòu mian lù chū lái le。

english: The heat outside is unbearable.
chinese: 外面的高温真让人难以忍受。
pinyin: wài mian de gāo wēn zhēn ràng rén nán yǐ rěn shòu。

english: Huge earrings dangled from her ears.
chinese: 她的耳朵上吊着巨大的耳环。
pinyin: tā de ěr duo shàng diào zhuó jù dà de ěr huán。

english: Stop larking about and get on with your work.
chinese: 别到处胡闹了, 干活儿去吧.
pinyin: biè dào chù hú nào le,  gàn huó r qù ba.

english: I've left my gloves on the bus.
chinese: 我把手套落在公共汽车上了。
pinyin: wǒ bǎ shǒu tào luò zài gōng gòng qì chē shàng le。

english: My expenditure is conditioned by my income.
chinese: 我的支出受我的收入限制。
pinyin: wǒ de zhī chū shòu wǒ de shōu rù xiàn zhì。

english: I am attached to every tree and bush in my hometown.
chinese: 我依恋故乡的一草一木。
pinyin: wǒ yī liàn gù xiàng de yī cǎo yī mù。

english: The forests are widespread in our country.
chinese: 我们的国家森林分布很广。
pinyin: wǒ men de guó jiā sēn lín fēn bù hěn guǎng。

english: Let's pore deeply on the matter.
chinese: 让我们深入考虑一下这件事。
pinyin: ràng wǒ men shēn rù kǎo lu:4 yī xià zhè jiàn shì。

english: You must acquaint yourself with your new duties.
chinese: 你必须熟悉自己的新职务。
pinyin: nǐ bì xū shú xī zì jǐ de xīn zhí wù。

english: She (was) whisked up to the top floor in the lift.
chinese: 她乘电梯迅速到达顶层.
pinyin: tā chéng diàn tī xùn sù dào dá dǐng céng.

english: His original enthusiasm has turned sour.
chinese: 他当初的积极性已淡下去了.
pinyin: tā dāng chū de jī jí xìng yǐ dàn xià qu le.

english: This engine is made up of 20 parts.
chinese: 这台机器由二十个零件组成。
pinyin: zhè tái jī qì yóu èr shí gè líng jiàn zǔ chéng。

english: Here is a round-up of the latest news.
chinese: 以下是最新的新闻综合报道.
pinyin: yǐ xià shì zuì xīn de xīn wén zōng hé bào dào.

english: He is unbearable when he's in a bad temper.
chinese: 他发脾气时让人无法忍受。
pinyin: tā fà pí qì shí ràng rén wú fǎ rěn shòu。

english: Our bodies need adequate nutrition.
chinese: 我们的身体需要充足的营养。
pinyin: wǒ men de shēn tǐ xū yào chōng zú de yíng yǎng。

english: Not a leaf nor an insect stirred.
chinese: 不单是树叶, 连个虫子都不动.
pinyin: bù dān shì shù yè,  lián gè chóng zi dōu bù dòng.

english: She gives private lessons to supplement her income.
chinese: 她给私人授课以贴补收入.
pinyin: tā jǐ sī rén shòu kè yǐ tiē bǔ shōu rù.

english: Her skirt has very exquisite lace.
chinese: 她的裙子有非常精致的花边。
pinyin: tā de qún zi yǒu fēi cháng jīng zhì de huā biān。

english: I know they have been discussing me with you.
chinese: 我知道他们和你在议论我。
pinyin: wǒ zhī dào tā men huò nǐ zài yì lùn wǒ。

english: Stick a label on your suitcase.
chinese: 把标签粘贴在你的手提箱上。
pinyin: bǎ biāo qiān nián tiē zài nǐ de shǒu tí xiāng shàng。

english: I also learned the strength of the collective.
chinese: 我还认识到了集体的力量。
pinyin: wǒ huán rèn shi dào le jí tǐ de lì liang。

english: The government has ratified the project.
chinese: 政府已经批准了这个项目。
pinyin: zhèng fǔ yǐ jīng pī zhǔn le zhè gè xiàng mù。

english: The purchaser of the house will pay the deposit next week.
chinese: 买房者下星期付定金。
pinyin: mǎi fáng zhě xià xīng qī fù dìng jīn。

english: The paintings were in an excellent state of preservation.
chinese: 这些画保存的非常好。
pinyin: zhè xie huà bǎo cún de fēi cháng hào。

english: Every literate person should read this book.
chinese: 凡有文化的人都该一读此书.
pinyin: fán yǒu wén huà de rén dōu gāi yī dú cǐ shū.

english: She's been plugging away at her French lessons for months.
chinese: 她已刻苦攻读法语数月.
pinyin: tā yǐ kè kǔ gōng dú fǎ yǔ shù yuè.

english: The county town is a hundred li or so away from here.
chinese: 县城离这有百儿八十里。
pinyin: xiàn chéng lí zhè yǒu bǎi er bā shí lǐ。

english: Study hard, and you'll pass the exam.
chinese: 要用功，那么你才会考及格。
pinyin: yào yòng gōng， nà me nǐ cái kuài kǎo jí gé。

english: His idea received an enthusiastic response.
chinese: 他的想法获得热烈的响应。
pinyin: tā de xiǎng fǎ huò dé rè liè de xiǎng yìng。

english: It's an era of the miniskirt in the seventies.
chinese: 七十年代是超短裙时代。
pinyin: qī shí nián dài shì chāo duǎn qún shí dài。

english: The Senate confirms all treaties.
chinese: 所有的条约都由参议院批准。
pinyin: suǒ yǒu de tiáo yuē dōu yóu cān yì yuàn pī zhǔn。

english: The nurse took a sample of my blood for tests.
chinese: 护士抽了我的血样去化验。
pinyin: hù shi chōu le wǒ de xuè yàng qù huà yàn。

english: He has come over to China for the summer.
chinese: 他不远万里来中国度暑假。
pinyin: tā bù yuǎn Wàn Lǐ lái Zhōng guó dù shǔ jià。

english: Some fruits don't freeze well at all.
chinese: 有些水果根本就不能冷藏。
pinyin: yǒu xiē shuǐ guǒ gēn běn jiù bù néng lěng cáng。

english: They've made an urgent request for international aid.
chinese: 他们紧急请求国际援助。
pinyin: tā men jǐn jí qǐng qiú guó jì yuán zhù。

english: My son go to cram school every evening.
chinese: 我的儿子每晚都去上补习班。
pinyin: wǒ de ér zi měi wǎn dōu qù shàng bǔ xí bān。

english: The road curved sharply to the right.
chinese: 道路有个急转弯拐向右边。
pinyin: dào lù yǒu gè jí zhuǎn wān guǎi xiàng yòu biān。

english: Pay half now and the rest later.
chinese: 现在付一半, 剩下的以后再付。
pinyin: xiàn zài fù yī bàn,  shèng xià de yǐ hòu zài fù。

english: They are having a theological argument.
chinese: 他们正争论神学上的问题。
pinyin: tā men zhèng zhēng lùn shén xué shàng de wèn tí。

english: The publisher has printed10000 copies of the book.
chinese: 这本书出版社已印了10000册.
pinyin: zhè běn shū chū bǎn shè yǐ yìn lē0000 cè.

english: He was utterly ruthless in his determination to succeed.
chinese: 他下定决心争取成功。
pinyin: tā xià dìng jué xīn zhēng qǔ chéng gōng。

english: The enemy was put to flight by the advancing army.
chinese: 部队向前进, 赶跑了敌人.
pinyin: bù duì xiàng qián jìn,  gǎn pǎo le dí rén.

english: I was too ashamed to tell her that I had failed.
chinese: 我不好意思告诉她我不及格。
pinyin: wǒ bù hǎo yì si gào su tā wǒ bù jí gé。

english: We sometimes eat rice instead of potatoes.
chinese: 我们有时候吃大米, 不吃土豆.
pinyin: wǒ men yǒu shí hou jí dà mǐ,  bù jí tǔ dòu.

english: I'll try and rake out something for you to wear.
chinese: 我尽量找些东西给你穿。
pinyin: wǒ jìn liàng zhǎo xiē dōng xi jǐ nǐ chuān。

english: It was difficult to gauge how people would respond.
chinese: 大家的反应如何难以估计。
pinyin: dà jiā de fǎn yìng rú hé nán yǐ gū jì。

english: The kitten uses that box as its bed.
chinese: 小猫把那个盒子当做它的床。
pinyin: xiǎo māo bǎ nèi gè hé zi dàng zuò tā de chuáng。

english: There is not much comedy in modern war.
chinese: 现代战争并不是好玩的事。
pinyin: xiàn dài zhàn zhēng bìng bù shì hào wàn de shì。

english: He confessed that he had never seen her before.
chinese: 他承认以前从未见过她。
pinyin: tā chéng rèn yǐ qián zòng wèi xiàn guò tā。

english: We are living in pleasant surroundings.
chinese: 我们生活在舒适的环境中。
pinyin: wǒ men shēng huó zài shū shì de huán jìng zhòng。

english: He sneaked a chocolate from the box.
chinese: 他从盒子里偷拿了一块巧克力。
pinyin: tā zòng hé zi lǐ tōu ná le yī kuài qiǎo kè lì。

english: The teachers praised him with one accord.
chinese: 老师们异口同声地称赞他。
pinyin: lǎo shī men yì kǒu tóng shēng de chēng zàn tā。

english: He reigned over the country for forty years.
chinese: 他统治了这个国家四十年。
pinyin: tā tǒng zhì le zhè gè guó jiā sì shí nián。

english: We are living in pleasant surroundings.
chinese: 我们生活在舒适的环境中。
pinyin: wǒ men shēng huó zài shū shì de huán jìng zhòng。

english: Let me take this opportunity to say a few words.
chinese: 请让我趁此机会讲几句话.
pinyin: qǐng ràng wǒ chèn cǐ jī huì jiǎng jǐ jù huà.

english: We traced out our route on the map.
chinese: 我们在地图上画出我们的路线.
pinyin: wǒ men zài dì tú shàng huà chū wǒ men de lù xiàn.

english: He kept his wallet in an ,inside pocket.
chinese: 他把钱包放在里面的口袋里.
pinyin: tā bǎ qián bāo fàng zài lǐ miàn de kǒu dài lǐ.

english: The child is going through a difficult phase.
chinese: 那孩子正经历困难的阶段。
pinyin: nà hái zi zhèng jing lì kùn nan de jiē duàn。

english: He took my ace with a low trump.
chinese: 他用一张小的王牌吃了我的A牌。
pinyin: tā yòng yī zhāng xiǎo de wáng pái jí le wǒ deA pái。

english: He moved the table over to the center of the room.
chinese: 他把桌子移到房间中心。
pinyin: tā bǎ zhuō zi yí dào fáng jiān zhōng xīn。

english: The tennis club has organized a dance.
chinese: 网球俱乐部组织了一次舞会。
pinyin: wǎng qiú jù yuè bù zǔ zhī le yī cì wǔ huì。

english: The argument boiled over into open war.
chinese: 争论演变成了公开的论战。
pinyin: zhēng lùn yǎn biàn chéng le gōng kāi de lùn zhàn。

english: She felt her creativity was being strangled.
chinese: 她觉得她的创造力难以发挥.
pinyin: tā jué de tā de chuàng zào lì nán yǐ fā huī.

english: For one reason or another, she committed suicide.
chinese: 不知什么原因，她自杀了。
pinyin: bù zhī shén me yuán yīn， tā zì shā le。

english: We are disappointed in our new teacher.
chinese: 我们对我们的新老师很失望。
pinyin: wǒ men duì wǒ men de xīn lǎo shī hěn shī wàng。

english: Her new play has attracted a lot of publicity.
chinese: 她的新剧作获得广泛宣传.
pinyin: tā de xīn jù zuò huò dé guǎng fàn xuān chuán.

english: Most plays are written in dialogue.
chinese: 大多数戏剧都是用对话体写的.
pinyin: dà duō shù xì jù dōu shì yòng duì huà tǐ xiě de.

english: Admittedly, he didn't know that at the time.
chinese: 无可否认, 他当时并不知道.
pinyin: wú kě fǒu rèn,  tā dāng shí bìng bù zhī dào.

english: The statements were of political character.
chinese: 这种声明具有政治性质。
pinyin: zhè zhǒng shēng míng jù yǒu zhèng zhì xìng zhì。

english: It was snowing, and so I could not go out.
chinese: 天在下雪，所以我无法外出。
pinyin: tiān zài xià xuě， suǒ yǐ wǒ wú fǎ wài chū。

english: The hot sun had warped the cover of the book.
chinese: 太阳把这本书的书皮晒弯了.
pinyin: tài yáng bǎ zhè běn shū de shū pí shài wān le.

english: They were adversaries in the tennis match.
chinese: 在网球赛中，他们是对手。
pinyin: zài wǎng qiú sài zhòng， tā men shì duì shǒu。

english: His fatness renders him unable to bend down.
chinese: 他太胖了，以致于弯不下腰。
pinyin: tā tài pàng le， yǐ zhì yú wān bù xià yāo。

english: She plunged her hands into her coat pockets.
chinese: 她把两手插在上衣口袋里。
pinyin: tā bǎ liǎng shǒu chā zài shàng yī kǒu dài lǐ。

english: We are working in conjunction with the police.
chinese: 我们与警方配合进行工作.
pinyin: wǒ men yù jǐng fāng pèi hé jìn xíng gōng zuò.

english: He was (the) captain of the football team for five years.
chinese: 他当了五年的足球队长.
pinyin: tā dàng le wǔ nián de zú qiú duì zhǎng.

english: Workers are removing impurities from silver.
chinese: 工人们正去除银中的杂质。
pinyin: gōng rén men zhèng qù chú yín zhòng dì zá zhì。

english: They worked for the promotion of world peace.
chinese: 他们为促进世界和平而努力.
pinyin: tā men wèi cù jìn shì jiè hé píng ér nǔ lì.

english: I do not like my monotonous work.
chinese: 我不喜欢我那单调乏味的工作。
pinyin: wǒ bù xǐ huan wǒ nà dān diào fá wèi de gōng zuò。

english: Take whatsoever measures you consider best.
chinese: 采取任何你认为最好的措施。
pinyin: cǎi qǔ rèn hé nǐ rèn wéi zuì hǎo de cuò shī。

english: He is exempt from punishment about this thing.
chinese: 关于此事对他已免于处分。
pinyin: guān yú cǐ shì duì tā yǐ miǎn yú chǔ fēn。

english: She stumbled on his true identity.
chinese: 她意外地发现了他的真实身份。
pinyin: tā yì wài de fā xiàn le tā de zhēn shí shēn fèn。

english: My aunt can be a bit of a terror.
chinese: 我姑姑有时候还真有点讨人厌.
pinyin: wǒ gū gu yǒu shí hou huán zhēn yǒu diǎn tǎo rén yàn.

english: I can hardly wait to hear the news.
chinese: 我迫不及待地想听到这个消息。
pinyin: wǒ pò bù jí dài de xiǎng tīng dào zhè gè xiāo xi。

english: Please unplug the TV before you go to bed.
chinese: 临睡前请拔下电视机的插头.
pinyin: lín shuì qián qǐng bá xià diàn shì jī de chā tóu.

english: The police are on the run to catch the murderer.
chinese: 警方正在忙着捕捉逃犯。
pinyin: jǐng fāng zhèng zài máng zhuó bǔ zhuō táo fàn。

english: The sun is the ultimate source of energy.
chinese: 太阳是能量的最基本来源。
pinyin: tài yáng shì néng liàng de zuì jī běn lái yuán。

english: Their new house is a real dream.
chinese: 他们的新房子真像梦一般美好。
pinyin: tā men de xīn fáng zi zhēn xiàng mèng yì bān měi hǎo。

english: We will pay for houses by monthly installments.
chinese: 我们将按月分期付款买房。
pinyin: wǒ men jiàng àn yuè fēn qī fù kuǎn mǎi fáng。

english: The Meteorologist drew a picture of weather.
chinese: 气象学者画了一张天气图。
pinyin: qì xiàng xué zhě huà le yī zhāng tiān qì tú。

english: One warm summer evening.../On a warm summer evening...
chinese: 在夏天一个温暖的夜晚...
pinyin: zài xià tiān yī gè wēn nuǎn de yè wǎn...

english: The police are on the run to catch the murderer.
chinese: 警方正在忙着捕捉逃犯。
pinyin: jǐng fāng zhèng zài máng zhuó bǔ zhuō táo fàn。

english: It is no good asking her for a date.
chinese: 要求和她定个约会也没有用。
pinyin: yāo qiú huò tā dìng gè yuē huì yě méi yǒu yòng。

english: I envy Mike, whose car is fancy.
chinese: 真羡慕麦克，他的车子真漂亮。
pinyin: zhēn xiàn mù mài kè， tā de jū zi zhēn piào liang。

english: The hospital imported some surgical instruments.
chinese: 医院进口了一些外科器械。
pinyin: yī yuàn jìn kǒu le yī xiē wài kē qì xiè。

english: I feel that such gatherings are worthless.
chinese: 我认为这样的集会毫无价值。
pinyin: wǒ rèn wéi zhè yàng de jí huì háo wú jià zhí。

english: The invention was a collective effort.
chinese: 那项发明是集体努力的成果。
pinyin: nà xiàng fā míng shì jí tǐ nǔ lì de chéng guǒ。

english: Stern as he is, he is full of sympathy.
chinese: 虽然他严格，却富有同情心。
pinyin: suī rán tā yán gé， què fù yǒu tóng qíng xīn。

english: The house has a very good position.
chinese: 这所房子处于一个很好的位置。
pinyin: zhè suǒ fáng zi chǔ yú yī gè hěn hǎo de wèi zhi。

english: A road roller is used in making and repairing roads.
chinese: 压路机是用来修筑道路的。
pinyin: yà lù jī shì yòng lái xiū zhù dào lù de。

english: He was utterly ruthless in his determination to succeed.
chinese: 他下定决心争取成功。
pinyin: tā xià dìng jué xīn zhēng qǔ chéng gōng。

english: I enter into partnership with him to do export business.
chinese: 我与他合伙做出口生意。
pinyin: wǒ yù tā hé huǒ zuò chū kǒu shēng yi。

english: He saved his strength for the end of the race.
chinese: 他留着劲在比赛结束时用。
pinyin: tā liú zhuó jìng zài bǐ sài jié shù shí yòng。

english: The average snowfall here is 10cm a year.
chinese: 这里年平均降雪量为10厘米.
pinyin: zhè lǐ nián píng jūn xiáng xuě liàng wèī0 lí mǐ.

english: Nobody dared lift their eyes from the ground.
chinese: 没有人敢把视线离开地面。
pinyin: méi yǒu rén gǎn bǎ shì xiàn lí kāi dì miàn。

english: Exercise is profitable in all ages.
chinese: 运动对于各年龄段都很有利。
pinyin: yùn dòng duì yú gè nián líng duàn dōu hěn yǒu lì。

english: He bellowed with pain when the tooth was pulled out.
chinese: 牙被拔掉时，他疼得大叫。
pinyin: yá bèi bá diào shí， tā téng de dà jiào。

english: The climate here is like that of Taipei.
chinese: 这儿的气候和台北非常相似。
pinyin: zhèr de qì hòu huò Tái běi fēi cháng xiāng sì。

english: It all amounts to a lot of hard work.
chinese: 那一切意味看大量艰苦工作。
pinyin: nà yī qiè yì wèi kàn dà liàng jiān kù gōng zuò。

english: She resigned her children to the care of a neighbor.
chinese: 她委托邻居照顾她的孩子。
pinyin: tā wěi tuō lín jū zhào gu tā de hái zi。

english: Banking faces much competition nowadays.
chinese: 如今，银行业面临许多竞争。
pinyin: rú jīn， yín háng yè miàn lín xǔ duō jìng zhēng。

english: We shall carry forward the revolutionary tradition.
chinese: 我们应该发扬革命传统。
pinyin: wǒ men yīng gāi fā yáng gé mìng chuán tǒng。

english: The soldier received a serious wound on the chest.
chinese: 这名士兵胸部受了重伤。
pinyin: zhè míng shì bīng xiōng bù shòu le zhòng shāng。

english: She attend a course for junior hotel manager.
chinese: 她参加初级饭店经理课程。
pinyin: tā cān jiā chū jí fàn diàn jīng lǐ kè chéng。

english: You judged the distance to a nicety.
chinese: 你对那段距离的判断十分精确.
pinyin: nǐ duì nà duàn jù lí de pàn duàn shí fēn jīng què.

english: We shall carry forward the revolutionary tradition.
chinese: 我们应该发扬革命传统。
pinyin: wǒ men yīng gāi fā yáng gé mìng chuán tǒng。

english: He repeated what you said word for word.
chinese: 他一字不差地复述了您说的话。
pinyin: tā yī zì bù cī de fù shù le nín shuō de huà。

english: You should put a robe on if you go out in a cold day.
chinese: 冷天出门时要披上披肩。
pinyin: lěng tiān chū mén shí yào pī shàng pī jiān。

english: Keep calm, whatever happens.
chinese: 无论发生什么事都要保持冷静。
pinyin: wú lùn fā shēng shén me shì dōu yào bǎo chí lěng jìng。

english: I only wear high heels on special occasions.
chinese: 我只在特殊场合穿高跟鞋。
pinyin: wǒ zhǐ zài tè shū chǎng hé chuān gāo gēn xié。

english: This theory is at variance with the known facts.
chinese: 这种理论与已知事实不符。
pinyin: zhè zhǒng lǐ lùn yù yǐ zhī shì shí bù fú。

english: A belt of trees grew between the two fields.
chinese: 两块田之间有一条树木带。
pinyin: liǎng kuài tián zhī jiān yǒu yī tiáo shù mù dài。

english: His biography is a saga of scientific research.
chinese: 他的传记就是一部科研记实.
pinyin: tā de zhuàn jì jiù shì yī bù kē yán jì shí.

english: I have decided not to pursue (ie investigate) the matter any further.
chinese: 我决定不再追查那事.
pinyin: wǒ jué dìng bù zài zhuī chá nà shì.

english: Scattered showers are expected this afternoon.
chinese: 预料今天下午有零星阵雨。
pinyin: yù liào jīn tiān xià wǔ yǒu líng xīng zhèn yǔ。

english: I prefer landscape to still life.
chinese: 我喜欢风景画，不喜欢静物画。
pinyin: wǒ xǐ huan fēng jǐng huà， bù xǐ huan jìng wù huà。

english: Only human beings are capable of speech.
chinese: 只有人类才具有说话的能力。
pinyin: zhǐ yǒu rén lèi cái jù yǒu shuō huà de néng lì。

english: He's been a bit off his oats since his illness.
chinese: 他生病以来胃口就不大好。
pinyin: tā shēng bìng yǐ lái wèi kǒu jiù bú dà hào。

english: He is a favourite with his uncle/a favourite of his uncle's/his uncle's favourite.
chinese: 他伯伯特别喜爱他.
pinyin: tā bó bo tè bié xǐ ài tā.

english: Our country has a bountiful supply of food.
chinese: 我们国家有充足的食物供应。
pinyin: wǒ men guó jiā yǒu chōng zú de shí wù gōng yìng。

english: They took full advantage of the hotel's facilities.
chinese: 他们充分利用旅馆的设备.
pinyin: tā men chōng fèn lì yòng lu:3 guǎn de shè bèi.

english: The health authorities are investigating the matter.
chinese: 卫生当局正调查这件事.
pinyin: wèi shēng dāng jú zhèng diào chá zhè jiàn shì.

english: It is boring to listen to the same story.
chinese: 听相同的故事是令人厌烦的。
pinyin: tìng xiāng tóng de gù shì shì lìng rén yàn fán de。

english: Most countries have a decimal currency.
chinese: 大多数国家使用十进制货币。
pinyin: dà duō shù guó jiā shǐ yòng shí jìn zhì huò bì。

english: The consulate was upgraded to embassy status.
chinese: 该领事馆已升格为大使馆.
pinyin: gāi lǐng shì guǎn yǐ shēng gé wèi dà shǐ guǎn.

english: He tried a second time only to fail again.
chinese: 他再试一次，竟然还是失败。
pinyin: tā zài shì yī cì， jìng rán hái shì shī bài。

english: We should take steps to prevent war.
chinese: 我们应当采取措施制止战争。
pinyin: wǒ men yīng dāng cǎi qǔ cuò shī zhì zhǐ zhàn zhēng。

english: The poem showed great intensity of feeling.
chinese: 这首诗表现出强烈的激情。
pinyin: zhè shǒu shī biǎo xiàn chū qiáng liè de jī qíng。

english: Get hold of the rope or you will fall.
chinese: 抓紧绳子, 否则你会跌下来的。
pinyin: zhuā jǐn shéng zi,  fǒu zé nǐ kuài diē xia lai de。

english: She lives a long way from home.
chinese: 她远远地离开故乡在外地生活。
pinyin: tā yuǎn yuǎn de lí kāi gù xiàng zài wài de shēng huó。

english: They use ultraviolet lamp to kill pests.
chinese: 他们使用紫外线灯杀死害虫。
pinyin: tā men shǐ yòng zǐ wài xiàn dēng shā sǐ hài chóng。

english: I hate the prodigal administration.
chinese: 我痛恨铺张浪费的行政机关。
pinyin: wǒ tòng hèn pù zhāng làng fèi de xíng zhèng jī guān。

english: He sent me the news by wireless telegraph.
chinese: 他用无线电报把消息告诉我。
pinyin: tā yòng wú xiàn diàn bào bǎ xiāo xi gào su wǒ。

english: The capital is in the extreme south of the country.
chinese: 首都在这个国家的最南端。
pinyin: shǒu dū zài zhè gè guó jiā de zuì nán duān。

english: Flowers are often fertilized by bees as they gather nectar.
chinese: 蜜蜂采蜜时常使花受粉.
pinyin: mì fēng cài mì shí cháng shǐ huā shòu fěn.

english: Lay heavy stress on law and order.
chinese: 主要重点放在法律和秩序上。
pinyin: zhǔ yào zhòng diǎn fàng zài fǎ lu:4 huò zhì xù shàng。

english: He is a member of the varsity football team.
chinese: 他是大学足球代表队的球员。
pinyin: tā shì dà xué zú qiú dài biǎo duì de qiú yuán。

english: Arrogance is one of his less attractive characteristics.
chinese: 骄傲自大是他的一个缺点.
pinyin: jiāo ào zì dà shì tā de yī gè quē diǎn.

english: The butter will soften out of the fridge.
chinese: 黄油从冰箱中取出会变软.
pinyin: huáng yóu zòng bīng xiāng zhòng qǔ chū huì biàn ruǎn.

english: To ride in an aeroplane you have to book in advance.
chinese: 要乘飞机必须提前定位子。
pinyin: yào chéng fēi jī bì xū tí qián dìng wèi zi。

english: The two lovers had met only by stealth.
chinese: 那两个情人只是偷偷地会面。
pinyin: nà liǎng gè qíng rén zhǐ shì tōu tōu de huì miàn。

english: Our party has a large following in the south.
chinese: 我党在南方有一大批拥护者.
pinyin: wǒ dǎng zài nán fāng yǒu yī dà pī yōng hù zhě.

english: Once he made bold to air his views.
chinese: 有一次他大胆提出了自己的看法。
pinyin: yǒu yī cì tā dà dǎn tí chū le zì jǐ de kàn fǎ。

english: I was shredding top-secret documents at that time.
chinese: 我当时正把机密文件切碎。
pinyin: wǒ dāng shí zhèng bǎ jī mì wén jiàn qiè suì。

english: She instructed the trainee nurses in giving injections.
chinese: 她指导实习护士练习注射.
pinyin: tā zhǐ dǎo shí xí hù shi liàn xí zhù shè.

english: We must increase our output to meet demand.
chinese: 我们必须提高产量满足需求。
pinyin: wǒ men bì xū tí gāo chǎn liàng mǎn zú xū qiú。

english: Prices have not shown much variation this year.
chinese: 今年物价没显出多大变化。
pinyin: jīn nián wù jià mò xiǎn chū duō dà biàn huà。

english: There are fluctuations in the state of his health.
chinese: 他的健康状况时好时坏。
pinyin: tā de jiàn kāng zhuàng kuàng shí hào shí huài。

english: I don't fully understand his reasons for leaving.
chinese: 我不完全理解他离开的理由。
pinyin: wǒ bù wán quán lǐ jiě tā lí kāi de lǐ yóu。

english: Her secretary took care of all her appointments.
chinese: 她的秘书处理她的一切约会。
pinyin: tā de mì shū chǔ lǐ tā de yī qiè yuē huì。

english: There is a chronic unemployment problem in America.
chinese: 在美国存在长期失业问题。
pinyin: zài Měi guó cún zài cháng qī shī yè wèn tí。

english: We've grown many vegetables in our garden.
chinese: 我们在花园里种了许多蔬菜。
pinyin: wǒ men zài huā yuán lǐ zhòng le xǔ duō shū cài。

english: He deposited the case in the left luggage office.
chinese: 他把箱子放在行李寄存处。
pinyin: tā bǎ xiāng zǐ fàng zài xíng li jì cún chù。

english: She bought many socks in the hosiery department.
chinese: 她在针织品部买了很多袜子。
pinyin: tā zài zhēn zhī pǐn bù mǎi le hěn duō wà zi。

english: The overseas trade has become the main project.
chinese: 海外贸易成为主要的项目。
pinyin: hǎi wài mào yì chéng wéi zhǔ yào de xiàng mù。

english: The boat chugged along the canal.
chinese: 小船稳稳地顺著运河突突地航行.
pinyin: xiǎo chuán wěn wěn de shùn著 yùn hé tū tū de háng xíng.

english: He asked his secretary to make a copy of the document.
chinese: 他叫秘书把文件复制一份。
pinyin: tā jiào mì shū bǎ wén jiàn fù zhì yī fèn。

english: We must promote commerce with neighbouring countries.
chinese: 我们必须促进与邻国的贸易.
pinyin: wǒ men bì xū cù jìn yù lín guó de mào yì.

english: Our business is a joint/shared responsibility.
chinese: 我们的公司实行共同责任制.
pinyin: wǒ men de gōng sī shí xíng gòng tóng zé rèn zhì.

english: I was attracted by the striking idea.
chinese: 我被这个惊人的想法吸引住了。
pinyin: wǒ bèi zhè gè jīng rén de xiǎng fǎ xī yǐn zhù le。

english: My wife was disagreeable to me this morning.
chinese: 今天早上我太太对我发脾气。
pinyin: jīn tiān zǎo shang wǒ tài tai duì wǒ fà pí qì。

english: My grandmother has a complex against foreigners.
chinese: 我奶奶对外国人抱有偏见。
pinyin: wǒ nǎi nai duì wài guó rén bào yǒu piān jiàn。

english: Only a few people inhabited the island.
chinese: 只有少数人在这个岛上居住。
pinyin: zhǐ yǒu shǎo shù rén zài zhè gè dǎo shàng jū zhù。

english: Talks between management and unions have collapsed.
chinese: 资方和工会的谈判失败了。
pinyin: zī fāng huò gōng huì de tán pàn shī bài le。

english: The city council approved the building plan.
chinese: 市议会批准了这项建筑计划。
pinyin: shì yì huì pī zhǔn le zhè xiàng jiàn zhù jì huà。

english: We needed someone to fix the tape recorder.
chinese: 我们需要有人来修理录音机。
pinyin: wǒ men xū yào yǒu rén lái xiū lǐ lù yīn jī。

english: Your faults of pronunciation can be remedied.
chinese: 你的发音毛病是可以纠正的。
pinyin: nǐ de fā yīn máo bìng shì kě yǐ jiū zhèng de。

english: Your faults of pronunciation can be remedied.
chinese: 你的发音毛病是可以纠正的。
pinyin: nǐ de fā yīn máo bìng shì kě yǐ jiū zhèng de。

english: I loathe having to go to these conferences.
chinese: 我最讨厌的是得参加这些会议.
pinyin: wǒ zuì tǎo yàn de shì de cān jiā zhè xie huì yì.

english: I certify that he has received your money.
chinese: 我证明他已经收到了你的钱。
pinyin: wǒ zhèng míng tā yǐ jīng shōu dào le nǐ de qián。

english: The antique furniture was made in 1700.
chinese: 这件古老的家具是1700年制造的。
pinyin: zhè jiàn gǔ lǎo de jiā jù shì1700 nián zhì zào de。

english: They use ultraviolet lamp to kill pests.
chinese: 他们使用紫外线灯杀死害虫。
pinyin: tā men shǐ yòng zǐ wài xiàn dēng shā sǐ hài chóng。

english: He packed up his things and left.
chinese: 他把东西装进箱子里就动身了。
pinyin: tā bǎ dōng xi zhuāng jìn xiāng zǐ lǐ jiù dòng shēn le。

english: The company wants to situate its headquarters in the north.
chinese: 公司想把总部设在北方.
pinyin: gōng sī xiǎng bǎ zǒng bù shè zài běi fāng.

english: The accident did a lot of damage to the car.
chinese: 这一事故把汽车损坏得很厉害.
pinyin: zhè yī shì gù bǎ qì chē sǔn huài de hěn lì hai.

english: We switched off the motor and started to drift (along).
chinese: 我们关闭发动机开始滑行.
pinyin: wǒ men guān bì fā dòng jī kāi shǐ huá xíng.

english: Poor chap, his wife has just died.
chinese: 不幸的小伙子啊, 他刚刚死了妻子.
pinyin: bù xìng de xiǎo huǒ zi a,  tā gāng gang sǐ le qī zi.

english: One who critically disagrees.
chinese: 老是唱反调的人批判地不同意的人
pinyin: lǎo shi chàng fǎn tiáo de rén pī pàn de bù tóng yì de rén

english: The artist has caught her smile perfectly.
chinese: 艺术家巧妙地捕捉住她的笑容.
pinyin: yì shù jiā qiǎo miào de bǔ zhuō zhù tā de xiào róng.

english: He was so tired that he fell asleep quickly.
chinese: 他非常疲劳, 很快就睡着了。
pinyin: tā fēi cháng pí láo,  hěn kuài jiù shuì zhāo le。

english: We can group animals into many types.
chinese: 我们可以把动物分成很多种类。
pinyin: wǒ men kě yǐ bǎ dòng wù fèn chéng hěn duō zhǒng lèi。

english: The books in the library are classified by subject.
chinese: 图书馆的书是按科目分类的。
pinyin: tú shū guǎn de shū shì àn kē mù fēn lèi de。

english: Compiling a dictionary is an awful sweat.
chinese: 编词典是一种极其吃力的苦差。
pinyin: biān cí diǎn shì yī zhòng jí qí chī lì de kǔ cī。

english: Flowers are often fertilized by bees as they gather nectar.
chinese: 蜜蜂采蜜时常使花受粉.
pinyin: mì fēng cài mì shí cháng shǐ huā shòu fěn.

english: She loves to gossip to her neighbors.
chinese: 她喜欢议论邻居们的是非长短。
pinyin: tā xǐ huan yì lùn lín jū men de shì fēi cháng duǎn。

english: Bitter arguments ensued from this misunderstanding.
chinese: 这一误会引发了激烈的争论.
pinyin: zhè yī wù huì yǐn fā le jī liè de zhēng lùn.

english: The scenery is too beautiful for words.
chinese: 风景优美，非文字所能形容。
pinyin: fēng jǐng yōu měi， fēi wén zì suǒ néng xíng róng。

english: He beckoned to me from across the street.
chinese: 他在马路对面向我招手致意。
pinyin: tā zài mǎ lù duì miàn xiàng wǒ zhāo shǒu zhì yì。

english: I was too ashamed to tell her that I had failed.
chinese: 我不好意思告诉她我不及格。
pinyin: wǒ bù hǎo yì si gào su tā wǒ bù jí gé。

english: The government's policies are beginning to tell.
chinese: 政府的政策开始发挥作用了.
pinyin: zhèng fǔ de zhèng cè kāi shǐ fā huī zuò yòng le.

english: He is not so sick but he can attend a class.
chinese: 他尽管有病，还是可以上课。
pinyin: tā jǐn guǎn yǒu bìng， hái shì kě yǐ shàng kè。

english: His son is a soldier in a cavalry regiment.
chinese: 他的儿子是骑兵团的一名战士。
pinyin: tā de ér zi shì qí bīng tuán de yī míng zhàn shì。

english: There are 300 students or so in this middle school.
chinese: 这所中学大约有300个学生。
pinyin: zhè suǒ zhōng xué dà yuē yǒǔ00 gè xué sheng。

english: I felt I hadn't been treated fairly.
chinese: 我觉得我没有受到公正的对待。
pinyin: wǒ jué de wǒ méi yǒu shòu dào gōng zhèng de duì dài。

english: This elementary school is affiliated to a university.
chinese: 这所小学附属于一所大学。
pinyin: zhè suǒ xiǎo xué fù shǔ yú yī suǒ dà xué。

english: I recommend that you inquire about the job.
chinese: 我建议你打听一下这项工作。
pinyin: wǒ jiàn yì nǐ dǎ ting yī xià zhè xiàng gōng zuò。

english: I am so sorry to give you not a little trouble.
chinese: 真抱歉给你添了这么多麻烦。
pinyin: zhēn bào qiàn jǐ nǐ tiān le zhè me duō má fan。

english: The proposition is so clear that it needs no explanation.
chinese: 观点十分明确, 无须解释.
pinyin: guān diǎn shí fēn míng què,  wú xū jiě shì.

english: His suggestion met with some hostility.
chinese: 他的建议遭到某种程度的反对。
pinyin: tā de jiàn yì zāo dào mǒu zhǒng chéng dù de fǎn duì。

english: He graduated from a school of crafts and arts.
chinese: 他毕业于一所工艺美术学校。
pinyin: tā bì yè yú yī suǒ gōng yì měi shù xué xiào。

english: Negotiation of the slippery road was not easy.
chinese: 通过这条很滑的路并不容易。
pinyin: tōng guò zhè tiáo hěn huá de lù bìng bù róng yì。

english: I don't fully understand his reasons for leaving.
chinese: 我不完全理解他离开的理由。
pinyin: wǒ bù wán quán lǐ jiě tā lí kāi de lǐ yóu。

english: We win the game because of his participation.
chinese: 由于他的参与，我们赢了比赛。
pinyin: yóu yú tā de cān yù， wǒ men yíng le bǐ sài。

english: Pots and pans were clattering in the kitchen.
chinese: 盆子和锅在厨房里碰击作响。
pinyin: pén zi huò guō zài chú fáng lǐ pèng jī zuò xiǎng。

english: Such an act would not be in accord with our policy.
chinese: 这种做法不符合我们的政策.
pinyin: zhè zhǒng zuò fǎ bù fú hé wǒ men de zhèng cè.

english: He graduated from a school of crafts and arts.
chinese: 他毕业于一所工艺美术学校。
pinyin: tā bì yè yú yī suǒ gōng yì měi shù xué xiào。

english: The fat man gorged himself constantly with enormous desserts.
chinese: 那个胖子经常大吃甜食。
pinyin: nèi gè pàng zi jīng cháng dà chī tián sì。

english: There are red and white corpuscles in blood.
chinese: 血液中有红和白两种血球。
pinyin: xuè yè zhòng yǒu hóng huò bái liǎng zhòng xuè qiú。

english: It was clever of you to solve the problem.
chinese: 你能解答那个问题真是聪明。
pinyin: nǐ néng jiě dá nèi gè wèn tí zhēn shì cōng míng。

english: There's been a noticeable improvement in her handwriting.
chinese: 她的书法有了明显的进步。
pinyin: tā de shū fǎ yǒu le míng xiǎn de jìn bù。

english: A suffering animal is a distressing sight.
chinese: 看到动物受痛苦是很难受的。
pinyin: kàn dào dòng wù shòu tòng kǔ shì hěn nán shòu de。

english: We finished the job all by ourselves.
chinese: 我们全靠自己完成了这项工作。
pinyin: wǒ men quán kào zì jǐ wán chéng le zhè xiàng gōng zuò。

english: He majored in international commerce in college.
chinese: 他大学时的专业是国际贸易。
pinyin: tā dà xué shí de zhuān yè shì guó jì mào yì。

english: I haven't a bean, so I can't pay you.
chinese: 我一文不名，因此不能付钱给你。
pinyin: wǒ yī wén bù míng， yīn cǐ bù néng fù qián jǐ nǐ。

english: The room buzzed with excitement.
chinese: 房间里发出一片兴奋的嚷嚷声。
pinyin: fáng jiān lǐ fā chū yī piàn xīng fèn de rǎng rǎng shēng。

english: Don't smear the lens; I've just polished it.
chinese: 别把镜头弄脏了, 我刚刚擦过.
pinyin: biè bǎ jìng tóu nòng zāng le,  wǒ gāng gang cā guò.

english: The rake of the theater floor is a bit too steep.
chinese: 剧场的地板斜度太大了一点。
pinyin: jù chǎng de dì bǎn xié dù tài dà le yī diǎn。

english: The reduction of unemployment should be paramount.
chinese: 降低失业率应是头等大事。
pinyin: jiàng dī shī yè lu:4 yìng shì tóu děng dà shì。

english: The antique furniture was made in 1700.
chinese: 这件古老的家具是1700年制造的。
pinyin: zhè jiàn gǔ lǎo de jiā jù shì1700 nián zhì zào de。

english: Nothing disturbs his equanimity.
chinese: 没有任何事能扰乱他平静的心绪.
pinyin: méi yǒu rèn hé shì néng rǎo luàn tā píng jìng de xīn xù.

english: The enemy beset the city with a strong army.
chinese: 敌人以强大的军队围困城市。
pinyin: dí rén yǐ qiáng dà de jūn duì wéi kùn chéng shì。

english: Six legislators were elected by local people.
chinese: 当地人选举了六名立法委员。
pinyin: dāng dì rén xuǎn jǔ le liù míng lì fǎ wěi yuán。

english: Analyse the sentence into its constituent parts.
chinese: 把这句子的各个成分加以分析.
pinyin: bǎ zhè jù zi de gè ge chéng fèn jiā yǐ fēn xī.

english: His character has greatly matured in the years.
chinese: 这些年他的性格已大大成熟。
pinyin: zhè xie nián tā de xìng gé yǐ dà dà chéng shú。

english: I won't invest my money in his company.
chinese: 我不会把我的钱投资到他的公司。
pinyin: wǒ bù huì bǎ wǒ de qián tóu zī dào tā de gōng sī。

english: Your refusal puts me in an awkward predicament.
chinese: 你的拒绝让我感到十分为难。
pinyin: nǐ de jù jué ràng wǒ gǎn dào shí fēn wéi nán。

english: The chief was received by the Prime Minister.
chinese: 该领导人受到了首相的接见.
pinyin: gāi lǐng dǎo rén shòu dào le shǒu xiàng de jiē jiàn.

english: The light hurt my eyes with its brightness.
chinese: 明亮的灯光刺痛了我的眼睛。
pinyin: míng liàng de dēng guāng cì tòng le wǒ de yǎn jīng。

english: These tickets are available for one month only.
chinese: 这些票的有效期只有一个月。
pinyin: zhè xie piào de yǒu xiào qī zhǐ yǒu yī gè yuè。

english: Soldiers are trained to obey without question.
chinese: 士兵已训练得绝对服从命令.
pinyin: shì bīng yǐ xùn liàn de jué duì fú cóng mìng lìng.

english: He has liked dogs since he was a child.
chinese: 自从他是小孩时，他就喜欢狗。
pinyin: zì cóng tā shì xiǎo hái shí， tā jiù xǐ huan gǒu。

english: The farthest distance I've run is ten miles.
chinese: 我跑过的最长的距离是十英里.
pinyin: wǒ pǎo guò de zuì cháng de jù lí shì shí yīng lǐ.

english: The dinner was a relaxed, unceremonious occasion.
chinese: 那次宴会很轻松, 随随便便.
pinyin: nà cì yàn huì hěn qīng sōng,  suí suí biàn pián.

english: We must obey the statutes in this country.
chinese: 我们必须遵守这个国家的法规。
pinyin: wǒ men bì xū zūn shǒu zhè gè guó jiā de fǎ guī。

english: It is not humanly possible (ie A human is not able) to lift the weight.
chinese: 人举不起这样的重量.
pinyin: rén jǔ bù qǐ zhè yàng de zhòng liàng.

english: I can't concentrate on my work when I'm tired.
chinese: 我累了就无法集中精力工作。
pinyin: wǒ lèi le jiù wú fǎ jí zhōng jīng lì gōng zuò。

english: The soldiers shouldered their kit and moved on.
chinese: 士兵们背起行装，继续前进。
pinyin: shì bīng men bèi qǐ xìng zhuāng， jì xù qián jìn。

english: I gave the alarm as soon as I saw the smoke.
chinese: 我一看见冒烟，就发出了警报。
pinyin: wǒ yī kàn jiàn mào yān， jiù fā chū le jǐng bào。

english: This is a task well within your ability.
chinese: 这完全是你力所能及的工作。
pinyin: zhè wán quán shì nǐ lì suǒ néng jí de gōng zuò。

english: He taught that the earth revolves around the sun.
chinese: 他指出地球是围绕太阳转的.
pinyin: tā zhǐ chū dì qiú shì wéi rǎo tài yáng zhuàn de.

english: The loop becomes magnetic when the current is switched on.
chinese: 通电时线圈就会有磁性。
pinyin: tōng diàn shí xiàn quān jiù kuài yǒu cí xìng。

english: The horse sensed danger and stopped.
chinese: 马感觉到了危险，于是停了下来。
pinyin: mǎ gǎn jué dào le wēi xiǎn， yú shì tíng le xia lai。

english: Lasers can be used to perform operations nowadays.
chinese: 现在激光可以用来做手术。
pinyin: xiàn zài jī guāng kě yǐ yòng lái zuò shǒu shù。

english: He was told to report himself to headquarters.
chinese: 有人通知他到司令部去报到。
pinyin: yǒu rén tōng zhī tā dào sī lìng bù qù bào dào。

english: They eked out their coal by collecting firewood.
chinese: 他们拣拾木柴以补充煤的不足.
pinyin: tā men jiǎn shí mù chái yǐ bǔ chōng méi de bù zú.

english: He is to visit his uncle during the Spring Festival.
chinese: 他要在春节期间拜访叔叔。
pinyin: tā yào zài chūn jié qī jiān bài fǎng shū shu。

english: She's very active, considering her age.
chinese: 就她的年龄来说, 她是够活跃的.
pinyin: jiù tā de nián líng lái shuō,  tā shì gòu huó yuè de.

english: The book portrays the life of an actor.
chinese: 这本书描述了一个演员的一生。
pinyin: zhè běn shū miáo shù le yī gè yǎn yuán de yī shēng。

english: The monitor handed the papers out to the classmates.
chinese: 班长把试卷分发给同学们。
pinyin: bān zhǎng bǎ shì juàn fēn fā jǐ tóng xué men。

english: I have to admit to a dislike for modern music.
chinese: 我得承认, 我不喜欢现代音乐。
pinyin: wǒ de chéng rèn,  wǒ bù xǐ huan xiàn dài yīn yuè。

english: The monitor handed the papers out to the classmates.
chinese: 班长把试卷分发给同学们。
pinyin: bān zhǎng bǎ shì juàn fēn fā jǐ tóng xué men。

english: We must avoid wasteful duplication of effort.
chinese: 我们必须避免无谓的重复劳动.
pinyin: wǒ men bì xū bì miǎn wú wèi de chóng fù láo dòng.

english: Behave yourself; don't make a fool of yourself.
chinese: 注意你的举止, 别闹出笑话来。
pinyin: zhù yì nǐ de jǔ zhǐ,  biè nào chū xiào huà lái。

english: I always imbibe fresh air in the woods.
chinese: 我经常在树林里呼吸新鲜空气。
pinyin: wǒ jīng cháng zài shù lín lǐ hū xī xīn xiān kōng qì。

english: The angler waded (out) into the middle of the river.
chinese: 钓鱼的人渡水到河中央去了.
pinyin: diào yú de rén dù shuǐ dào hé zhōng yāng qù le.

english: The doctor gave her an injection to alleviate the pain.
chinese: 医生给她注射以减轻疼痛.
pinyin: yī shēng jǐ tā zhù shè yǐ jiǎn qīng téng tòng.

english: Far from working hard, he played around.
chinese: 他非但不用功，反而到处鬼混。
pinyin: tā fēi dàn bù yòng gōng， fǎn ér dào chù guǐ hùn。

english: The foregoing have all been included in the proposals.
chinese: 以上各点均包括在建议中.
pinyin: yǐ shàng gè diǎn jūn bāo kuò zài jiàn yì zhòng.

english: For various reasons I'd prefer not to meet him.
chinese: 由于各种原因，我不愿见他。
pinyin: yóu yú gè zhǒng yuán yīn， wǒ bù yuàn xiàn tā。

english: The ice is too thin to bear your weight.
chinese: 冰太薄，承受不住你们的重量。
pinyin: bīng tài bò， chéng shòu bú zhù nǐ men de zhòng liàng。

english: The little girl is not very clever at addition.
chinese: 这个小女孩不太善于做加法。
pinyin: zhè gè xiǎo nu:3 hái bù tài shàn yú zuò jiā fǎ。

english: Please forward my mail to my new address.
chinese: 请把我的信件转到我的新地址。
pinyin: qǐng bǎ wǒ de xìn jiàn zhuàn dào wǒ de xīn dì zhǐ。

english: These students have reverence for their teacher.
chinese: 这些学生很尊敬他们的老师。
pinyin: zhè xie xué sheng hěn zūn jìng tā men de lǎo shī。

english: You and I belong to different political camps.
chinese: 你和我属于不同的政治阵营。
pinyin: nǐ huò wǒ shǔ yú bù tóng de zhèng zhì zhèn yíng。

english: Her refusal to help complicates matters.
chinese: 她不肯帮忙，事情就更难办了。
pinyin: tā bù kěn bāng máng， shì qing jiù gèng nàn bàn le。

english: His hoary hair showed his age.
chinese: 他的花白的头发显示出了他的年龄。
pinyin: tā de huā bái de tóu fa xiǎn shì chū le tā de nián líng。

english: There is no describing the beauty of the scene.
chinese: 谁都无法形容这景色的美丽。
pinyin: shéi dōu wú fǎ xíng róng zhè jǐng sè de měi lì。

english: He has been quietly booted out as chief.
chinese: 他己被悄悄地免掉主任的职务。
pinyin: tā jǐ bèi qiāo qiāo de miǎn diào zhǔ rèn de zhí wù。

english: His son is a soldier in a cavalry regiment.
chinese: 他的儿子是骑兵团的一名战士。
pinyin: tā de ér zi shì qí bīng tuán de yī míng zhàn shì。

english: She inserted a new sheet of paper into the typewriter.
chinese: 她把一张白纸插入打字机里。
pinyin: tā bǎ yī zhāng bái zhǐ chā rù dǎ zì jī lǐ。

english: The transformation of that project has been finished.
chinese: 那个项目的改造已经完成。
pinyin: nèi gè xiàng mù de gǎi zào yǐ jīng wán chéng。

english: The professor is presently writing a book.
chinese: 这位教授目前正在写一本书。
pinyin: zhè wèi jiào shòu mù qián zhèng zài xiě yī běn shū。

english: The judge advised him to amend his way of living.
chinese: 法官劝告他改变生活方式。
pinyin: fǎ guān quàn gào tā gǎi biàn shēng huó fāng shì。

english: Far from working hard, he played around.
chinese: 他非但不用功，反而到处鬼混。
pinyin: tā fēi dàn bù yòng gōng， fǎn ér dào chù guǐ hùn。

english: Never tell him a secret; he's got a loose tongue.
chinese: 别把秘密告诉他，他的嘴不严。
pinyin: biè bǎ mì mì gào su tā， tā de zuǐ bù yán。

english: Open the window and let in some fresh air.
chinese: 打开窗户，让新鲜的空气进来。
pinyin: dǎ kāi chuāng hu， ràng xīn xiān de kōng qì jìn lái。

english: They showed a disposition to sign the contract.
chinese: 他们表示有签订合同的意愿。
pinyin: tā men biǎo shì yǒu qiān dìng hé tong de yì yuàn。

english: He mentioned in passing that he had a new car.
chinese: 他顺便提到他有一辆新汽车。
pinyin: tā shùn biàn tí dào tā yǒu yī liàng xīn qì chē。

english: The child pressed her nose against the window.
chinese: 那小女孩把鼻子贴在窗户上。
pinyin: nà xiǎo nu:3 hái bǎ bí zi tiē zài chuāng hu shàng。

english: It is said that he has became a Party member.
chinese: 据说他已经成为一名党员了。
pinyin: jù shuō tā yǐ jīng chéng wéi yī míng dǎng yuán le。

english: The country has to import most of its raw materials.
chinese: 这个国家原料大部分靠进口.
pinyin: zhè gè guó jiā yuán liào dà bù fen kào jìn kǒu.

english: Your clothes are a reflection of your personality.
chinese: 一个人的衣著可反映出其个性.
pinyin: yī gè rén de yì著 kě fǎn yìng chū qí gè xìng.

english: I haven't a bean, so I can't pay you.
chinese: 我一文不名，因此不能付钱给你。
pinyin: wǒ yī wén bù míng， yīn cǐ bù néng fù qián jǐ nǐ。

english: He pointed to a tower on the distant horizon.
chinese: 他指向远处地平线上的一座塔.
pinyin: tā zhǐ xiàng yuǎn chù de píng xiàn shàng de yī zuò tǎ.

english: He selected an extensive reading course this term.
chinese: 这个学期他选修了泛读课程。
pinyin: zhè gè xué qī tā xuǎn xiū le fàn dú kè chéng。

english: They stood there, glaring at each other.
chinese: 他们站在那，互相怒视着对方。
pinyin: tā men zhàn zài nà， hù xiāng nù shì zhuó duì fāng。

english: The union has been forced to slightly modify its position.
chinese: 工会被迫稍稍改变立场。
pinyin: gōng huì bèi pò shāo shāo gǎi biàn lì chǎng。

english: The engineers set to on repair work to the bridge.
chinese: 工程师奋力进行修桥工作.
pinyin: gōng chéng shī fèn lì jìn xíng xiū qiáo gōng zuò.

english: The police can't establish where he was at the time.
chinese: 警方无法确定当时他在哪里.
pinyin: jǐng fāng wú fǎ què dìng dāng shí tā zài nǎ li.

english: The decision was affected by his fluctuation of mood.
chinese: 这个决定受他情绪的影响。
pinyin: zhè gè jué dìng shòu tā qíng xù de yǐng xiǎng。

english: They estimated the number of visitors at 10 million.
chinese: 他们估计参观者人数为1000万。
pinyin: tā men gū jì cān guān zhě rén shù wèī000 wàn。

english: They used only natural pigments to dye the wool.
chinese: 他们只用天然颜料染毛织品。
pinyin: tā men zhǐ yòng tiān rán yán liào rǎn máo zhī pǐn。

english: He's only away for short periods a week at the longest.
chinese: 他只是短期外出--至多一周.
pinyin: tā zhǐ shì duǎn qī wài chū-- zhì duō yī zhōu.

english: I hid the broken plate behind the table.
chinese: 我把打碎的盘子藏在餐桌后面了。
pinyin: wǒ bǎ dǎ suì de pán zi zàng zài cān zhuō hòu mian le。

english: Fresh air and exercise are good for the health.
chinese: 新鲜空气和运动有益于健康。
pinyin: xīn xiān kōng qì huò yùn dòng yǒu yì yú jiàn kāng。

english: Many soldiers died because of dearth of food.
chinese: 很多士兵因为缺少粮食死去。
pinyin: hěn duō shì bīng yīn wèi quē shǎo liáng shi sǐ qù。

english: I hid the broken plate behind the table.
chinese: 我把打碎的盘子藏在餐桌后面了。
pinyin: wǒ bǎ dǎ suì de pán zi zàng zài cān zhuō hòu mian le。

english: The law of supply and demand governs the prices of goods.
chinese: 供求规律决定商品的价格.
pinyin: gōng qiú guī lu:4 jué dìng shāng pǐn de jià gé.

english: This trader persuaded me into buying his goods.
chinese: 这个商人说服我买了他的货物。
pinyin: zhè gè shāng rén shuō fú wǒ mǎi le tā de huò wù。

english: We soon outstripped the slower runners.
chinese: 我们很快就超过那些跑得慢的人.
pinyin: wǒ men hěn kuài jiù chāo guò nà xiē pǎo de màn de rén.

english: The red lines on the map represent railways.
chinese: 这张地图上的红线代表铁路。
pinyin: zhè zhāng dì tú shàng de hóng xiàn dài biǎo tiě lù。

english: I can smell the fragrance of flowers after showers.
chinese: 我可以闻到雨后鲜花的清香。
pinyin: wǒ kě yǐ wén dào yǔ hòu xiān huā de qīng xiāng。

english: He was proud of his impeccable pedigree.
chinese: 他为他出身于名门望族而骄傲。
pinyin: tā wèi tā chū shēn yú míng mén wàng zú ér jiāo ào。

english: He had to support his family with his meager income.
chinese: 他只能靠微薄的收入来养家。
pinyin: tā zhǐ néng kào wéi bó de shōu rù lái yǎng jiā。

english: The man had the quality for leading the people.
chinese: 那个人具备领导民众的才能。
pinyin: nèi gè rén jù bèi lǐng dǎo mín zhòng de cái néng。

english: The atlas was published by our company.
chinese: 这个地图集是由我们公司出版的。
pinyin: zhè gè dì tú jí shì yóu wǒ men gōng sī chū bǎn de。

english: You must arrive at the airport two hours early.
chinese: 你必须提前两小时到达机场。
pinyin: nǐ bì xū tí qián liǎng xiǎo shí dào dá jī chǎng。

english: He mustered all his courage to take part in the game.
chinese: 他鼓起全部的勇气参加比赛。
pinyin: tā gǔ qǐ quán bù de yǒng qì cān jiā bǐ sài。

english: The committee is going into recess for a couple of weeks.
chinese: 委员会打算休会几个星期。
pinyin: wěi yuán huì dǎ suàn xiū huì jǐ ge xīng qī。

english: Autumn is better for reading than any other season.
chinese: 秋天比任何季节都适合读书。
pinyin: qiū tiān bì rèn hé jì jié dōu shì hé dú shū。

english: The kitchen is 12 square metres in area/has an area of 12 square metres.
chinese: 厨房的面积是12平方米.
pinyin: chú fáng de miàn ji shì12 píng fāng mǐ.

english: I hate him albeit he helped me.
chinese: 尽管他帮助过我，可是我还是恨他。
pinyin: jǐn guǎn tā bāng zhù guò wǒ， kě shì wǒ hái shì hèn tā。

english: I always imbibe fresh air in the woods.
chinese: 我经常在树林里呼吸新鲜空气。
pinyin: wǒ jīng cháng zài shù lín lǐ hū xī xīn xiān kōng qì。

english: My car is none the worse for the accident.
chinese: 我的汽车遇到事故，但毫无损坏。
pinyin: wǒ de qì chē yù dào shì gù， dàn háo wú sǔn huài。

english: You can compel obedience, but not affection.
chinese: 可以逼人服从, 却无法逼人生爱.
pinyin: kě yǐ bī rén fú cóng,  què wú fǎ bī rén shēng ài.

english: The pupils took turns in reading out their work.
chinese: 学生依次朗读他们各自的作业。
pinyin: xué sheng yī cì lǎng dú tā men gè zi de zuò yè。

english: I always imbibe fresh air in the woods.
chinese: 我经常在树林里呼吸新鲜空气。
pinyin: wǒ jīng cháng zài shù lín lǐ hū xī xīn xiān kōng qì。

english: The tanker sank and the oil polluted the sea.
chinese: 油轮沉没了，石油污染了海面。
pinyin: yóu lún chén mò le， shí yóu wū rǎn le hǎi miàn。

english: She dedicated her first book to her husband.
chinese: 她把自己的第一本书献给了丈夫。
pinyin: tā bǎ zì jǐ de dì yī běn shū xiàn jǐ le zhàng fu。

english: Not measuring up to standards or expectations.
chinese: 不合格的与标准或期望不符合的
pinyin: bù hé gé de yù biāo zhǔn huò qī wàng bù fú hé de

english: The plumber made a careful check of the pipes.
chinese: 管子工对管道做了仔细的检查。
