english: The coincidence of all the elements that constitute the fullest legal right to control and dispose of property or a claim.
chinese: 所有权构成控制或处置财产或所有权的合法权力的所有要素同时符合的条件
pinyin: suǒ yǒu quán gòu chéng kòng zhì huò chǔ zhì cái chǎn huò suǒ yǒu quán de hé fǎ quán lì de suǒ yǒu yào sù tóng shí fú hé de tiáo jiàn

english: One of the reforms allows the local education department to choose their own textbooks based upon the national teaching guideline.
chinese: 其中之一就是允许地方教委在国家教学大纲的指导下选择合适自身的教材。
pinyin: qí zhōng zhī yī jiù shì yǔn xǔ dì fang jiào wěi zài guó jiā jiào xué dà gāng de zhǐ dǎo xià xuǎn zé hé shì zì shēn de jiào cái。

english: A preliminary test given to determine whether students are sufficiently prepared for a more advanced course of studies.
chinese: 预先测试为衡量学生是否已有足够的准备去进行更高一级的学习而举行的初步考试
pinyin: yù xiān cè shì wèi héng liang xué sheng shì fǒu yǐ yǒu zú gòu de zhǔn bèi qù jìn xíng gèng gāo yī jí de xué xí ér jǔ xíng de chū bù kǎo shì

english: It is an interesting question how far men will retain their relative rank if they were divest of their clothes.
chinese: 假使剥去了人们的衣服的话，到底彼此的阶级能够维持到什么程度，倒是一则有趣的问题。
pinyin: jiǎ shǐ bō qù le rén men de yī fu de huà， dào dǐ bǐ cǐ de jiē jí néng gòu wéi chí dào shén me chéng dù， dào shì yī zé yǒu qù de wèn tí。

english: Nothing can move a man who is paid by the hour; how sweet the flight of time seem to his calm mind.
chinese: 什么也不能推动一个按钟头收费的人，对他的平静的心情来说，时间的消逝是多么甜蜜啊。
pinyin: shén me yě bù néng tuī dòng yī gè àn zhōng tóu shōu fèi de rén， duì tā de píng jìng de xīn qíng lái shuō， shí jiān de xiāo shì shì duō me tián mì a。

english: A stitch made by inserting the needle at the midpoint of a preceding stitch so that the stitches overlap by half lengths.
chinese: 回针缝在先前缝的一针中间加缝的一针，以便使针脚的交错重叠为原来长度的一半
pinyin: huí zhēn fèng zài xiān qián fèng de yī zhēn zhōng jiān jiā fèng de yī zhēn， yǐ biàn shǐ zhēn jué de jiāo cuò chóng dié wèi yuán lái cháng dù de yī bàn

english: At the new that the enemy was approaching, we parceled up our belongings and hurried to the nearby mountains.
chinese: 一接到敌人要来的消息，我们便纷纷将各自家里的东西打成包裹，连忙撤到附近的山里去了。

chinese: 她陶醉于自己的嗓音。

chinese: 牙医给我镶了颗假牙。

english: Cacti live in dry regions.
chinese: 仙人掌生长在干旱地区。

chinese: 风琴奏出庄严的乐曲。

english: Some kinds of deer shed their horns.
chinese: 鹿有些种类能脱换鹿角.

english: The criminals were hanged on the gibbet.
chinese: 罪犯被推上绞架吊死。

english: Most African people are black people.
chinese: 大多数非洲人是黑人。

english: He led an assault against the castle.
chinese: 他率领士兵袭击城堡。
pinyin: tā shuài lǐng shì bīng xí jī chéng bǎo。

english: Wheels leave grooves in dirt roads.
chinese: 车轮在泥路上留下凹痕。

english: The writer had great skill in narrative.
chinese: 这位作家极擅长叙述。

english: The hawk snatched the chicken and flew away.
chinese: 老鹰抓住小鸡飞走了。

chinese: 我往火里扔了一根木炭。

english: She is economical in her use of salt when cooking.
chinese: 她烹饪时用盐很少。

english: Maize is widely planted in the America.
chinese: 玉米在美洲广泛种植。

english: Maize is widely planted in the America.
chinese: 玉米在美洲广泛种植。
pinyin: yù mǐ zài měi zhōu guǎng fàn zhòng zhí。

chinese: 火车隆隆地驶出郊区。

chinese: 她用伞捅了那男子一下。

chinese: 他以勇敢赢得芳心无数。
pinyin: tā yǐ yǒng gǎn yíng dé fāng xīn wú shù。

english: Write your name in the blank.
chinese: 在空白栏中写上你的名字。

english: We had to scrimp and save to pay the bills.
chinese: 我们得省吃俭用来付帐.

chinese: 我们把船停泊在码头处.

english: This stone axe is a relic of ancient times.
chinese: 这把石斧是古代的遗物。

english: I was more disappointed than discouraged.
chinese: 我是失望，而不是泄气。

chinese: 彼得挨著保罗坐在沙发上。

chinese: 炎热的阳光晒得油漆起了泡.

chinese: 我的母亲因我撒谎而愤怒。

chinese: 动物脂可以用来做香皂。
pinyin: dòng wù zhī kě yǐ yòng lái zuò xiāng zào。

chinese: 轰炸持续不断地进行著.

chinese: 花园里的泥土松软肥沃。

chinese: 他的妻子在车祸中丧生。

english: He did incalculable harm to her reputation.
chinese: 他严重损害了她的声誉。

chinese: 警察订下了计划捉贼。

chinese: 这些情况预示著要有灾祸.

chinese: 转眼间他就无影无踪了。

chinese: 我答应决不泄漏他的秘密。

english: I saw weals raise on his back.
chinese: 我看到鞭痕从他背上隆起。

chinese: 把它放下，不然我就揍你。

chinese: 请填写随函附上之表格.

english: Her innocence is only an imitation.
chinese: 她的天真只是一种伪装。
pinyin: tā de tiān zhēn zhǐ shì yī zhòng wěi zhuāng。

english: I ignored the taunts of the opposition.
chinese: 我没有理睬对方的嘲笑。

chinese: 他发明了一种新的晶体管。

chinese: 物价上涨引起了叛乱。

chinese: 她那么傻，以致被人嘲笑。

english: The earth in the garden is good, soft soil.
chinese: 花园里的泥土松软肥沃。

chinese: 冬天时湖面上覆盖着冰。

chinese: 味觉与嗅觉是密切相关的.

chinese: 他们主动捐款支援此事.

chinese: 冬天时湖面上覆盖着冰。

chinese: 我佩服他的坚韧不拔的勇气。

chinese: 她是党内积极的左翼分子.

chinese: 我有一枚有纪念意义的铜牌。

chinese: 窃贼偷偷进入那所房子。

chinese: 我们将迁往纽卡斯尔南部.

chinese: 当众吐痰是不礼貌的行为。

chinese: 他从玫瑰树上剪下一枝插条。

english: Please pick up those cups and saucers.
chinese: 请把那些杯子和碟子收拾好。
pinyin: qǐng bǎ nà xiē bēi zi huò dié zi shōu shi hào。

chinese: 他们把原木锯成一块块厚板。
pinyin: tā men bǎ yuán mù jù chéng yī kuài kuài hòu bǎn。

chinese: 狗见到骨头就大量分泌唾液.

chinese: 汤姆是十六世纪的先知。

chinese: 他在浴室的磅秤上称体重.
pinyin: tā zài yù shì de bāng chèng shàng chèng tǐ zhòng.

chinese: 这种噪声快要把我逼疯了.
pinyin: zhè zhǒng zào shēng kuài yào bǎ wǒ bī fēng le.

chinese: 她脖子上戴着一条银项链。
pinyin: tā bó zi shàng dài zhuó yī tiáo yín xiàng liàn。

chinese: 慈善事业依靠自愿捐赠.
pinyin: cí shàn shì yè yī kào zì yuàn juān zèng.

english: The invader wanted to attack our country.
chinese: 侵略者妄图攻打我们国家。
pinyin: qīn lu:è zhě wàng tú gōng dǎ wǒ men guó jiā。

english: The police launch hailed to us to come to.
chinese: 警方汽艇招呼我们停下来。

chinese: 他是君主制的坚定拥护者。

chinese: 南部邦联被北方打败了。

chinese: 因停电所有的灯都熄灭了.

chinese: 一个人不能犯了罪不受惩罚。

chinese: 班长确实比我们略胜一筹。

english: She planted some violets in the garden.
chinese: 她在花园里种了一些紫罗兰。

chinese: 演员们向鼓掌的观众鞠躬.

english: They are hoping for a small diminution in taxes.
chinese: 他们希望税捐略微减少。
pinyin: tā men xī wàng shuì juān lu:è wēi jiǎn shǎo。

english: He ruined his prospects by carelessness.
chinese: 他因疏忽大意而断送了前途。
pinyin: tā yīn shū hū dà yì ér duàn sòng le qián tú。

english: It's rich there because of the fertility of soil.
chinese: 因为土地肥沃，那儿很富裕。
pinyin: yīn wèi tǔ dì féi wò， nà r hěn fù yù。

chinese: 一颗子弹从他头顶上呼啸而过。
pinyin: yī kē zǐ dàn zòng tā tou dǐng shàng hū xiào ér guò。

english: The ship was anchored athwart at the harbor mouth.
chinese: 轮船横着停泊在港口里。
pinyin: lún chuán hèng zhuó tíng bó zài gǎng kǒu lǐ。

english: He struck off the rotten branches with an axe.
chinese: 他用斧头砍掉了朽烂的树枝.
pinyin: tā yòng fǔ tóu kǎn diào le xiǔ làn de shù zhī.

chinese: 她父亲抚养她直到她结婚。
pinyin: tā fù qīn fǔ yǎng tā zhí dào tā jié hūn。

chinese: 这件衬衫是用乔其纱做成的。
pinyin: zhè jiàn chèn shān shì yòng qiáo qí shā zuò chéng de。

chinese: 最上面的抽屉是放刀叉的。
pinyin: zuì shàng mian de chōu ti shì fàng dāo chā de。

english: Bumped along slowly over the rocky terrain.
chinese: 在多石地带缓慢地颠簸前进
pinyin: zài duō shí dì dài huǎn màn de diān bǒ qián jìn

english: The garden sloped gently downwards towards the river.
chinese: 花园呈缓坡向河边倾斜.
pinyin: huā yuán chéng huǎn pō xiàng hé biān qīng xié.

chinese: 昨晚他们被强盗洗劫一空。
pinyin: zuó wǎn tā men bèi qiáng dào xǐ jié yī kòng。

chinese: 那个女人常贬低我的成就。
pinyin: nèi gè nu:3 rén cháng biǎn dī wǒ de chéng jiù。

english: The easiest way to capture a fortress is from within.
chinese: 堡垒最容易从内部攻破。
pinyin: bǎo lěi zuì róng yì zòng nèi bù gōng pò。

english: Angry with his wife, Tom kicked the dog.
chinese: 因为和太太生气，汤姆踢狗。
pinyin: yīn wèi huò tài tai shēng qì， tāng mǔ tī gǒu。

english: Her delicate health needs great care.
chinese: 她娇弱的身体需要小心照料。
pinyin: tā jiāo ruò de shēn tǐ xū yào xiǎo xīn zhào liào。

english: I have benefited a lot from extensive reading.
chinese: 广泛的阅读使我受益匪浅。
pinyin: guǎng fàn de yuè dú shǐ wǒ shòu yì fěi qiǎn。

english: I was given gas when they pulled my tooth out.
chinese: 给我拔牙时用了一氧化二氮。
pinyin: jǐ wǒ bá yá shí yòng le yī yǎng huà èr dàn。

english: My wages are the principal source of my income.
chinese: 薪金是我收入的主要来源。
pinyin: xīn jīn shì wǒ shōu rù de zhǔ yào lái yuán。

english: You won't be blamed for playing cards for love.
chinese: 没有人会责怪你打牌消遣。
pinyin: méi yǒu rén kuài zé guài nǐ dǎ pái xiāo qiǎn。

english: Everyone admired the delicacy of her features.
chinese: 人人都羡慕她娇美的容貌。
pinyin: rén rén dōu xiàn mù tā jiāo měi de róng mào。

english: We fear the military might of the enemy.
chinese: 我们惧怕敌人强大的军事力量.
pinyin: wǒ men jù pà dí rén qiáng dà de jūn shì lì liang.

english: The ore is smelted in this large factory.
chinese: 这个大型工厂里熔炼矿石。
pinyin: zhè gè dà xíng gōng chǎng lǐ róng liàn kuàng shí。

english: Clever advertisements are just temptations to spend money.
chinese: 巧妙的广告诱使人花钱.
pinyin: qiǎo miào de guǎng gào yòu shǐ rén huā qián.

english: The House of Commons was still sitting at 3 am.
chinese: 下议院凌晨三时仍在开会.
pinyin: xià yì yuàn líng chén sān shí réng zài kāi huì.

english: A thick forest girdled the castle about.
chinese: 一片浓密的森林包围着城堡。
pinyin: yī piàn nóng mì de sēn lín bāo wéi zhuó chéng bǎo。

english: The young actor pretended to be Hamlet.
chinese: 那个年轻演员扮演哈姆雷特。
pinyin: nèi gè nián qīng yǎn yuán bàn yǎn hǎ mǔ léi tè。

english: The whole thing turned into a bitter quarrel.
chinese: 整件事酿成了激烈的争吵.
pinyin: zhěng jiàn shì niàng chéng le jī liè de zhēng chǎo.

english: That emperor was a cruel despot.
chinese: 那个皇帝是个残酷的专制君主。
pinyin: nèi gè huáng dì shì gè cán kù de zhuān zhì jūn zhǔ。

english: His generosity to the poor is well known.
chinese: 他对穷人的慷慨为人所熟知。
pinyin: tā duì qióng rén de kāng kǎi wèi rén suǒ shú zhī。

english: The first chapter delimits her area of research.
chinese: 第一章阐明了她的研究领域.
pinyin: dì yī zhāng chǎn míng le tā de yán jiū lǐng yù.

english: He showed his sinister motive at last.
chinese: 他终于露出了他那邪恶的用心。
pinyin: tā zhōng yú lù chū le tā nà xié è de yòng xīn。

english: The gruesome sight sent a shiver down my spine.
chinese: 那可怕情景使我的背脊发凉.
pinyin: nà kě pà qíng jǐng shǐ wǒ de bèi jǐ fà liáng.

english: More reading may be allaying your doubt.
chinese: 多读书或许可以减少你的疑惑。
pinyin: duō dú shū huò xǔ kě yǐ jiǎn shǎo nǐ de yí huò。

english: Some splinters of glass had got into his feet.
chinese: 他的脚上扎了一些碎玻璃屑。
pinyin: tā de jué shàng zhá le yī xiē suì bō li xiè。

english: Our company employed about one hundred people.
chinese: 我们公司雇佣了大约一百人。
pinyin: wǒ men gōng sī gù yōng le dà yuē yī bǎi rén。

english: The vast plains stretch for hundreds of miles.
chinese: 辽阔的平原绵延数百英里。
pinyin: liáo kuò de píng yuán mián yán shù bǎi yīng lǐ。

english: His black leather couch looks expensive.
chinese: 他的黑色皮沙发看上去很昂贵。
pinyin: tā de hēi sè pí shā fā kàn shàng qù hěn áng guì。

english: I'm composing a formal reply to the letter.
chinese: 我正写一封郑重其事的回信.
pinyin: wǒ zhèng xiě yī fēng zhèng zhòng qí shì de huí xìn.

english: Chastity is important to a woman.
chinese: 贞节对一个女人来说是重要的。
pinyin: zhēn jié duì yī gè nu:3 rén lái shuō shì zhòng yào de。

english: Clever advertisements are just temptations to spend money.
chinese: 巧妙的广告诱使人花钱.
pinyin: qiǎo miào de guǎng gào yòu shǐ rén huā qián.

english: She fingered the silk to feel its quality.
chinese: 她摸了摸这块绸料看质量如何.
pinyin: tā mó le mó zhè kuài chóu liào kàn zhì liàng rú hé.

english: Farmers are very busy during (the) harvest.
chinese: 在收获季节里农民非常忙碌.
pinyin: zài shōu huò jì jié lǐ nóng mín fēi cháng máng lù.

english: Einstein was a prominent scientist.
chinese: 爱因斯坦是一位卓越的科学家。
pinyin: ài yīn sī tǎn shì yī wèi zhuó yuè de kē xué jiā。

english: I despise his refusing to accept responsibility.
chinese: 他拒不承担责任，我鄙视他。
pinyin: tā jù bù chéng dān zé rèn， wǒ bǐ shì tā。

english: His leg had to be taken off above the knee.
chinese: 他的一条腿从膝盖以上截去了.
pinyin: tā de yī tiáo tuǐ zòng xī gài yǐ shàng jié qù le.

english: He was decoyed by a false message into enemy territory.
chinese: 他被假情报诱骗进入敌区。
pinyin: tā bèi jià qíng bào yòu piàn jìn rù dí qū。

english: This dress material will withstand repeated washing.
chinese: 这种衣料经得住反复洗涤。
pinyin: zhè zhǒng yì liào jīng de zhù fǎn fù xǐ dí。

english: Her feeling of depression was transient.
chinese: 她那抑郁的心情一会儿就过去了。
pinyin: tā nà yì yù de xīn qíng yī huìr jiù guò qu le。

english: He eventually killed her because of a long-standing feud.
chinese: 因为宿怨，他最终杀了她。
pinyin: yīn wèi sù yuàn， tā zuì zhōng shā le tā。

english: The incident sparked off a whole chain of disasters.
chinese: 那件事惹出了一连串的灾祸.
pinyin: nà jiàn shì rě chū le yī lián chuàn de zāi huò.

english: The group of barbaric soldiers killed many people.
chinese: 那群野蛮的士兵杀了很多人。
pinyin: nà qún yě mán de shì bīng shā le hěn duō rén。

english: It's rude to spit in public.
chinese: 在公共场合随便吐痰是不礼貌的。
pinyin: zài gōng gòng chǎng hé suí biàn tù tán shì bù lǐ mào de。

english: Members of the Cabinet are chosen by the Prime Minister.
chinese: 内阁阁员是由首相挑选的.
pinyin: nèi gé gé yuán shì yóu shǒu xiàng tiāo xuǎn de.

english: Her nerves were frayed by the noises in the street.
chinese: 街上的噪音使她神经紧张。
pinyin: jiē shàng de zào yīn shǐ tā shén jīng jǐn zhāng。

english: She coaxed him out of his bad temper.
chinese: 她循循善诱地劝他改掉坏脾气。
pinyin: tā xún xún shàn yòu de quàn tā gǎi diào huài pí qì。

english: Several soldiers were decorated for bravery.
chinese: 数名士兵因英勇而受嘉奖。
pinyin: shuò míng shì bīng yīn yīng yǒng ér shòu jiā jiǎng。

english: Locust had stripped the leaves off the trees.
chinese: 蝗虫把树上的叶子都吃光了。
pinyin: huáng chóng bǎ shù shàng de yè zi dōu jí guāng le。

english: Premier Zhou is a distinguished politician.
chinese: 周总理是一位卓越的政治家。
pinyin: zhōu zǒng lǐ shì yī wèi zhuó yuè de zhèng zhì jiā。

english: She chopped the block of wood in two with a single blow.
chinese: 她一斧头把木块劈成两半。
pinyin: tā yī fǔ tóu bǎ mù kuài pǐ chéng liǎng bàn。

english: The aeroplane wing showed signs of metal fatigue.
chinese: 机翼显出有金属疲劳的现象.
pinyin: jī yì xiǎn chū yǒu jīn shǔ pí láo de xiàn xiàng.

english: The field was covered with rime in the early morning.
chinese: 清晨地里覆盖着一层白霜。
pinyin: qīng chén de lǐ fù gài zhuó yī céng bái shuāng。

english: Lead will fuse at quite a low temperature.
chinese: 铅会在相当低的温度下熔化。
pinyin: qiān kuài zài xiāng dāng dī de wēn dù xià róng huà。

english: Tall trees arched across the river.
chinese: 高大的树木成拱形横跨过那条河.
pinyin: gāo dà de shù mù chéng gǒng xíng héng kuà guò nà tiáo hé.

english: They divided the house into flats.
chinese: 他们把那栋房屋分成许多套住房。
pinyin: tā men bǎ nà dòng fáng wū fèn chéng xǔ duō tào zhù fáng。

english: Radiation reached unheard-of levels.
chinese: 辐射作用已达到前所未有的程度.
pinyin: fú shè zuò yòng yǐ dá dào qián suǒ wèi yǒu de chéng dù.

english: We all accused the union of torpedoing the negotiation.
chinese: 我们都谴责工会破坏谈判。
pinyin: wǒ men dōu qiǎn zé gōng huì pò huài tán pàn。

english: The robbery appeared to have been an inside job.
chinese: 这抢劫案看来是内部的人干的.
pinyin: zhè qiāng jié àn kàn lai shì nèi bù de rén gàn de.

english: The mugger thrust at his victim with a knife.
chinese: 抢劫者用刀子向受害人刺去。
pinyin: qiāng jié zhě yòng dāo zi xiàng shòu hài rén cì qù。

english: There is a flagpole broken by wind on the building.
chinese: 大厦上有个被风折断的旗杆。
pinyin: dà shà shàng yǒu gè bèi fēng zhé duàn de qí gǎn。

english: Babies like to be tickled and hugged.
chinese: 婴儿喜欢轻轻呵痒和紧紧拥抱。
pinyin: yīng ér xǐ huan qīng qīng hē yǎng huò jǐn jǐn yōng bào。

english: He made the attic in the small house a reading room.
chinese: 他把小屋的阁楼当作阅读室。
pinyin: tā bǎ xiǎo wū de gé lóu dàng zuò yuè dú shì。

english: Tall trees arched across the river.
chinese: 高大的树木成拱形横跨过那条河.
pinyin: gāo dà de shù mù chéng gǒng xíng héng kuà guò nà tiáo hé.

english: I felt comfortable on narcotic effect.
chinese: 在麻醉剂的作用下我感到舒服些。
pinyin: zài má zuì jì de zuò yòng xià wǒ gǎn dào shū fu xiē。

english: We get an automatic increase in pay every year.
chinese: 我们的薪金每年会自动增长。
pinyin: wǒ men de xīn jīn měi nián kuài zì dòng zēng zhǎng。

english: Jason saw me and got off the horse immediately.
chinese: 杰逊看到我, 立即从马上下来。
pinyin: jié xùn kàn dào wǒ,  lì jí zòng mǎ shàng xia lai。

english: We get an automatic increase in pay every year.
chinese: 我们的薪金每年会自动增长。
pinyin: wǒ men de xīn jīn měi nián kuài zì dòng zēng zhǎng。

english: A mouse ran out from the dark orifice of the cave.
chinese: 一只老鼠从黑暗的洞口跑出。
pinyin: yī zhǐ lǎo shǔ zòng hēi àn de Dòng kǒu pǎo chū。

english: That dog is a dangerous brute; it bites people.
chinese: 那条狗是危险的畜牲，它咬人。
pinyin: nà tiáo gǒu shì wēi xiǎn de xù shēng， tā yǎo rén。

english: There is a house with wattle fence in the picture.
chinese: 图画里有一间带篱笆的小房子。
pinyin: tú huà lǐ yǒu yī jiàn dài lí bā de xiǎo fáng zi。

english: The high cost prohibits the widespread use of the drug.
chinese: 该药昂贵而影响广泛应用.
pinyin: gāi yào áng guì ér yǐng xiǎng guǎng fàn yìng yòng.

english: We are fully aware of the gravity of the situation.
chinese: 我们十分清楚形势的严峻性。
pinyin: wǒ men shí fēn qīng chu xíng shì de yán jùn xìng。

english: She managed to wangle an invitation to the reception.
chinese: 她设法弄到了招待会的请帖.
pinyin: tā shè fǎ nòng dào le zhāo dài huì de qǐng tiě.

english: The warm weather seduced me away from my studies.
chinese: 暖和的天气诱使我放下了学习。
pinyin: nuǎn huó de tiān qì yòu shǐ wǒ fàng xia le xué xí。

english: The impostor traveled on a false passport.
chinese: 那个伪装者用一本假护照旅行。
pinyin: nèi gè wěi zhuāng zhě yòng yī běn jià hù zhào lu:3 xíng。

english: Oats mainly grow in cool climate.
chinese: 燕麦主要生长在气候凉爽的地区。
pinyin: yān mài zhǔ yào shēng zhǎng zài qì hòu liáng shuǎng de dì qū。

english: A cold front is moving in from the north.
chinese: 一股冷锋正从北方向这里移动.
pinyin: yī gǔ lěng fēng zhèng zòng běi fāng xiàng zhè lǐ yí dòng.

english: You are restricted to eight liters of duty-free wine.
chinese: 携带的免税酒不得超过八升。
pinyin: xié dài de miǎn shuì jiǔ bù dé chāo guò bā shēng。

english: She was punished for copying during the examination.
chinese: 她因考试抄袭作弊而受到处罚.
pinyin: tā yīn kǎo shì chāo xí zuò bì ér shòu dào chǔ fá.

english: Traffic was badly snarled up near the accident.
chinese: 车祸现场附近交通极为混乱。
pinyin: chē huò xiàn chǎng fù jìn jiāo tōng jí wéi hùn luàn。

english: It seems the vows of chastity belonging to a nun.
chinese: 这似乎是一个修女的贞操誓言。
pinyin: zhè sì hu shì yī gè xiū nu:3 de zhēn cāo shì yán。

english: He's always careful to do things by the book.
chinese: 他总是小心翼翼地按规章办事。
pinyin: tā zǒng shì xiǎo xīn yì yì de àn guī zhāng bàn shì。

english: He preaches the same sermon every Christmas.
chinese: 他每逢圣诞节都宣讲同一教旨.
pinyin: tā měi féng Shèng dàn jié dōu xuān jiǎng tóng yī jiào zhǐ.

english: She gave the floor a vigorous sponge all over.
chinese: 她用海绵把地板 使劲儿擦了一遍.
pinyin: tā yòng hǎi mián bǎ dì bǎn  shǐ jìn er cā le yī biàn.

english: I like to have ice cream for dessert.
chinese: 我喜欢在正餐后吃冰淇淋当甜点。
pinyin: wǒ xǐ huan zài zhèng cān hòu jí bīng qí lìn dàng tián diǎn。

english: The farm prospered through good management.
chinese: 由于管理有方，农场兴旺发达。
pinyin: yóu yú guǎn lǐ yǒu fāng， nóng chǎng xīng wàng fā dá。

english: This set of mahogany furniture must be very expensive.
chinese: 这套红木家具一定非常昂贵。
pinyin: zhè tào hóng mù jiā jù yī dìng fēi cháng áng guì。

english: The Government has signed a treaty with Moscow.
chinese: 政府已与莫斯科签了一项条约。
pinyin: zhèng fǔ yǐ yù mò sī kē qiān le yí xiàng tiáo yuē。

english: The teacher is reading Tom's English paper.
chinese: 老师正在审阅汤姆的英语答卷。
pinyin: lǎo shī zhèng zài shěn yuè tāng mǔ de Yīng yǔ dá juàn。

english: You cannot enter a military base without a permit.
chinese: 无通行证者不得擅入军事基地.
pinyin: wú tōng xíng zhèng zhě bù dé shàn rù jūn shì jī dì.

english: Going to their rescue in a rowing-boat is a bit of a forlorn hope.
chinese: 乘划艇去救他们, 希望不大.
pinyin: chéng huà tǐng qù jiù tā men,  xī wàng bú dà.

english: The terrible scene was engraved on his memory.
chinese: 那可怕的情景铭记在他的记忆里。
pinyin: nà kě pà de qíng jǐng míng jì zài tā de jì yì lǐ。

english: I've got this tickle in my throat I think I may be getting a cold.
chinese: 我嗓子发痒--大概是感冒了.
pinyin: wǒ sǎng zi fà yǎng-- dà gài shì gǎn mào le.

english: The dowry of my wife was very little in that age.
chinese: 那个年代，我妻子的嫁妆很少。
pinyin: nèi gè nián dài， wǒ qī zi de jià zhuāng hěn shǎo。

english: The dowry of my wife was very little in that age.
chinese: 那个年代，我妻子的嫁妆很少。
pinyin: nèi gè nián dài， wǒ qī zi de jià zhuāng hěn shǎo。

english: I eulogize the tall and straight trunk of the white poplar.
chinese: 我赞美白杨树那挺拔的株干。
pinyin: wǒ zàn měi bái yáng shù nà tǐng bá de zhū gàn。

english: Oats mainly grow in cool climate.
chinese: 燕麦主要生长在气候凉爽的地区。
pinyin: yān mài zhǔ yào shēng zhǎng zài qì hòu liáng shuǎng de dì qū。

english: The hooligan strangled her with a piece of string.
chinese: 那流氓用一根绳子把她勒死了。
pinyin: nà liú máng yòng yī gēn shéng zi bǎ tā lēi sǐ le。

english: His face was covered in ugly red blotches.
chinese: 他脸上有许多难看的红色大斑点.
pinyin: tā liǎn shàng yǒu xǔ duō nán kàn de hóng sè dà bān diǎn.

english: In dragon boat rowing each person has one oar.
chinese: 划龙舟时每个人都拿着一枝桨。
pinyin: huà lóng zhōu shí měi gè rén dōu ná zhuó yī zhī jiǎng。

english: She not only plays well, but also writes music.
chinese: 她不仅很会演奏, 而且还会作曲.
pinyin: tā bù jǐn hěn kuài yǎn zòu,  ér qiě huán kuài zuò qǔ.

english: The builder reckons 15 man-hours for the job.
chinese: 建筑者估计这个活儿需要15个工时.
pinyin: jiàn zhù zhě gū jì zhè gè huór xū yàō5 gè gōng shí.

english: He was struck dumb by her sharp question.
chinese: 他被她那尖锐的问题弄得哑口无言。
pinyin: tā bèi tā nà jiān ruì de wèn tí nòng de yǎ kǒu wú yán。

english: Give the bottle a couple of shakes before pouring the juice.
chinese: 倒果汁前，先把瓶子摇几下。
pinyin: dào guǒ zhī qián， xiān bǎ píng zi yáo jǐ xià。

english: The bombers made a sudden strike on the harbor.
chinese: 轰炸机对这港口进行了一次突然袭击。
pinyin: hōng zhà jī duì zhè gǎng kǒu jìn xíng le yī cì tū rán xí jī。

english: He turned up the collar of his coat and hurried out into the rain.
chinese: 他竖起大衣领子, 匆匆冒雨出去了.
pinyin: tā shù qi dà yī lǐng zi,  cōng cōng mào yǔ chū qù le.

english: He was just able to discern the road from the dark.
chinese: 他在黑暗中只能勉强辨认出道路。
pinyin: tā zài hēi àn zhòng zhǐ néng miǎn qiǎng biàn rèn chū dào lù。

english: I would rather fail than cheat in the examination.
chinese: 我宁愿考不及格，也不愿意考试作弊。
pinyin: wǒ nìng yuàn kǎo bù jí gé， yě bù yuàn yì kǎo shì zuò bì。

english: Tom has to take long steps to keep pace with his father.
chinese: 汤姆必须迈大步才能跟上他的父亲。
pinyin: tāng mǔ bì xū mài dà bù cái néng gēn shàng tā de fù qīn。

english: The city turned out to welcome back its victorious team.
chinese: 全市居民倾城而出迎接凯旋球队.
pinyin: quán shì jū mín qīng chéng ér chū yíng jiē kǎi xuán qiú duì.

english: Nothing threatens the permanence of the system.
chinese: 该体系的永恒性不受任何事物的影响.
pinyin: gāi tǐ xì de yǒng héng xìng bù shòu rèn hé shì wù de yǐng xiǎng.

english: The deck of the sailing ship was made of thick planks.
chinese: 这艘帆船的甲板是用厚木板制作的。
pinyin: zhè sōu fān chuán de jiǎ bǎn shì yòng hòu mù bǎn zhì zuò de。

english: His cowardice in face of the enemy was contemptible.
chinese: 他在敌人面前胆小如鼠，真是可鄙。
pinyin: tā zài dí rén miàn qián dǎn xiǎo rú shǔ， zhēn shì kě bǐ。

english: Don't shake the bottle or you will disturb the lees.
chinese: 别摇晃瓶子, 要不沉淀就都搅起来了.
pinyin: biè yáo huàng píng zi,  yào bu chén diàn jiù dōu jiǎo qǐ lai le.

english: The circumference of the earth is almost 25000 miles/The earth is almost 25000 miles in circumference.
chinese: 地球的圆周长约为25000.
pinyin: dì qiú de yuán zhōu zhǎng yuē wèí5000.

english: The young servant is waiting upon his master to have dinner.
chinese: 青年仆人正服侍他的主人进晚餐。
pinyin: qīng nián pú rén zhèng fú shì tā de zhǔ rén jìn wǎn cān。

english: The house stands in 500 acres of rolling parkland.
chinese: 那所房子周围有500英亩起伏不平的草地.
pinyin: nà suǒ fáng zi zhōu wéi yǒu00 yīng mǒu qǐ fú bù píng de cǎo dì.

english: He is generally rated as one of the best modern writers.
chinese: 他被公认为现代最杰出的作家之一。
pinyin: tā bèi gōng rèn wèi xiàn dài zuì jié chū de zuò jiā zhī yī。

english: A strong man will bear hardship without complaining.
chinese: 一个坚强的人会忍受困苦而不抱怨。
pinyin: yī gè jiān qiáng de rén kuài rěn shòu kùn kǔ ér bù bào yuàn。

english: She gathered the fallen apples and carried them in her lap.
chinese: 她捡起掉落的苹果, 用衣服下摆兜著.
pinyin: tā jiǎn qǐ diào luò de píng guǒ,  yòng yī fu xià bǎi dōu著.

english: The robbers got into the bank by masquerading as security men.
chinese: 劫匪假装成保安人员进入银行。
pinyin: jié fěi jiǎ zhuāng chéng bǎo ān rén yuán jìn rù yín háng。

english: Please give my sincere regards to all the members of your family.
chinese: 请向你全家转达我真挚的问候。
pinyin: qǐng xiàng nǐ quán jiā zhuǎn dá wǒ zhēn zhì de wèn hòu。

english: His firmness on his belief supported him in difficulties.
chinese: 困境中，他坚定的信仰支撑着他。
pinyin: kùn jìng zhòng， tā jiān dìng de xìn yǎng zhī chēng zhuó tā。

english: The tissues have been destroyed and a scar has formed.
chinese: 那些组织受到破坏，形成一道疤痕。
pinyin: nà xiē zǔ zhī shòu dào pò huài， xíng chéng yī dào bā hén。

english: She was driven by necessity to steal food for her starving children.
chinese: 环境逼得她为挨饿的儿女偷窃食物.
pinyin: huán jìng bī de tā wèi ái è de ér nu:3 tōu qiè shí wù.

english: He gave his wife a ring as a token of his love.
chinese: 他送给妻子一枚戒指，作为爱情的信物。
pinyin: tā sòng jǐ qī zi yī méi jiè zhi， zuò wéi ài qíng de xìn wù。

english: We had better get under the lee of the hedge until the rain stops.
chinese: 我们最好在树篱下躲一躲等雨停。
pinyin: wǒ men zuì hǎo zài shù lí xià duǒ yī duǒ děng yǔ tíng。

english: She was driven by necessity to steal food for her starving children.
chinese: 环境逼得她为挨饿的儿女偷窃食物.
pinyin: huán jìng bī de tā wèi ái è de ér nu:3 tōu qiè shí wù.

english: You should first put a small piece of zinc plate into the cup.
chinese: 首先，要向杯子里放一小片锌板。
pinyin: shǒu xiān， yào xiàng bēi zi lǐ fàng yī xiǎo piàn xīn bǎn。

english: This citadel is built on high ground for protecting the city.
chinese: 这座城堡建于高处是为保护城市。
pinyin: zhè zuò chéng bǎo jiàn yú gāo chù shì wèi bǎo hù chéng shì。

english: She matured her novel by constant revision.
chinese: 她不断修改自己的小说以使其趋于完善。
pinyin: tā bù duàn xiū gǎi zì jǐ de xiǎo shuō yǐ shǐ qí qū yú wán shàn。

english: A youth was tried in the criminal court for stealing.
chinese: 一个青年因偷窃罪而在刑事庭受审。
pinyin: yī gè qīng nián yīn tōu qiè zuì ér zài xíng shì tíng shòu shěn。

english: This financial crisis has brought new factors into play.
chinese: 这次金融危机引发新的因素起了作用.
pinyin: zhè cì jīn róng wēi jī yǐn fā xīn de yīn sù qǐ le zuò yòng.

english: She painted a rosy picture of the firm's future.
chinese: 她为公司的前景描绘了一幅美好的图画。
pinyin: tā wèi gōng sī de qián jǐng miáo huì le yī fú měi hǎo de tú huà。

english: The woman in this painting has a pensive smile.
chinese: 这幅画上的女人脸上露出忧郁的微笑。
pinyin: zhè fú huà shàng de nu:3 rén liǎn shàng lù chū yōu yù de wēi xiào。

english: He added sand to the soil to make it more porous.
chinese: 他往土里掺了些沙子以提高渗水性能。
pinyin: tā wàng tǔ lǐ shǎn le xiē shā zi yǐ tí gāo shèn shuǐ xìng néng。

english: He retrieved his losses by betting on a succession of winners.
chinese: 他下的赌注连续获胜才挽回了损失.
pinyin: tā xià de dǔ zhù lián xù huò shèng cái wǎn huí le sǔn shī.

english: Intellect distinguishes humans from other animals.
chinese: 人类与禽兽之别就在于具有思维能力。
pinyin: rén lèi yù qín shòu zhī biè jiù zài yú jù yǒu sī wéi néng lì。

english: The engine gave forth a grinding noise, then stopped.
chinese: 发动机发出一阵轧轧声, 随即停了下来.
pinyin: fā dòng jī fā chū yī zhèn yà yà shēng,  suí jí tíng le xia lai.

english: Sultan is sovereign ruler of certain Muslim countries.
chinese: 苏丹是某些穆斯林国家的最高统治者。
pinyin: sū dān shì mǒu xiē mù sī lín guó jiā de zuì gāo tǒng zhì zhē。

english: The mouse scurried into its hole when the cat appeared.
chinese: 猫一露面，老鼠急忙钻进自己的洞里。
pinyin: māo yī lòu miàn， lǎo shǔ jí máng zuàn jìn zì jǐ de dòng lǐ。

english: Hard graft is the only way to succeed in business.
chinese: 艰苦奋斗是在事业上成功的唯一途径.
pinyin: jiān kù fèn dòu shì zài shì yè shàng chéng gōng de wéi yī tú jìng.

english: Overflow patients lay on the floors and in the corridors.
chinese: 容纳不下的病人躺在地上和走廊里。
pinyin: róng nà bù xià de bìng rén tǎng zài dì shang huò zǒu láng lǐ。

english: Old as he is, he is none the less vigorous and active.
chinese: 虽然他年纪很大了, 他仍然精力充沛。
pinyin: suī rán tā nián jì hěn dà le,  tā réng rán jīng lì chōng pèi。

english: There has recently been an epidemic of crime in our major cities.
chinese: 近来我们一些大城市中罪案频繁。
pinyin: jìn lái wǒ men yī xiē dà chéng shì zhòng zuì àn pín fán。

english: New York is an international mart for stocks and shares.
chinese: 纽约是国际证券与股票的交易中心。
pinyin: Niǔ Yuē shì guó jì zhèng quàn yù gǔ piào de jiāo yì zhōng xīn。

english: He jumped onto the horse and galloped in the direction of the temple.
chinese: 他跳上马, 朝寺庙方向飞奔而去。
pinyin: tā tiào shàng mǎ,  cháo sì miào fāng xiàng fēi bēn ér qù。

english: The strategy was designed to wear down the enemy's resistance.
chinese: 这一策略旨在逐步削弱敌人的抵抗力.
pinyin: zhè yī cè lu:è zhǐ zài zhú bù xuē ruò dí rén de dǐ kàng lì.

english: She painted a rosy picture of the firm's future.
chinese: 她为公司的前景描绘了一幅美好的图画。
pinyin: tā wèi gōng sī de qián jǐng miáo huì le yī fú měi hǎo de tú huà。

english: My daughter asked me to buy her a pillow stuffed with feathers.
chinese: 我女儿请求我给她买一个羽绒枕头。
pinyin: wǒ nu:3 ér qǐng qiú wǒ jǐ tā mǎi yī gè yǔ róng zhěn tou。

english: In that war, many soldiers died in that fen area.
chinese: 那场战争中很多士兵死于那片沼泽地。
pinyin: nà chǎng zhàn zhēng zhòng hěn duō shì bīng sǐ yú nà piàn zhǎo zé dì。

english: Boil the vegetables for 20 minutes and then drain off the water.
chinese: 把蔬菜煮上20分钟，然后把水沥掉。
pinyin: bǎ shū cài zhǔ shà2ng0 fēn zhōng， rán hòu bǎ shuǐ lì diào。

english: Not everyone was born with such endowments as you.
chinese: 并非所有的人生来都像你这样有天赋。
pinyin: bìng fēi suǒ yǒu de rén shēng lái dōu xiàng nǐ zhè yàng yǒu tiān fù。

english: The blacksmith heated the iron bar until it glowed.
chinese: 这个铁匠给铁棒加热，直到烧红为止。
pinyin: zhè gè tiě jiang jǐ tiě bàng jiā rè， zhí dào shāo hóng wéi zhǐ。

english: The high cost of raw materials is keeping prices up.
chinese: 原料费用昂贵使得产品价格居高不下。
pinyin: yuán liào fèi yòng áng guì shǐ de chǎn pǐn jià gé jū gāo bù xià。

english: Buses driving through the mountains have been attacked by bandits.
chinese: 驶经山区的公共汽车遭到匪徒袭击.
pinyin: shǐ jīng shān qū de gōng gòng qì chē zāo dào fěi tú xí jī.

english: He is, without doubt, the greatest golfer in Japan.
chinese: 毫无疑问的他是称霸日本的高尔夫球手。
pinyin: háo wú yí wèn de tā shì chèng bà Rì běn de gāo ěr fū qiú shǒu。

english: He is, without doubt, the greatest golfer in Japan.
chinese: 毫无疑问的他是称霸日本的高尔夫球手。
pinyin: háo wú yí wèn de tā shì chèng bà Rì běn de gāo ěr fū qiú shǒu。

english: The smallest deflection of the missile could bring disaster.
chinese: 导弹有极微小的偏斜也可能酿出大祸.
pinyin: dǎo dàn yǒu jí wēi xiǎo de piān xié yě kě néng niàng chū dà huò.

english: Her laziness showed in her exam results.
chinese: 她平时懒惰从她的考试成绩可以看得出来。
pinyin: tā píng shí lǎn duò zòng tā de kǎo shì chéng jī kě yǐ kàn dé chū lái。

english: If war breaks out, we shall be called up right away.
chinese: 如果战争爆发, 我们将立即被征召服役。
pinyin: rú guǒ zhàn zhēng bào fā,  wǒ men jiàng lì jí bèi zhēng zhào fú yì。

english: In that war, many soldiers died in that fen area.
chinese: 那场战争中很多士兵死于那片沼泽地。
pinyin: nà chǎng zhàn zhēng zhòng hěn duō shì bīng sǐ yú nà piàn zhǎo zé dì。

english: The US and the former Soviet Union were co-signatories of/to the treaty.
chinese: 美国和前苏联都是条约的签署国.
pinyin: Měi guó huò qián sū lián dōu shì tiáo yuē de qiān shǔ guó.

english: Finance is not within the compass of our department.
chinese: 财政不在我们这个部门的管辖范围之内。
pinyin: cái zhèng bù zài wǒ men zhè gè bù mén de guǎn xiá fàn wéi zhī nèi。

english: There is little merit in passing the examination if you cheated.
chinese: 如果你作弊，考试及格也没什么价值。
pinyin: rú guǒ nǐ zuò bì， kǎo shì jí gé yě mò shén me jià zhí。

english: The girl's rosy cheeks made her look very lovely.
chinese: 那女孩玫瑰色的脸颊使她显得非常可爱。
pinyin: nà nu:3 hái méi guī shǎi de liǎn jiá shǐ tā xiǎn de fēi cháng kě ài。

english: The lettering on the gravestone was badly worn and almost illegible.
chinese: 墓碑上的文字已严重磨损难以辨认.
pinyin: mù bēi shàng de wén zì yǐ yán zhòng mò sǔn nán yǐ biàn rèn.

english: I can draw the conclusion without question that he is lying.
chinese: 我可以毫无疑问地得出结论他在说谎。
pinyin: wǒ kě yǐ háo wú yí wèn de dé chū jié lùn tā zài shuō huǎng。

english: The huge ship was sunk by a homing missile.
chinese: 这只巨大的军舰被一枚自动寻的导弹击中。
pinyin: zhè zhǐ jù dà de jūn jiàn bèi yī méi zì dòng xún dì dǎo dàn jī zhòng。

english: The magician thrilled his audience with his feats of magic.
chinese: 魔术师用他的魔术技艺使观众们激动。
pinyin: mó shù shī yòng tā de mó shù jì yì shǐ guān zhòng men jī dòng。

english: The room shows off her paintings to good effect.
chinese: 这个房间把她绘画的优点充分显示出来。
pinyin: zhè gè fáng jiān bǎ tā huì huà de yōu diǎn chōng fèn xiǎn shì chū lai。

english: All the moves of the ballerina were graceful.
chinese: 这个芭蕾舞女演员的每一个动作都很优美。
pinyin: zhè gè bā lěi wǔ nu:3 yǎn yuán de měi yī gè dòng zuò dōu hěn yōu měi。

english: Even an experienced cumber will get into trouble.
chinese: 哪怕是个有经验的登山者也会馅入困境。
pinyin: nǎ pà shì gè yǒu jīng yàn de dēng shān zhě yě kuài xiàn rù kùn jìng。

english: The earthquake made the wall sink and start to crumble.
chinese: 这次地震把这堵墙震得下陷并开始崩塌.
pinyin: zhè cì dì zhèn bǎ zhè dǔ qiáng zhèn de xià xiàn bìng kāi shǐ bēng tā.

english: I'm shocked at the prevalence of bribery among these officials.
chinese: 我对这些官员的普遍受贿感到震惊。
pinyin: wǒ duì zhè xie guān yuán de pǔ biàn shòu huì gǎn dào zhèn jīng。

english: In symphonic writing he is the master craftsman.
chinese: 在交响乐曲的创作上，他堪称技艺大师。
pinyin: zài jiāo xiǎng yuè qǔ de chuàng zuò shàng， tā kān chèng jì yì dà shī。

english: The noise was so loud that she put wads of cotton wool in her ears.
chinese: 噪声很大, 她用棉花团把耳朵堵上了.
pinyin: zào shēng hěn dà,  tā yòng mián hua tuán bǎ ěr duo dǔ shàng le.

english: Considering the smallness of the car, it is relatively roomy inside.
chinese: 别看这辆汽车小, 里面还比较宽敞.
pinyin: biè kàn zhè liàng qì chē xiǎo,  lǐ miàn huán bǐ jiào kuān chang.

english: We are enjoying the cool breeze that comes from the lake.
chinese: 我们享受着湖面上吹来的凉爽微风。
pinyin: wǒ men xiǎng shòu zhuó hú miàn shàng chuī lái de liáng shuǎng wēi fēng。

english: The hunter entertained us with venison which was very delicious.
chinese: 猎人拿出了非常美味的鹿肉招待我们。
pinyin: liè rén ná chū le fēi cháng měi wèi de lù ròu zhāo dài wǒ men。

english: Chinese children like to buy many firecrackers before the Spring Festival.
chinese: 中国孩子会在春节前买很多鞭炮。
pinyin: Zhōng guó hái zi kuài zài chūn jié qián mǎi hěn duō biān pào。

english: Tom has sprouted a beard since we saw him last.
chinese: 汤姆长胡子了, 我们上次见到他时还没长呢.
pinyin: tāng mǔ zhǎng hú zi le,  wǒ men shàng cì xiàn dào tā shí huán mò zhǎng ne.

english: Cars cannot exceed35 miles per hour within city limits.
chinese: 在市区线以内车速不能超过每小时35英里
pinyin: zài shì qū xiàn yǐ nèi jū sù bù néng chāo guò měi xiǎo shí35 yīng lǐ

english: We must multiply our efforts to clear up the mystery.
chinese: 我们必须加倍努力来澄清这一神秘的事件。
pinyin: wǒ men bì xū jiā bèi nǔ lì lái dèng qīng zhè yī shén mì de shì jiàn。

english: Ann thought I was Scottish but I soon put her right.
chinese: 安以为我是苏格兰人，但我马上纠正了她。
pinyin: ān yǐ wéi wǒ shì sū gé lán rén， dàn wǒ mǎ shàng jiū zhèng le tā。

english: The exclusion of women from the temple made them feel sad.
chinese: 妇女被排斥于寺院之外使得她们很难过。
pinyin: fù nu:3 bèi pái chì yú sì yuàn zhī wài shǐ de tā men hěn nán guò。

english: His many little jealousies harmed their marriage.
chinese: 他那许多妒嫉的言行妨害了他们的婚姻生活。
pinyin: tā nà xǔ duō dù jí de yán xìng fáng hài le tā men de hūn yīn shēng huó。

english: The nurse put a clean pad of cotton over his wound.
chinese: 护士在他的伤口上敷了一块干净的纱布垫。
pinyin: hù shi zài tā de shāng kǒu shàng fū le yī kuài gān jìng de shā bù diàn。

english: The salient point of his plan is summed up in this report.
chinese: 他的计划的要点在这个报告中酌此概括。
pinyin: tā de jì huà de yào diǎn zài zhè gè bào gào zhòng zhuó cǐ gài kuò。

english: He lives in a warren of narrow twisting old streets.
chinese: 他住在街道弯弯曲曲的狭窄拥塞的老街区。
pinyin: tā zhù zài jiē dào wān wān qǔ qǔ de xiá zhǎi yōng sāi de lǎo jiē qū。

english: Germany is bounded on the west by France and on the south by Switzerland.
chinese: 德国西面与法国接壤, 南与瑞士为邻.
pinyin: Dé guó xī miàn yù fǎ guó jiē rǎng,  nán yù ruì shì wèi lín.

english: Many rich families are brought low by the financial crisis.
chinese: 很多富户都因那次金融危机而家道中落。
pinyin: hěn duō fù hù dōu yīn nà cì jīn róng wēi jī ér jiā dào zhòng luò。

english: The parks of this city are famous for their ornate fountains.
chinese: 这个城市的公园以其华丽的喷泉而著名。
pinyin: zhè gè chéng shì de gōng yuán yǐ qí huá lì de pēn quán ér著 míng。

english: He could feel their sarcastic tone about his poor work.
chinese: 他能感觉到他们对他拙劣作品的讽刺语调。
pinyin: tā néng gǎn jué dào tā men duì tā zhuó liè zuò pǐn de fèng cì yǔ diào。

english: We were outmanoeuvred and outfought throughout the winter campaign.
chinese: 我们在整个冬季战役中始终不如对手.
pinyin: wǒ men zài zhěng gè dōng jì zhàn yì zhòng shǐ zhōng bù rú duì shǒu.

english: The board of directors made the decision to produce the car on a large scale.
chinese: 董事会决定大规模生产这种汽车。
pinyin: dǒng shì huì jué dìng dà guī mó shēng chǎn zhè zhǒng qì chē。

english: The sunlight will break into different colors through a prism.
chinese: 阳光穿过棱镜时将分解成各种颜色。
pinyin: yáng guāng chuān guò léng jìng shí jiàng fēn jiě chéng gè zhǒng yán sè。

english: It was amazing that he knew nothing about the event.
chinese: 他对这个事件毫不知情，真让人感到诧异。
pinyin: tā duì zhè gè shì jiàn háo bú zhī qíng， zhēn ràng rén gǎn dào chà yì。

english: Confucius is considered the greatest of the ancient Chinese sages.
chinese: 孔子被认为是中国古代最伟大的圣贤。
pinyin: kǒng zi bèi rèn wéi shì Zhōng guó gǔ dài zuì wěi dà de shèng xián。

english: In the accident, the workers received a heavy dose of radiation.
chinese: 在这次事故中，工人受到大剂量的辐射。
pinyin: zài zhè cì shì gù zhòng， gōng rén shòu dào dà jì liáng de fú shè。

english: His interests ranged from chess to canoeing.
chinese: 他的爱好从下国际象棋到划独木舟, 范围很广.
pinyin: tā de ài hào zòng xià guó jì xiàng qí dào huà dú mù zhōu,  fàn wéi hěn guǎng.

english: She needs to perfect her Arabic before going to work in Cairo.
chinese: 她需要把阿拉伯语学好才能到开罗工作.
pinyin: tā xū yào bǎ ē lā bó yù xué hào cái néng dào Kāi luó gōng zuò.

english: I am the only one to pick up on what the teacher is really saying.
chinese: 我是唯一明了老师真正在说什么的人。
pinyin: wǒ shì wéi yī míng le lǎo shī zhēn zhèng zài shuō shén me de rén。

english: They walked through the forest breathing the scent of pines.
chinese: 他们步行穿过森林，呼吸着松树的芳香。
pinyin: tā men bù xíng chuān guò sēn lín， hū xī zhuó sōng shù de fāng xiāng。

english: The small weak child became the scorn of the class.
chinese: 这个瘦小软弱的孩子成为全班嘲笑的对象。
pinyin: zhè gè shòu xiǎo ruǎn ruò de hái zi chéng wéi quán bān cháo xiào de duì xiàng。

english: She got into a panic when she thought she'd forgotten the tickets.
chinese: 她想起忘记带入场券，顿时惊慌起来。
pinyin: tā xiǎng qǐ wàng jì dài rù chǎng quàn， dùn shí jīng huāng qǐ lai。

english: He could feel their sarcastic tone about his poor work.
chinese: 他能感觉到他们对他拙劣作品的讽刺语调。
pinyin: tā néng gǎn jué dào tā men duì tā zhuó liè zuò pǐn de fèng cì yǔ diào。

english: When he became interested in model airplanes he went the whole hog.
chinese: 他对模型飞机感兴趣之后就全力以赴了。
pinyin: tā duì mó xíng fēi jī gǎn xìng qu zhī hòu jiù quán lì yǐ fù le。

english: The vaccine was used to protect the whole population against infection.
chinese: 这种疫苗用以为全体居民预防传染病.
pinyin: zhè zhǒng yì miáo yòng yǐ wèi quán tǐ jū mín yù fáng chuán rǎn bìng.

english: There are currency restrictions on the sums allowed for foreign travel.
chinese: 到国外旅行允许携带的款额有所限制。
pinyin: dào guó wài lu:3 xíng yǔn xǔ xié dài de kuǎn é yǒu suǒ xiàn zhì。

english: Nothing could refute her testimony that the driver was drunk.
chinese: 她关于那个司机已经喝醉的证词无可辩驳。
pinyin: tā guān yú nèi gè sī jī yǐ jīng hè zuì de zhèng cí wú kě biàn bó。

english: Time and weather had long ago effaced the inscription on the monument.
chinese: 岁月和风雨早已磨掉纪念碑上的铭文。
pinyin: suì yuè hé fēng yǔ zǎo yǐ mò diào jì niàn bēi shàng de míng wén。

english: I have learned a lot from the chastening experience.
chinese: 我从这个可以引以为戒的经历中学到了很多。
pinyin: wǒ zòng zhè gè kě yǐ yǐn yǐ wéi jiè de jīng lì zhōng xué dào le hěn duō。

english: His amusing performance caused a roar of laughter in the audience.
chinese: 他那有趣的表演引起了观众的哄堂大笑。
pinyin: tā nà yǒu qù de biǎo yǎn yǐn qǐ le guān zhòng de hòng táng dà xiào。

english: In a silver frame on the table there is a photograph of her husband.
chinese: 在桌上的银相框里有张她丈夫的照片。
pinyin: zài zhuō shàng de yín xiàng kuàng lǐ yǒu zhāng tā zhàng fu de zhào piàn。

english: Those noisy neighbours are the bane of my life.
chinese: 那些吵吵闹闹的邻居成了我生活中的一大忧患.
pinyin: nà xiē chǎo chǎo nào nào de lín jū chéng le wǒ shēng huó zhòng dì yī dà yōu huàn.

english: A business cannot thrive without good management.
chinese: 没有良好的经营管理，事业就不会兴旺发达。
pinyin: méi yǒu liáng hǎo de jīng yíng guǎn lǐ， shì yè jiù bù huì xīng wàng fā dá。

english: May I use your lavatory I'm bursting! ie I need to urinate urgently.
chinese: 我可以用用你们的厕所吗--我实在憋不住了.
pinyin: wǒ kě yǐ yòng yòng nǐ men de cè suǒ ma-- wǒ shí zài biē bú zhù le.

english: The antique table went to the lady in the pink hat.
chinese: 这张古董桌子卖给那位戴粉红色帽子的女士了.
pinyin: zhè zhāng gǔ dǒng zhuō zi mài jǐ nà wèi dài fěn hóng sè mào zi de nu:3 shì le.

english: The doctor had to hold his broken arm with a plaster cast.
chinese: 医生不得不用石膏绷带来固定他断了的胳膊。
pinyin: yī shēng bù dé bù yòng shí gāo bēng dài lái gù dìng tā duàn le de gē bo。

english: Only in the southern part of Taiwan have I seen such scenery as this.
chinese: 唯有在南台湾我才见过像这样的风景。
pinyin: wěi yǒu zài nán Tái wān wǒ cái xiàn guò xiàng zhè yàng de fēng jǐng。

english: The country girl was not used to their lavish mode of living.
chinese: 这个乡下姑娘不习惯他们奢侈的生活方式。
pinyin: zhè gè xiāng xià gū niang bù xí guàn tā men shē chǐ de shēng huó fāng shì。

english: The policy is designed to prevent the predominance of one group over another.
chinese: 该政策旨在防止一些人压制另一些人.
pinyin: gāi zhèng cè zhǐ zài fáng zhǐ yī xiē rén yā zhì lìng yī xiē rén.

english: I didn't expect him to descend to personal abuse.
chinese: 我没料到他会堕落到对我进行人身攻击的地步。
pinyin: wǒ mò liào dào tā kuài duò luò dào duì wǒ jìn xíng rén shēn gōng jī de dì bù。

english: She swallowed hard, and turned to face her accuser.
chinese: 她用力咽了一下唾液, 转身面对那个控告她的人.
pinyin: tā yòng lì yè le yī xià tuò yè,  zhuǎn shēn miàn duì nèi gè kòng gào tā de rén.

english: The doctor had to hold his broken arm with a plaster cast.
chinese: 医生不得不用石膏绷带来固定他断了的胳膊。
pinyin: yī shēng bù dé bù yòng shí gāo bēng dài lái gù dìng tā duàn le de gē bo。

english: The little girl threaded the shells together and wore them round her neck.
chinese: 小女孩把贝壳穿成一串，戴在脖子上。
pinyin: xiǎo nu:3 hái bǎ bèi ké chuān chéng yī chuàn， dài zài bó zi shàng。

english: In our garden we have egg-plants, cucumber and potato.
chinese: 在我们的菜园里，我们种了茄子，黄瓜和土豆。
pinyin: zài wǒ men de cài yuán lǐ， wǒ men zhòng le qié zi， huáng guā huò tǔ dòu。

english: A cocoon is a kind of silk covering made by an insect.
chinese: 蚕茧是由昆虫制造的一种由丝组成的外包层。
pinyin: cán jiǎn shì yóu kūn chóng zhì zào de yī zhòng yóu sī zǔ chéng de wài bāo céng。

english: The host took out a bottle of 12-year-old malt whisky to entertain us.
chinese: 男主人拿出了一瓶12年的优质麦芽威士忌。
pinyin: nán zhǔ rén ná chū le yī píng12 nián de yōu zhì mài yá wēi shì jì。

english: A critic is a necessary evil, and criticism is an evil necessity.
chinese: 批评家是必然的邪恶，而批评是邪恶的必然。
pinyin: pī píng jiā shì bì rán de xié è， ér pī píng shì xié è de bì rán。

english: The young soprano was taken up by a famous conductor.
chinese: 那年轻的女高音歌手受到一著名指挥家的提携.
pinyin: nà nián qīng de nu:3 gāo yīn gē shǒu shòu dào yī著 míng zhǐ huī jiā de tí xié.

english: His wife has become a woman of some standing in the community.
chinese: 他的妻子在那个群体中成为颇有地位的女子。
pinyin: tā de qī zi zài nèi gè qún tǐ zhòng chéng wéi pō yǒu dì wèi de nu:3 zǐ。

english: The necessity for making decisions devolves on him.
chinese: 作出决策乃当务之急，此事必然地落在他身上。
pinyin: zuò chū jué cè nǎi dàng wù zhī jí， cǐ shì bì rán de luò zài tā shēn shàng。

english: He probed the mud with a stick, looking for the ring he had dropped.
chinese: 他用树枝在泥里探寻，想找回丢失的戒指。
pinyin: tā yòng shù zhī zài nì lǐ tàn xún， xiǎng zhǎo huí diū shī de jiè zhi。

english: The ring was important to her as an emblem of their love.
chinese: 这枚戒指是他们爱情的象征，对她是重要的。
pinyin: zhè méi jiè zhi shì tā men ài qíng de xiàng zhēng， duì tā shì zhòng yào de。

english: The soldiers sang a song of victory, describing their prowess in battle.
chinese: 战士们唱起了歌颂他们英勇战斗的凯歌。
pinyin: zhàn shì men chàng qǐ le gē sòng tā men yīng yǒng zhàn dòu de kǎi gē。

english: The president promised swift and effective retribution against the terrorists.
chinese: 总统答应会迅速有效地惩罚恐怖分子。
pinyin: zǒng tǒng dā ying kuài xùn sù yǒu xiào de chéng fá kǒng bù fèn zǐ。

english: The little boy skipped along at his mother's side.
chinese: 那个小男孩在他母亲身边跳跳蹦蹦地往前走。
pinyin: nèi gè xiǎo nán hái zài tā mǔ qīn shēn biān tiào tiào bèng bèng de wàng qián zǒu。

english: The president promised swift and effective retribution against the terrorists.
chinese: 总统答应会迅速有效地惩罚恐怖分子。
pinyin: zǒng tǒng dā ying kuài xùn sù yǒu xiào de chéng fá kǒng bù fèn zǐ。

english: According to your contract, you get 15 days' paid holiday a year.
chinese: 根据你的合同，你每年有十五天的带薪假期。
pinyin: gēn jù nǐ de hé tong， nǐ měi nián yǒu shí wǔ tiān de dài xīn jià qī。

english: He took a powder and left his mother to worry about his gambling debts.
chinese: 他一走了之，而让他的母亲为他的赌债发愁。
pinyin: tā yī zǒu le zhī， ér ràng tā de mǔ qīn wèi tā de dǔ zhài fā chóu。

english: The product was so successful that its name became a household word.
chinese: 这一产品非常成功, 其名称已经家喻户晓.
pinyin: zhè yī chǎn pǐn fēi cháng chéng gōng,  qí míng chēng yǐ jīng jiā yù hù xiǎo.

english: His noble action reflected the greatest credit and glory upon him.
chinese: 他的崇高行动使他得到极大的荣誉和光荣。
pinyin: tā de chóng gāo xíng dòng shǐ tā dé dào jí dà de róng yù huò guāng róng。

english: A drop of milk diffused in the water, and it became cloudy.
chinese: 一滴奶在水中扩散开来, 使水变得混浊不清了.
pinyin: yī dī nǎi zài shuǐ zhòng kuò sàn kāi lái,  shǐ shuǐ biàn de hùn zhuó bù qīng le.

english: He's a reformed criminal who may yet backslide.
chinese: 他是个经过改造的罪犯，然而仍有可能故态复萌。
pinyin: tā shì gè jīng guò gǎi zào de zuì fàn， rán ér réng yǒu kě néng gù tài fù méng。

english: Jack is not only a good student but also a basketball player.
chinese: 杰克不仅是个好学生，而且还是名篮球队员。
pinyin: jié kè bù jǐn shì gè hào xué sheng， ér qiě hái shì míng lán qiú duì yuán。

english: Not only do they rob you, they smash everything too.
chinese: 他们不仅抢夺你的财物，还要把每样东西都捣毁。
pinyin: tā men bù jǐn qiǎng duó nǐ de cái wù， huán yào bǎ měi yàng dōng xi dōu dǎo huǐ。

english: The act or an instance of exerting, especially a strenuous effort.
chinese: 发挥运用的行为或事例，尤指全力以赴的努力
pinyin: fā huī yùn yòng de xíng wéi huò shì lì， yóu zhǐ quán lì yǐ fù de nǔ lì

english: The animal husbandry in this area has developed greatly after liberation.
chinese: 解放后这个地区的畜牧业得到了巨大的发展。
pinyin: jiě fàng hòu zhè gè dì qū de xù mù yè dé dào le jù dà de fā zhǎn。

english: The working of the stock exchange is beyond most people's ken.
chinese: 证券交易所的运作情况大多数人都不了解。
pinyin: zhèng quàn jiāo yì suǒ de yùn zuò qíng kuàng dà duō shù rén dōu bù liǎo xiè。

english: Due to low investment, our industrial output has remained stagnant.
chinese: 由于投资少，我们的工业生产一直停滞不前。
pinyin: yóu yú tóu zī shào， wǒ men de gōng yè shēng chǎn yī zhí tíng zhì bù qián。

english: One small fire in the kitchen will cover the whole house in soot.
chinese: 一个厨房里的小火炉就会把整个房子都熏黑。
pinyin: yī gè chú fáng lǐ de xiǎo huǒ lú jiù kuài bǎ zhěng gè fáng zi dōu xūn hēi。

english: He renounced his religion and became a Muslim.
chinese: 他宣布脱离他原来的宗教而成为了一名穆斯林教徒。
pinyin: tā xuān bù tuō lí tā yuán lái de zōng jiào ér chéng wéi le yī míng mù sī lín jiào tú。

english: Branch managers have full autonomy in their own areas.
chinese: 分支机构的经理在其管辖范围内有充分的自主权.
pinyin: fēn zhī jī gòu de jīng lǐ zài qí guǎn xiá fàn wéi nèi yǒu chōng fèn de zì zhǔ quán.

english: Branch managers have full autonomy in their own areas.
chinese: 分支机构的经理在其管辖范围内有充分的自主权.
pinyin: fēn zhī jī gòu de jīng lǐ zài qí guǎn xiá fàn wéi nèi yǒu chōng fèn de zì zhǔ quán.

english: There has been so much propaganda against smoking that many people have given it up.
chinese: 反对吸烟的宣传很多, 许多人因而戒了烟.
pinyin: fǎn duì xī yān de xuān chuán hěn duō,  xǔ duō rén yīn ér jiè le yān.

english: There has been so much propaganda against smoking that many people have given it up.
chinese: 反对吸烟的宣传很多, 许多人因而戒了烟.
pinyin: fǎn duì xī yān de xuān chuán hěn duō,  xǔ duō rén yīn ér jiè le yān.

english: The carpenter ran his ruler over the shed and sized it up at once.
chinese: 木匠量了一下棚屋的尺寸, 立刻估计出它的大小。
pinyin: mù jiàng liàng le yī xià péng wū de chǐ cun,  lì kè gū jì chū tā de dà xiǎo。

english: According to the treaty, China is to take back Hong Kong on July 1st, 1997.
chinese: 根据条约, 中国将于1997年7月1日收回香港。
pinyin: gēn jù tiáo yuē,  Zhōng guó jiàng yú1997 nián7 yuè1 rì shōu huí xiāng gǎng。

english: The police have been instructed to keep an eye out for pickpockets at the fair.
chinese: 遵照指示, 警察在展览会期间警戒小偷。
pinyin: zūn zhào zhǐ shì,  jǐng chá zài zhǎn lǎn huì qī jiān jǐng jiè xiǎo tōu。

english: A place or an area, such as a swimming pool, for diving or plunging.
chinese: 投入供人跳水或潜水的地方或地区，如游泳池
pinyin: tóu rù gòng rén tiào shuǐ huò qián shuǐ de dì fang huò dì qū， rú yóu yǒng chí

english: Be away from duties without the permission of a superior officer.
chinese: 军人在未获上级军官允许的情况下擅离职守。
pinyin: jūn rén zài wèi huò shàng jí jūn guān yǔn xǔ de qíng kuàng xià shàn lí zhí shǒu。

english: The United Kingdom was a mighty empire before World War I.
chinese: 英联邦在第一次世界大战前曾是一个强大的帝国。
pinyin: yīng lián bāng zài dì yī cì shì jiè dà zhàn qián zēng shì yī gè qiáng dà de dì guó。

english: In the temperance question, Mr White takes his stand on total abstinence.
chinese: 在戒酒问题上，怀特先生是主张完全戒掉。
pinyin: zài jiè jiǔ wèn tí shàng， huái tè xiān sheng shì zhǔ zhāng wán quán jiè diào。

english: The period of exercise was geared down to ten minutes a day for men over 60.
chinese: 60岁以上的人的锻炼时间减低到每日十分钟.
pinyin: 60 suì yǐ shàng de rén de duàn liàn shí jiān jiǎn dī dào měi rì shí fēn zhōng.

english: Reply to Publicity Department, FREEPOST, Oxford University Press, Oxford.
chinese: 回信免费邮寄至牛津牛津大学出版社宣传部.
