english: We would rather die than surrender.
chinese: 我们宁死而不投降。
pinyin: wǒ men níng sǐ ér bù tóu xiáng。

english: An act of overrunning.
chinese: 侵占，泛滥，超过限度
pinyin: qīn zhàn， fàn làn， chāo guò xiàn dù

english: She inherited a large fortune.
chinese: 她继承了一大笔财产.
pinyin: tā jí chéng le yī dà bǐ cái chǎn.

english: The train slowly came to the station.
chinese: 火车缓缓地进站。
pinyin: huǒ chē huǎn huǎn de jìn zhàn。

english: All of us are sinful.
chinese: 我们所有人都是有罪的。

english: I was temporarily delayed.
chinese: 我被耽误了一段时间。
pinyin: wǒ bèi dān wu le yī duàn shí jiān。

english: The silkworms are producing well.
chinese: 这些蚕的吐丝量很大.

chinese: 我头疼得要裂开似的。

chinese: 我谨祝您一切顺利。
pinyin: wǒ jǐn zhù nín yī qiè shùn lì。

english: There was a tremble in his voice.
chinese: 他的声音有点颤抖.

english: He has a very fierce look on his face.
chinese: 他脸上一副凶相。

english: Oh, they are very dull actually.
chinese: 哦，实际上很乏味的。
pinyin: ó， shí jì shàng hěn fá wèi de。

english: The sparking-plugs need cleaning.
chinese: 火花塞要清理一下了.

english: The law needs toughening (up).
chinese: 需要加强法制的威力.
pinyin: xū yào jiā qiáng fǎ zhì de wēi lì.

english: The financial loss did him in.
chinese: 财政损失使他完蛋。
pinyin: cái zhèng sǔn shī shǐ tā wán dàn。

english: Dockers started unloading (the ship).
chinese: 码头工人开始卸船.
pinyin: mǎ tóu gōng rén kāi shǐ xiè chuán.

english: Well, I think it will have to do.
chinese: 唉，恐怕只能如此了。
pinyin: ài， kǒng pà zhǐ néng rú cǐ le。

english: That nothing to boast of.
chinese: 那没有什么值得夸耀的。
pinyin: nà méi yǒu shén me zhí de kuā yào de。

english: This pair of scales is not in equilibrium.
chinese: 这个天平不平衡.
pinyin: zhè gè tiān píng bù píng héng.

english: She threw the ball up and caught it again.
chinese: 她把球抛起又接住.
pinyin: tā bǎ qiú pāo qǐ yòu jiē zhù.

english: The lake is ringed with willows.
chinese: 该湖四周柳树环绕。
pinyin: gāi hú sì zhōu liǔ shù huán rào。

english: Thank you for your kind hospitality.
chinese: 谢谢你的盛情款待.
pinyin: xiè xie nǐ de shèng qíng kuǎn dài.

english: Her clothes were bespattered with mud.
chinese: 她的衣服溅上了泥污.
pinyin: tā de yī fu jiàn shàng le nì wū.

english: The post is fast in the ground.
chinese: 那柱子牢牢地埋在地里.
pinyin: nà zhù zi láo láo de mán zài de lǐ.

english: Cancer is a kind of persistent ailment.
chinese: 癌症是一种顽症。
pinyin: ái zhèng shì yī zhòng wán zhèng。

english: She embroidered the cushion with flowers.
chinese: 她把垫子绣上了花.
pinyin: tā bǎ diàn zǐ xiù shàng le huā.

english: His clothes were covered with dirt.
chinese: 他的衣服蒙上了灰尘.
pinyin: tā de yī fu měng shàng le huī chén.

english: The truck was heavily loaded.
chinese: 这辆卡车装载很重。
pinyin: zhè liàng kǎ chē zhuāng zài hěn zhòng。

english: Rust and acids are corrosive.
chinese: 锈与酸都是腐蚀性的。
pinyin: xiù yù suān dōu shì fǔ shí xìng de。

english: It portends we are in danger.
chinese: 这预示我们陷入危险。
pinyin: zhè yù shì wǒ men xiàn rù wēi xiǎn。

english: I'm looking for a part-time job.
chinese: 我正在找兼职工作。
pinyin: wǒ zhèng zài zhǎo jiān zhí gōng zuò。

english: Unloading the cargo was a slow process.
chinese: 卸货的过程很缓慢.
pinyin: xiè huò de guò chéng hěn huǎn màn.

english: He washed down a pill with water.
chinese: 他用开水吞服药丸。
pinyin: tā yòng kāi shuǐ tūn fú yào wán。

english: Let your muscles relax slowly.
chinese: 让你的肌肉慢慢放松.
pinyin: ràng nǐ de jī ròu màn màn fàng sōng.

english: Almost all insects have feelers.
chinese: 昆虫几乎都有触角。
pinyin: kūn chóng jī hū dōu yǒu chù jiǎo。

english: He placed the money on the counter.
chinese: 他把钱放在柜台上.
pinyin: tā bǎ qián fàng zài guì tái shàng.

english: The country's defences are weak.
chinese: 该国的防御能力薄弱.
pinyin: gāi guó de fáng yù néng lì bó ruò.

english: The old lady easily gets confused.
chinese: 这个老太婆容易迷糊.
pinyin: zhè gè lǎo tài pó róng yì mí hu.

english: Laid-off workers fall into penury.
chinese: 下岗职工陷入贫困。
pinyin: xià gǎng zhí gōng xiàn rù pín kùn。

english: Facts are stubborn things.
chinese: 事实是最顽强的东西。
pinyin: shì shí shì zuì wán qiáng de dōng xi。

english: Passengers mustn't cross the rails.
chinese: 乘客不得横过铁路。
pinyin: chéng kè bù dé héng guò tiě lù。

english: I met her quite by chance.
chinese: 我遇见她完全是偶然的.
pinyin: wǒ yù jiàn tā wán quán shì ǒu rán de.

english: She gestured her disapproval.
chinese: 她用姿势表示不赞成.
pinyin: tā yòng zī shì biǎo shì bù zàn chéng.

english: Slogans were hung in the hall.
chinese: 全场里悬挂着标语。
pinyin: quán chǎng lǐ xuán guà zhuó biāo yǔ。

english: Someone tried to poison our dog.
chinese: 有人想毒杀我们的狗。
pinyin: yǒu rén xiǎng dú shā wǒ men de gǒu。

english: The oceans are large bodies of water.
chinese: 海洋是广大的水域。
pinyin: hǎi yáng shì guǎng dà de shuǐ yù。

english: The palace was ablaze with lights.
chinese: 那座宫殿灯火辉煌.
pinyin: nà zuò gōng diàn dēng huǒ huī huáng.

english: I don't like being stared at.
chinese: 我不喜欢人家盯著瞧我.
pinyin: wǒ bù xǐ huan rén jiā dīng著 qiáo wǒ.

english: The truck had carried back many bricks.
chinese: 卡车运回了许多砖。
pinyin: kǎ chē yùn huí le xǔ duō zhuān。

english: He told us to proceed with caution.
chinese: 他要我们谨慎行事。

pinyin: nà zhǎn dēng xuán guà zài zhuō zi shàng fāng。

english: There was a kerosene lamp on the table.
chinese: 桌子上有一盏煤油灯。
pinyin: zhuō zi shàng yǒu yī zhǎn méi yóu dēng。

english: Care sat heavily on his brow.
chinese: 他心事重重，眉头紧锁。
pinyin: tā xīn shì chóng chóng， méi tóu jǐn suǒ。

english: They all stared with astonishment.
chinese: 他们全都惊讶地瞪着眼。
pinyin: tā men quán dōu jīng yà de dèng zhuó yǎn。

english: Thousands of people died of famine.
chinese: 千千万万的人死于饥荒。
pinyin: qiān qiān wàn wàn de rén sǐ yú jī huang。

english: The lid of this jam pot won't unscrew.
chinese: 这果酱罐的盖子拧不开.
pinyin: zhè guǒ jiàng guàn de gài zi nìng bù kāi.

english: Soldiers were sent in to quell the riots.
chinese: 已派士兵去镇压动乱.
pinyin: yǐ pài shì bīng qù zhèn yā dòng luàn.

english: Guards were stationed around the prison.
chinese: 卫兵派驻在监狱四周。
pinyin: wèi bīng pài zhù zài jiān yù sì zhōu。

english: I'm disposed to agree with you.
chinese: 我倾向于同意你的观点。
pinyin: wǒ qīng xiàng yú tóng yì nǐ de guān diǎn。

english: He was found in incurable disease.
chinese: 他被查出得了不治之症。
pinyin: tā bèi chá chū dé le bù zhì zhī zhèng。

english: The sea washes the base of the cliffs.
chinese: 海水拍打著悬崖的底部。
pinyin: hǎi shuǐ pāi da著 xuán yá de dǐ bù。

english: The bathroom floor was swimming with water.
chinese: 浴室的地面上都是水.
pinyin: yù shì de dì miàn shàng dōu shì shuǐ.

english: The ship was holed by an iceberg.
chinese: 冰山把那船撞出了窟窿.
pinyin: bīng shān bǎ nà chuán zhuàng chū le kū long.

english: The tailor has butchered this suit.
chinese: 裁缝把这套衣服做坏了。
pinyin: cái féng bǎ zhè tào yī fu zuò huài le。

english: Demonstrators clashed with police.
chinese: 示威者与警察发生冲突.
pinyin: shì wēi zhě yù jǐng chá fā shēng chōng tū.

english: She complained of the wrongs she had suffered.
chinese: 她投诉说她受到委屈.
pinyin: tā tóu sù shuō tā shòu dào wěi qū.

english: The accused was remanded in custody for a week.
chinese: 被告还押候审一星期.
pinyin: bèi gào huán yā hòu shěn yī xīng qī.

english: The temple is supported by massive columns.
chinese: 此庙由粗大的柱子支撑.
pinyin: cǐ miào yóu cū dà de zhù zi zhī chēng.

english: The long drought famished many people.
chinese: 久旱使很多人陷入饥饿。
pinyin: jiǔ hàn shǐ hěn duō rén xiàn rù jī è。

english: You must stand up for your rights.
chinese: 你一定要维护自己的权利.
pinyin: nǐ yī dìng yào wéi hù zì jǐ de quán lì.

english: He is in immeasurable joy.
chinese: 他沉浸在巨大的欢乐之中。
pinyin: tā chén jìn zài jù dà de huān lè zhī zhōng。

english: He soldered the wire back on.
chinese: 他把金属丝重新焊上去了。
pinyin: tā bǎ jīn shǔ sī chóng xīn hàn shàng qù le。

english: He punished his opponent with fierce punches to the body.
chinese: 他猛击对手的身体.
pinyin: tā měng jī duì shǒu de shēn tǐ.

english: The good news lifted my spirits.
chinese: 这好消息使我精神大振。
pinyin: zhè hào xiāo xi shǐ wǒ jīng shén dà zhèn。

english: The children were playing in the sand pit.
chinese: 孩子们在沙坑中玩耍。
pinyin: hái zi men zài shā kēng zhòng wàn shuǎ。

english: The news of his death was a bombshell.
chinese: 他逝世的消息使人震惊.
pinyin: tā shì shì de xiāo xi shǐ rén zhèn jīng.

english: He blew out the candles with a single puff.
chinese: 他一口气吹灭了蜡烛。
pinyin: tā yī kǒu qì chuī miè le là zhú。

english: Money doesn't always bring happiness.
chinese: 财富并不一定带来快乐。
pinyin: cái fù bìng bù yī dìng dài lái kuài lè。

english: A pavilion is halfway up the hill.
chinese: 山的半中腰有一座亭子。
pinyin: shān de bàn zhòng yāo yǒu yī zuò tíng zi。

english: He pushed the stool under the table.
chinese: 他把凳子推到桌子下面。
pinyin: tā bǎ dèng zǐ tuī dào zhuō zi xià mian。

english: The crops failed because of the drought.
chinese: 干旱造成农作物歉收。
pinyin: gān hàn zào chéng nóng zuò wù qiàn shōu。

english: He was wet from head to foot from the shower.
chinese: 他被雨浇得全身湿透。
pinyin: tā bèi yǔ jiāo de quán shēn shī tòu。

english: Violence is abhorrent to his gentle nature.
chinese: 他性情温和, 讨厌暴力.
pinyin: tā xìng qing wēn hé,  tǎo yàn bào lì.

english: Guards were stationed around the prison.
chinese: 卫兵派驻在监狱四周。
pinyin: wèi bīng pài zhù zài jiān yù sì zhōu。

english: The editor struck out the whole paragraph.
chinese: 编辑把整段全删掉了.
pinyin: biān jí bǎ zhěng duàn quán shān diào le.

english: She began to weary of her companions.
chinese: 她逐渐对同伴心怀不满.
pinyin: tā zhú jiàn duì tóng bàn xīn huái bù mǎn.

english: Her hair nearly reached down to her waist.
chinese: 她的头发几乎垂到了腰部.
pinyin: tā de tóu fa jī hū chuí dào le yāo bù.

english: His feet smelt revolting.
chinese: 他双脚散发的气味让人恶心.
pinyin: tā shuāng jué sàn fā de qì wèi ràng rén è xīn.

english: The car ran off the road into a ditch.
chinese: 汽车驶离道路跌进沟中。
pinyin: qì chē shǐ lí dào lù diē jìn gōu zhòng。

english: Waves dashed against the harbour wall.
chinese: 波浪撞击著港口的墙基.
pinyin: bō làng zhuàng jī著 gǎng kǒu de qiáng jī.

english: There are many ducks swimming in the lake.
chinese: 湖里有许多鸭子在游泳。
pinyin: hú lǐ yǒu xǔ duō yā zi zài yóu yǒng。

english: The original manuscript has been lost; this is a copy.
chinese: 原稿已失, 这是副本.
pinyin: yuán gǎo yǐ shī,  zhè shì fù běn.

english: The guards are still on watch at midnight.
chinese: 看守在深夜仍在站岗。
pinyin: kān shǒu zài shēn yè réng zài zhàn gǎng。

english: These arguments cancel each other out.
chinese: 这些争论彼此势均力敌。
pinyin: zhè xie zhēng lùn bǐ cǐ shì jūn lì dí。

english: He expressed voluble protests.
chinese: 他表示了振振有词的抗议。
pinyin: tā biǎo shì le zhèn zhèn yǒu cí de kàng yì。

english: I made remonstrance against his rudeness.
chinese: 我对他的粗暴提出抗议。
pinyin: wǒ duì tā de cū bào tí chū kàng yì。

english: The team climbed the north face of the mountain.
chinese: 那小队攀登山的北坡.
pinyin: nà xiǎo duì pān dēng shān de běi pō.

english: I feel like a newborn baby.
chinese: 我感觉像是个新生的婴儿。
pinyin: wǒ gǎn jué xiàng shì gè xīn shēng de yīng ér。

english: There is a call for the concession of certain rights.
chinese: 要求承认某些权利.
pinyin: yāo qiú chéng rèn mǒu xiē quán lì.

english: He promenaded along the beach with his wife.
chinese: 他和妻子沿着海滩散步。
pinyin: tā huò qī zi yán zhe hǎi tān sàn bù。

english: The bomb was exploded by remote control.
chinese: 这颗炸弹是遥控引爆的。
pinyin: zhè kē zhà dàn shì yáo kòng yǐn bào de。

english: It was careless of you to leave the door unlocked.
chinese: 你没锁门，太粗心了。
pinyin: nǐ mò suǒ mén， tài cū xīn le。

english: The ship was broken up for scrap metal.
chinese: 这艘船拆毁了当废铁用.
pinyin: zhè sōu chuán chāi huǐ le dàng fèi tiě yòng.

english: She gave him her heartfelt thanks.
chinese: 她向他表示衷心的感谢。
pinyin: tā xiàng tā biǎo shì zhōng xīn de gǎn xiè。

english: The monetary unit of Great Britain is the pound.
chinese: 英国的货币单位是镑.
pinyin: Yīng guó de huò bì dān wèi shì bàng.

english: The long drought famished many people.
chinese: 久旱使很多人陷入饥饿。
pinyin: jiǔ hàn shǐ hěn duō rén xiàn rù jī è。

english: You shouldn't trust anyone strange.
chinese: 你不应相信任何陌生人。
pinyin: nǐ bù yìng xiāng xìn rèn hé mò shēng rén。

english: Mother always cares about my studies.
chinese: 妈妈对我总是关怀备至。
pinyin: mā ma duì wǒ zǒng shì guān huái bèi zhì。

english: The terrorists have occupied the Embassy.
chinese: 恐怖分子占领了大使馆.
pinyin: kǒng bù fèn zǐ zhàn lǐng le dà shǐ guǎn.

english: His health collapsed under the pressure of work.
chinese: 他的身体被工作压垮了.
pinyin: tā de shēn tǐ bèi gōng zuò yà kuǎ le.

english: They took off their hats by the grave in silent salute.
chinese: 他们在墓旁脱帽默哀.
pinyin: tā men zài mù páng tuō mào mò āi.

english: He came back from the war minus a leg.
chinese: 他打仗回来, 少了一条腿.
pinyin: tā dǎ zhàng huí lai,  shào le yī tiáo tuǐ.

english: We may just as well buy a new frying pan.
chinese: 我们不妨买一只新煎锅。
pinyin: wǒ men bù fāng mǎi yī zhǐ xīn jiān guō。

english: Too much sugar will rot your teeth away.
chinese: 吃糖太多就要损坏牙齿.
pinyin: jí táng tài duō jiù yào sǔn huài yá chǐ.

english: Firm or compact in substance.
chinese: 紧密的物质上牢固的或致密的
pinyin: jǐn mì de wù zhì shàng láo gù de huò zhì mì de

english: We've taken a lease on an office building.
chinese: 我们已租了一幢办公楼。
pinyin: wǒ men yǐ zū le yī chuáng bàn gōng lóu。

english: Exercise will firm up your muscles.
chinese: 锻炼身体能使肌肉结实。
pinyin: duàn liàn shēn tǐ néng shǐ jī ròu jiē shi。

english: Money doesn't always bring happiness.
chinese: 财富并不一定带来快乐。
pinyin: cái fù bìng bù yī dìng dài lái kuài lè。

english: He put the key in the lock and turned it.
chinese: 他把钥匙插入锁里转动。
pinyin: tā bǎ yào shi chā rù suǒ lǐ zhuǎn dòng。

english: The police succeeded in quelling the riot.
chinese: 警方把暴乱镇压了下去.
pinyin: jǐng fāng bǎ bào luàn zhèn yā le xià qu.

english: I say, waiter, the soup is too salty.
chinese: 喂，服务员，这汤太咸了。
pinyin: wèi， fú wù yuán， zhè tāng tài xián le。

english: She's on attachment to the Ministry of Defense.
chinese: 她现在隶属于国防部。
pinyin: tā xiàn zài lì shǔ yú guó fáng bù。

english: The crowds concentrated round the palace.
chinese: 人群汇集在宫殿的四周。
pinyin: rén qún huì jí zài gōng diàn de sì zhōu。

english: We live in a rather rich neighbourhood.
chinese: 我们住在很富裕的住宅区.
pinyin: wǒ men zhù zài hěn fù yù de zhù zhái qū.

english: I went home along a winding mountain path.
chinese: 我沿着弯曲的山路回家。
pinyin: wǒ yán zhe wān qǔ de shān lù huí jiā。

english: He is one of the greatest minds of the age.
chinese: 他是当代最有才智的人.
pinyin: tā shì dāng dài zuì yǒu cái zhì de rén.

english: He has lived one section of miserable life.
chinese: 他过了一段悲惨的生活。
pinyin: tā guò le yī duàn bēi cǎn de shēng huó。

english: He examined each piece of evidence in isolation.
chinese: 他分别审查每一证据。
pinyin: tā fēn bié shěn chá měi yī zhèng jù。

english: He didn't reveal his identity at that time.
chinese: 那时他没暴露他的身份。
pinyin: nà shí tā mò bào lù tā de shēn fèn。

english: The roof of the building is unsound.
chinese: 这幢楼房的屋顶不牢靠。
pinyin: zhè chuáng lóu fáng de wū dǐng bù láo kào。

english: The enemy's ships blockaded the harbor.
chinese: 敌人的军舰封锁了港口。
pinyin: dí rén de jūn jiàn fēng suǒ le gǎng kǒu。

english: The cattle stampeded towards the farm.
chinese: 受惊的牛群向牧场涌去.
pinyin: shòu jīng de niú qún xiàng mù chǎng yǒng qù.

english: He happened to pass by there at that time.
chinese: 他那时恰好从那里路过。
pinyin: tā nà shí qià hǎo zòng nà li lù guò。

english: There are many ducks swimming in the lake.
chinese: 湖里有许多鸭子在游泳。
pinyin: hú lǐ yǒu xǔ duō yā zi zài yóu yǒng。

english: The graduations are marked on the side of the flask.
chinese: 烧瓶侧面有刻度标志.
pinyin: shāo píng cè miàn yǒu kè dù biāo zhì.

english: The stone struck me on the side of the head.
chinese: 石子打中了我头部的侧面.
pinyin: shí zi dǎ zhòng le wǒ tóu bù de cè miàn.

english: I enjoy an occasional night out at the theatre.
chinese: 我偶尔晚上出去看看戏.
pinyin: wǒ ǒu ěr wǎn shang chū qù kàn kan xì.

english: He lives seemingly now in this area.
chinese: 他似乎现在住在这个区域。
pinyin: tā sì hu xiàn zài zhù zài zhè gè qū yù。

english: I bought the milk retail.
chinese: 我以零售方式买来这些牛奶。
pinyin: wǒ yǐ líng shòu fāng shì mǎi lái zhè xie niú nǎi。

english: He has an open mind in this matter.
chinese: 他在这个问题上虚怀若谷。
pinyin: tā zài zhè gè wèn tí shàng xū huái ruò yù。

english: I've kept on thinking about that all the time.
chinese: 我一直惦记着这件事。
pinyin: wǒ yī zhí diàn jì zhuó zhè jiàn shì。

english: The sergeant-major ordered the men to close up.
chinese: 军士长命令士兵靠拢.
pinyin: jūn shì zhǎng mìng lìng shì bīng kào lǒng.

english: Fashion magazines are glossy.
chinese: 时装杂志看起来很有光泽。
pinyin: shí zhuāng zá zhì kàn qǐ lai hěn yǒu guāng zé。

english: The popular song rings far and near.
chinese: 这首流行歌曲到处流传。
pinyin: zhè shǒu liú xíng gē qǔ dào chù liú chuán。

english: Plants must have oxygen in order to live.
chinese: 为了存活植物必须有氧气
pinyin: wèi le cún huó zhí wù bì xū yǒu yǎng qì

english: She stared at me with unbelieving eyes.
chinese: 她以怀疑的眼光注视著我.
pinyin: tā yǐ huái yí de yǎn guāng zhù shì著 wǒ.

english: The guards are still on watch at midnight.
chinese: 看守在深夜仍在站岗。
pinyin: kān shǒu zài shēn yè réng zài zhàn gǎng。

english: Hang your coat (up) on that hook.
chinese: 把你的外衣挂在那个挂钩上.
pinyin: bǎ nǐ de wài yī guà zài nèi gè guà gōu shàng.

english: Fantastic ideas about her own superiority.
chinese: 对自己怀有奇特的优越感
pinyin: duì zì jǐ huái yǒu qí tè de yōu yuè gǎn

english: My assistant will operate the tape-recorder.
chinese: 我的助手将操纵录音机.
pinyin: wǒ de zhù shǒu jiàng cāo zòng lù yīn jī.

english: The widow and children are very poorly off.
chinese: 那寡妇和孩子们一贫如洗.
pinyin: nà guǎ fù huò hái zi men yī pín rú xǐ.

english: This proposal of yours hardly meets the case.
chinese: 你的这项提议不甚恰当.
pinyin: nǐ de zhè xiàng tí yì bù shèn qià dàng.

english: My assistant will operate the tape-recorder.
chinese: 我的助手将操纵录音机.
pinyin: wǒ de zhù shǒu jiàng cāo zòng lù yīn jī.

english: She combed the mud out of the dog's fur.
chinese: 她梳去狗的皮毛中的泥土。
pinyin: tā shū qù gǒu de pí máo zhòng dì ní tǔ。

english: The writing on the stone was very faint.
chinese: 这块石头上的字迹很模糊.
pinyin: zhè kuài shí tou shàng de zì jī hěn mó hu.

english: The papers twisted everything I said.
chinese: 报纸把我的话全都歪曲了。
pinyin: bào zhǐ bǎ wǒ de huà quán dōu wāi qū le。

english: The petals of the flowers expanded in the sunshine.
chinese: 花瓣在阳光下张开了.
pinyin: huā bàn zài yáng guāng xià zhāng kāi le.

english: The priest administered the last rites.
chinese: 神父为人举行临终圣礼。
pinyin: shén fù wèi rén jǔ xíng lín zhōng shèng lǐ。

english: The car seems to have given up the ghost.
chinese: 看来这汽车算是报销了。
pinyin: kàn lai zhè qì chē suàn shì bào xiāo le。

english: Firm or compact in substance.
chinese: 紧密的物质上牢固的或致密的
pinyin: jǐn mì de wù zhì shàng láo gù de huò zhì mì de

english: Most learned men are modest.
chinese: 大部分有学问的人都很谦虚。
pinyin: dà bù fen yǒu xué wèn de rén dōu hěn qiān xū。

english: You may hang your coat on the hook.
chinese: 你可以把外套挂在钩子上。
pinyin: nǐ kě yǐ bǎ wài tào guà zài gōu zi shàng。

english: He has a strong animosity against his enemy.
chinese: 他对敌人有强烈的仇恨。
pinyin: tā duì dí rén yǒu qiáng liè de chóu hèn。

english: All the workers get free medical care.
chinese: 所有工人都有公费医疗。
pinyin: suǒ yǒu gōng rén dōu yǒu gōng fèi yī liáo。

english: The general was girded with the supreme power.
chinese: 将军被授予最高权力。
pinyin: jiāng jūn bèi shòu yǔ zuì gāo quán lì。

english: North magnetic poles repel (each other).
chinese: 磁北极与磁北极互相排斥.
pinyin: cí běi jí yù cí běi jí hù xiāng pái chì.

english: Go to the cupboard and get down the jam.
chinese: 到柜子那儿把果酱取下来。
pinyin: dào guì zi nà r bǎ guǒ jiàng qǔ xia lai。

english: I watched her as she combed her hair.
chinese: 她梳头的时候我一直看著她。
pinyin: tā shū tou de shí hou wǒ yī zhí kàn著 tā。

english: His brow corrugated with the effort of thinking.
chinese: 他皱著眉头用心地思考.
pinyin: tā zhòu著 méi tóu yòng xīn de sī kǎo.

english: Human tissue is made up of cells.
chinese: 人体的组织是由细胞构成的.
pinyin: rén tǐ de zǔ zhī shì yóu xì bāo gòu chéng de.

english: Shares are selling at a premium.
chinese: 股票按超出票面价值出售。
pinyin: gǔ piào àn chāo chū piào miàn jià zhí chū shòu。

english: The Congress decided to repeal the law.
chinese: 议会决定废除那项法令。
pinyin: yì huì jué dìng fèi chú nà xiàng fǎ lìng。

english: He is very modest and open to advice.
chinese: 他很谦虚, 乐于接受意见。
pinyin: tā hěn qiān xū,  yuè yú jiē shòu yì jiàn。

english: She is still pressing her claim for compensation.
chinese: 她仍然坚持要求赔偿.
pinyin: tā réng rán jiān chí yāo qiú péi cháng.

english: She was scalded when the boiler exploded.
chinese: 锅炉爆炸时她被烫伤了。
pinyin: guō lú bào zhà shí tā bèi tàng shāng le。

english: The firework exploded in a shower of sparks.
chinese: 烟火炸开放出一阵火花.
pinyin: yān huǒ zhà kāi fàng chū yī zhèn huǒ huā.

english: He received a stern rebuke from his superior.
chinese: 他受到上司的严厉斥责。
pinyin: tā shòu dào shàng si de yán lì chì zé。

english: The publishing house infringed his copyright.
chinese: 出版社侵犯了他的版权。
pinyin: chū bǎn shè qīn fàn le tā de bǎn quán。

english: The wall declined slightly on account of the earthquake.
chinese: 墙壁因地震而倾斜。
pinyin: qiáng bì yīn dì zhèn ér qīng xié。

english: Hang your coat (up) on that hook.
chinese: 把你的外衣挂在那个挂钩上.
pinyin: bǎ nǐ de wài yī guà zài nèi gè guà gōu shàng.

english: The bureaucracy has become ossified.
chinese: 官僚主义已变得僵化了。
pinyin: guān liáo zhǔ yì yǐ biàn de jiāng huà le。

english: We were obligated to attend the opening ceremony.
chinese: 我们有必要参加开幕式.
pinyin: wǒ men yǒu bì yào cān jiā kāi mù shì.

english: Fish were surfacing to catch insects.
chinese: 鱼浮到水面上捕捉昆虫。
pinyin: yú fú dào shuǐ miàn shàng bǔ zhuō kūn chóng。

english: The graduations are marked on the side of the flask.
chinese: 烧瓶侧面有刻度标志.
pinyin: shāo píng cè miàn yǒu kè dù biāo zhì.

english: An umbrella will protect you from the rain.
chinese: 雨伞可以保护你不致雨淋。
pinyin: yǔ sǎn kě yǐ bǎo hù nǐ bù zhì yǔ lìn。

english: He was composing at the piano at the age of seven.
chinese: 他7岁时就会钢琴作曲。
pinyin: tā7 suì shí jiù kuài gāng qín zuò qǔ。

english: Recite the poem (right) from the (very) beginning.
chinese: 从头开始背诵这首诗.
pinyin: cóng tóu kāi shǐ bèi sòng zhè shǒu shī.

english: Don't betray the people's trust in you.
chinese: 不要辜负人民对你的信任。
pinyin: bù yào gū fù rén mín duì nǐ de xìn rèn。

english: She put some noodles in the aluminum saucepan.
chinese: 她在铝锅里下了些面条。
pinyin: tā zài lu:3 guō lǐ xià le xiē miàn tiáo。

english: The new housing estate borders on the motorway.
chinese: 新住宅区紧接高速公路.
pinyin: xīn zhù zhái qū jǐn jiē gāo sù gōng lù.

english: Some insects deposit their eggs on the ground.
chinese: 有些昆虫把卵产在地上.
pinyin: yǒu xiē kūn chóng bǎ luǎn chǎn zài dì shang.

english: We need to bring up more tanks.
chinese: 我们需要多调些坦克到前线.
pinyin: wǒ men xū yào duō tiáo xiē tǎn kè dào qián xiàn.

english: A small body or accumulation of ore.
chinese: 矿坑小矿体或矿石的堆积
pinyin: kuàng kēng xiǎo kuàng tǐ huò kuàng shí de duī jī

english: The distribution of the magazine is 2000.
chinese: 该杂志的销售量为2000份。
pinyin: gāi zá zhì de xiāo shòu liàng wèí000 fèn。

english: It has beyond the competence of the court.
chinese: 它已经超出法院的权限。
pinyin: tā yǐ jīng chāo chū fǎ yuàn de quán xiàn。

english: Too much sunbathing will wrinkle your skin.
chinese: 皮肤晒得过分就能起皱纹.
pinyin: pí fū shài de guò fèn jiù néng qǐ zhòu wén.

english: The stage was designed to imitate a prison cell.
chinese: 舞台设计成牢房的样子.
pinyin: wǔ tái shè jì chéng láo fáng de yàng zi.

english: Buffers absorbed most of the shock.
chinese: 缓冲器使震动减少了许多.
pinyin: huǎn chōng qì shǐ zhèn dòng jiǎn shǎo le xǔ duō.

english: He has a strong animosity against his enemy.
chinese: 他对敌人有强烈的仇恨。
pinyin: tā duì dí rén yǒu qiáng liè de chóu hèn。

english: Steam condenses into water when cooling down.
chinese: 蒸汽冷却时凝结成水。
pinyin: zhēng qì lěng què shí níng jié chéng shuǐ。

english: His success was achieved by hard work.
chinese: 他靠辛勤劳动而获得成功.
pinyin: tā kào xīn qín láo dòng ér huò dé chéng gōng.

english: That football team is our ally.
chinese: 那个足球队是我们的同盟者。
pinyin: nèi gè zú qiú duì shì wǒ men de tóng méng zhě。

english: A formal beginning or introduction.
chinese: 开幕，揭幕正式开始或引进
pinyin: kāi mù， jiē mù zhèng shì kāi shǐ huò yǐn jìn

english: He was inclined to give them a free hand.
chinese: 他倾向于放手让他们干。
pinyin: tā qīng xiàng yú fàng shǒu ràng tā men gàn。

english: There's a saucepan boiling away on the stove.
chinese: 炉子上锅里的水一直开著.
pinyin: lú zi shàng guō lǐ de shuǐ yī zhí kāi著.

english: Volumes of black smoke poured fromthe chimney.
chinese: 烟囱里冒出来团团黑烟.
pinyin: yān cōng lǐ mào chū lai tuán tuán hēi yān.

english: A teacher should not give students corporal punishment.
chinese: 老师不应该体罚学生。
pinyin: lǎo shī bù yīng gāi tǐ fá xué sheng。

english: Her eyes twinkled with mischief.
chinese: 她眼睛里闪烁著调皮的光辉.
pinyin: tā yǎn jīng lǐ shǎn shuò著 tiáo pí de guāng huī.

english: You shouldn't arrest him without warrant.
chinese: 你不能毫无根据地逮捕他。
pinyin: nǐ bù néng háo wú gēn jù dì dài bǔ tā。

english: Please hook the rope over the nail.
chinese: 请把绳子挂在那根钉子上。
pinyin: qǐng bǎ shéng zi guà zài nà gēn dīng zi shàng。

english: Her eyes twinkled with mischief.
chinese: 她眼睛里闪烁著调皮的光辉.
pinyin: tā yǎn jīng lǐ shǎn shuò著 tiáo pí de guāng huī.

english: I got lost in the strange city.
chinese: 我在这座陌生的城市迷路了。
pinyin: wǒ zài zhè zuò mò shēng de chéng shì mí lù le。

english: Late frosts are ruination for the garden.
chinese: 晚霜能冻死园中的植物。
pinyin: wǎn shuāng néng dòng sǐ yuán zhòng dì zhí wù。

english: He'll use any trick in the book to stop you.
chinese: 他一定千方百计阻止你.
pinyin: tā yī dìng qiān fāng bǎi jì zǔ zhǐ nǐ.

english: The invader laid towns and villages in ruins.
chinese: 入侵者把村镇变为废墟。
pinyin: rù qīn zhě bǎ cūn zhèn biàn wèi fèi xū。

english: Space exploration is still in its infancy.
chinese: 宇宙探索仍处于初级阶段
pinyin: yǔ zhòu tàn suǒ réng chǔ yú chū jí jiē duàn

english: The rascal lives on the credulity of the people.
chinese: 那个流氓靠行骗为生。
pinyin: nèi gè liú máng kào xìng piàn wéi shēng。

english: Some people grind their teeth while they are asleep.
chinese: 有些人睡觉时磨牙齿。
pinyin: yǒu xiē rén shuì jiào shí mò yá chǐ。

english: The blind man was seen cross the street.
chinese: 有人看见那瞎子横过街道。
pinyin: yǒu rén kàn jiàn nà xiā zi héng guò jiē dào。

english: My heartfelt thanks to you all.
chinese: 我谨向各位表示衷心的感谢.
pinyin: wǒ jǐn xiàng gè wèi biǎo shì zhōng xīn de gǎn xiè.

english: His father bequeathed him a fortune.
chinese: 他父亲给他留下了一笔遗产。
pinyin: tā fù qīn jǐ tā liú xià le yī bǐ yí chǎn。

english: God, especially in Islam.
chinese: 阿拉上帝，尤指伊斯兰教上帝
pinyin: ē lā shàng dì， yóu zhǐ yī sī lán jiào shàng dì

english: She joined the university art society.
chinese: 她加入了大学里的艺术协会。
pinyin: tā jiā rù le dà xué lǐ de yì shù xié huì。

english: She is not so kind as simple.
chinese: 与其说她善良不如说她单纯。
pinyin: yǔ qí shuō tā shàn liáng bù rú shuō tā dān chún。

english: He rose his head and stared at the firmament.
chinese: 他抬起头，凝望着天空。
pinyin: tā tái qǐ tou， níng wàng zhuó tiān kōng。

english: I feel very lonely without my dog.
chinese: 我的狗不在旁边我就很寂寞。
pinyin: wǒ de gǒu bù zài páng biān wǒ jiù hěn jì mò。

english: I appreciate his poetic utterances.
chinese: 我欣赏他那富有诗意的话语。
pinyin: wǒ xīn shǎng tā nà fù yǒu shī yì de huà yù。

english: The flood did a lot of damage to the crops.
chinese: 洪水毁坏了大量农作物。
pinyin: hóng shuǐ huǐ huài le dà liàng nóng zuò wù。

english: The strikers paraded through the city centre.
chinese: 罢工者游行通过市中心.
pinyin: bà gōng zhě yóu xíng tōng guò shì zhōng xīn.

english: The high street is a blaze of lights in the evening.
chinese: 晚上大街上灯火辉煌.
pinyin: wǎn shang dà jiē shàng dēng huǒ huī huáng.

english: Smoke puffed from the chimney.
chinese: 烟从烟囱里一股一股地喷出来.
pinyin: yān zòng yān cōng lǐ yī gǔ yī gǔ de pèn chū lái.

english: The sun shine bright in the beautiful city.
chinese: 太阳照耀着美丽的城市。
pinyin: tài yáng zhào yào zhuó měi lì de chéng shì。

english: Too much sunbathing will wrinkle your skin.
chinese: 皮肤晒得过分就能起皱纹.
pinyin: pí fū shài de guò fèn jiù néng qǐ zhòu wén.

english: Many of the new taxes are controversial.
chinese: 许多新税收都是有争议的。
pinyin: xǔ duō xīn shuì shōu dōu shì yǒu zhēng yì de。

english: She did it for sentimental reasons.
chinese: 她出于情感的缘故做了此事。
pinyin: tā chū yú qíng gǎn de yuán gù zuò le cǐ shì。

english: It's my devout hope that he will not come back.
chinese: 我衷心希望他不会回来。
pinyin: wǒ zhōng xīn xī wàng tā bù huì huí lai。

english: Caution is the essence of that man's character.
chinese: 谨慎是那人性格的本质。
pinyin: jǐn shèn shì nà rén xìng gé de běn zhì。

english: They planned the defence of the town.
chinese: 他们订出了该城的防御计划.
pinyin: tā men dìng chū le gāi chéng de fáng yù jì huà.

english: He was appointed ambassador to the United States.
chinese: 他被任命为驻美国大使。
pinyin: tā bèi rèn mìng wèi zhù Měi guó dà shǐ。

english: This goose is much larger than the duck.
chinese: 这只母鹅比那只鸭子大多了。
pinyin: zhè zhǐ mǔ é bì nà zhǐ yā zi dà duō le。

english: School will close early next month.
chinese: 学校下个月上旬开始放假。
pinyin: xué xiào xià gè yuè shàng xún kāi shǐ fàng jià。

english: The dam burst under the weight of water.
chinese: 那水坝在水的压力下决口了.
pinyin: nà shuǐ bà zài shuǐ de yā lì xià jué kǒu le.

english: She was glad to be relieved of this burden.
chinese: 她很高兴去掉了这个包袱。
pinyin: tā hěn gāo xìng qù diào le zhè gè bāo fu。

english: We have debts totaling 5000 dollars.
chinese: 我们的债务总计为五千美元。
pinyin: wǒ men de zhài wù zǒng jì wèi wǔ qiān měi yuán。

english: The wasteland of the north is scarcely populated.
chinese: 北方的大荒原地广人稀。
pinyin: běi fāng de dà huāng yuán de guǎng rén xī。

english: She put the grapes onto the platter.
chinese: 她把葡萄放到一个大盘子上。
pinyin: tā bǎ pú tao fàng dào yī gè dà pán zi shàng。

english: He gave the poor donkey a terrible lashing.
chinese: 他狠命地抽打那头可怜的驴.
pinyin: tā hěn mìng de chōu dǎ nà tou kě lián de lu:2.

english: I can just scrape along on what my parents give me.
chinese: 我靠父母扶养勉强过活.
pinyin: wǒ kào fù mǔ fú yǎng miǎn qiǎng guò huó.

english: She swallowed her anger and carried on.
chinese: 她忍气吞声地继续进行下去。
pinyin: tā rěn qì tūn shēng de jì xù jìn xíng xià qu。

english: There is a fine layer of dust on the desk.
chinese: 桌子上有一层薄薄的尘土。
pinyin: zhuō zi shàng yǒu yī céng bò bò de chén tǔ。

english: Physical disability causes mental anguish.
chinese: 生理伤残会引起心理苦闷.
pinyin: shēng lǐ shāng cán kuài yǐn qǐ xīn lǐ kǔ mèn.

english: He struck the table a heavy blow with his fist.
chinese: 他用拳头猛击了一下桌子.
pinyin: tā yòng quán tou měng jī le yī xià zhuō zi.

english: The ship was sunk by an enemy torpedo.
chinese: 这艘船被敌人的鱼雷击沉了。
pinyin: zhè sōu chuán bèi dí rén de yú léi jī chén le。

english: The machine rests on a bed of concrete.
chinese: 机器安装在混凝土基座上.
pinyin: jī qì ān zhuāng zài hùn níng tǔ jī zuò shàng.

english: The dampness of the climate decayed the books.
chinese: 气候潮湿，把书都霉坏了。
pinyin: qì hòu cháo shī， bǎ shū dōu méi huài le。

english: The treatment arrested the growth of the disease.
chinese: 治疗抑制了病情的发展。
pinyin: zhì liáo yì zhì le bìng qíng de fā zhǎn。

english: How pure, how dear their dwelling-place.
chinese: 指明它的来处纯洁而珍贵。
pinyin: zhǐ míng tā de lái chù chún jié ér zhēn guì。

english: The troop ship was escorted by two warships.
chinese: 运兵船由两艘军舰护航。
pinyin: yùn bīng chuán yóu liǎng sōu jūn jiàn hù háng。

english: Young plants are often killed by frost.
chinese: 植物的幼苗常因严寒而冻死.
pinyin: zhí wù de yòu miáo cháng yīn yán hán ér dòng sǐ.

english: He bargained with them for the property.
chinese: 他就财产与他们进行商议。
pinyin: tā jiù cái chǎn yù tā men jìn xíng shāng yì。

english: The stick had been weighted with lead.
chinese: 这条棍子灌了铅增加了分量.
pinyin: zhè tiáo gùn zi guàn le qiān zēng jiā le fèn liàng.

english: Many languages have Latin as their base.
chinese: 许多语言都以拉丁语为基础。
pinyin: xǔ duō yǔ yán dōu yǐ Lā dīng yǔ wèi jī chǔ。

english: She looked ready to collapse at any minute.
chinese: 她看样子随时都可能垮下来.
pinyin: tā kàn yàng zi suí shí dōu kě néng kuǎ xia lai.

english: Miracles are contrary to nature.
chinese: 奇迹是与大自然的力量相对的.
pinyin: qí jì shì yù dà zì rán de lì liang xiāng duì de.

english: Don't stay too long at the snack bar.
chinese: 别在快餐馆耽误太长时间。
pinyin: biè zài kuài cān guǎn dān wu tài cháng shí jiān。

english: It is a great folly to try to persuade him.
chinese: 试图说服他未免太愚蠢了。
pinyin: shì tú shuō fú tā wèi miǎn tài yú chǔn le。

english: Young as he was, he was prudent.
chinese: 他虽然如此年轻，却很慎重。
pinyin: tā suī rán rú cǐ nián qīng， què hěn shèn zhòng。

english: Fresh plaster will fix in a few hours.
chinese: 新抹的泥灰在几个小时内能干
pinyin: xīn mò de nì huī zài jǐ ge xiǎo shí nèi néng gàn

english: He cut off a bunch of grapes to entertain us.
chinese: 他剪下一串葡萄招待我们。
pinyin: tā jiǎn xià yī chuàn pú tao zhāo dài wǒ men。

english: The sway of the ferry made him feel sick.
chinese: 渡船摇摇晃晃, 他感到恶心.
pinyin: dù chuán yáo yáo huàng huàng,  tā gǎn dào è xīn.

english: A disorderly demonstration will take place.
chinese: 一场示威游行将要发生。
pinyin: yī chǎng shì wēi yóu xíng jiāng yào fā shēng。

english: The horse took a fright at the sound of the explosion.
chinese: 马听到爆炸声受了惊。
pinyin: mǎ tīng dào bào zhà shēng shòu le jīng。

english: A climber needs secure footholds.
chinese: 攀登的人脚踩的地方要很牢固.
pinyin: pān dēng de rén jué cǎi de dì fang yào hěn láo gù.

english: I'm tired of your unending complaints.
chinese: 我厌倦了你那没完没了的牢骚.
pinyin: wǒ yàn juàn le nǐ nà mò wán mò le de láo sāo.

english: You must employ someone to oversee the project.
chinese: 你得雇个人监督这一工程.
pinyin: nǐ de gù gè rén jiān dū zhè yī gōng chéng.

english: A lighthouse was flashing in the distance.
chinese: 灯塔在远处发出闪烁的光.
pinyin: dēng tǎ zài yuǎn chù fā chū shǎn shuò de guāng.

english: The enemy brushed aside our defences.
chinese: 敌人冲破了我们的防御工事。
pinyin: dí rén chōng pò le wǒ men de fáng yù gōng shì。

english: Liberation brought security to us.
chinese: 解放使我们的生活有了保障。
pinyin: jiě fàng shǐ wǒ men de shēng huó yǒu le bǎo zhàng。

english: The search party spread out over the moor.
chinese: 搜索队在荒草地分散行动.
pinyin: sōu suǒ duì zài huāng cǎo dì fēn sàn xíng dòng.

english: The government intends to cut expenditure on arms.
chinese: 政府打算削减军备开支。
pinyin: zhèng fǔ dǎ suàn xuē jiǎn jūn bèi kāi zhī。

english: His peremptory tone irritated everybody.
chinese: 他那专横的口气激怒了大家。
pinyin: tā nà zhuān hèng de kǒu qì jī nù le dà jiā。

english: Our tanks have breached the enemy defences.
chinese: 我方坦克突破了敌人的防线.
pinyin: wǒ fāng tǎn kè tū pò le dí rén de fáng xiàn.

english: A feeble attempt is liable to fail.
chinese: 愚蠢的尝试多半是要失败的。
pinyin: yú chǔn de cháng shì duō bàn shì yào shī bài de。

english: He married a girl of extraordinary beauty.
chinese: 他娶了一位非常美丽的姑娘。
pinyin: tā qǔ le yī wèi fēi cháng měi lì de gū niang。

english: There are many children in the kindergarten.
chinese: 那个幼儿园里的孩子很多。
pinyin: nèi gè yòu ér yuán lǐ de hái zi hěn duō。

english: They have some sterling silver cutlery.
chinese: 他们有一些标准纯银餐具。
pinyin: tā men yǒu yī xiē biāo zhǔn chún yín cān jù。

english: The villagers knew about the scandal.
chinese: 村子里的居民知道这件丑事。
pinyin: cūn zi lǐ de jū mín zhī dào zhè jiàn chǒu shì。

english: She prescribed some pills to help me to sleep.
chinese: 她让我吃些药片以利睡眠.
pinyin: tā ràng wǒ jí xiē yào piàn yǐ lì shuì mián.

english: I will give you a pound in part payment.
chinese: 我会给你一磅作为先付部分。
pinyin: wǒ kuài jǐ nǐ yī bàng zuò wéi xiān fù bù fen。

english: Our tanks have breached the enemy defences.
chinese: 我方坦克突破了敌人的防线.
pinyin: wǒ fāng tǎn kè tū pò le dí rén de fáng xiàn.

english: The enemy attacked our wagon train.
chinese: 敌人袭击了我们的运货马车队。
pinyin: dí rén xí jī le wǒ men de yùn huò mǎ chē duì。

english: One can not identify happiness with wealth.
chinese: 幸福和财富不能混为一谈。
pinyin: xìng fú huò cái fù bù néng hùn wèi yī tán。

english: These pills will relax you and make you sleep.
chinese: 这些药丸有镇静催眠作用.
pinyin: zhè xie yào wán yǒu zhèn jìng cuī mián zuò yòng.

english: We are well served with gas in this town.
chinese: 这个城镇煤气供应得很好。
pinyin: zhè gè chéng zhèn méi qì gōng yìng de hěn hào。

english: Bind the rope fast lest it should come loose.
chinese: 把绳子绑牢，免得它松脱。
pinyin: bǎ shéng zi bǎng láo， miǎn de tā sōng tuō。

english: The car careered off the road into a ditch.
chinese: 汽车冲出路面，陷进沟里。
pinyin: qì chē chòng chū lù miàn， xiàn jìn gōu lǐ。

english: I was off work because of a sore throat.
chinese: 我因为喉咙痛没有去上班。
pinyin: wǒ yīn wèi hóu lóng tòng méi yǒu qù shàng bān。

english: We begin to plumb the mysteries of the universe.
chinese: 我们开始探索宇宙的奥秘。
pinyin: wǒ men kāi shǐ tàn suǒ yǔ zhòu de ào mì。

english: Two scenes were cut by the censor.
chinese: 有两个镜头被审查员剪掉了.
pinyin: yǒu liǎng gè jìng tóu bèi shěn chá yuán jiǎn diào le.

english: Thanks to I had tied then the safety belt.
chinese: 幸亏我当时系上了安全带。
pinyin: xìng kuī wǒ dāng shí xì shàng le ān quán dài。

english: The boy evinces great intelligence.
chinese: 这个男孩表现出很高的智慧。
pinyin: zhè gè nán hái biǎo xiàn chū hěn gāo de zhì huì。

english: Don't drop the peaches they bruise easily.
chinese: 桃儿容易碰伤--要轻拿轻放.
pinyin: táo er róng yì pèng shāng-- yào qīng ná qīng fàng.

english: The stick had been weighted with lead.
chinese: 这条棍子灌了铅增加了分量.
pinyin: zhè tiáo gùn zi guàn le qiān zēng jiā le fèn liàng.

english: An explosive mixture, such as gunpowder.
chinese: 火药易爆炸的混合物，如弹药
pinyin: huǒ yào yì bào zhà de hùn hé wù， rú dàn yào

english: He was irritated by their perpetual complaints.
chinese: 他们一再发牢骚把他惹火了.
pinyin: tā men yī zài fà láo sāo bǎ tā rě huǒ le.

english: Her eyes took on a hurt expression.
chinese: 她的眼里流露出受委屈的神情.
pinyin: tā de yǎn lǐ liú lù chū shòu wěi qū de shén qíng.

english: The gauze patch applied to his wound is dirty.
chinese: 裹在他伤口上的纱布脏了。
pinyin: guǒ zài tā shāng kǒu shàng de shā bù zàng le。

english: The police have compiled a list of suspects.
chinese: 警方已编制了涉嫌者名单.
pinyin: jǐng fāng yǐ biān zhì le shè xián zhě míng dān.

english: Many representatives of the older generation were there.
chinese: 老一辈的各类人都在那里.
pinyin: lǎo yī bèi de gè lèi rén dōu zài nà li.

english: It's wise to register letters containing banknotes.
chinese: 信中夹钞票最好寄挂号.
pinyin: xìn zhòng jiá chāo piào zuì hǎo jì guà hào.

english: We admired the splendor of the mountain scenery.
chinese: 我们赞赏着壮丽的山景。
pinyin: wǒ men zàn shǎng zhuó zhuàng lì de shān jǐng。

english: The riot led to the arrest of three young men.
chinese: 暴乱导致3 个年轻人被捕。
pinyin: bào luàn dǎo zhì3  gè nián qīng rén bèi bǔ。

english: She went to the telegraph office in a hurry.
chinese: 她匆匆忙忙向电报局去了。
pinyin: tā cōng cōng máng máng xiàng diàn bào jú qù le。

english: Suddenly he sat down on the ice.
chinese: 他突然在冰上摔了个屁股蹲儿。
pinyin: tā tū rán zài bīng shàng shuāi le gè pì gu dūn er。

english: Wring the water out of your wet bathing costume.
chinese: 把你的游泳衣里的水拧出去.
pinyin: bǎ nǐ de yóu yǒng yì lǐ de shuǐ nìng chū qù.

english: He will report back here as soon as he arrives.
chinese: 他一到就会来这里汇报的。
pinyin: tā yī dào jiù kuài lái zhè lǐ huì bào de。

english: There is very little profit in selling newspapers at present.
chinese: 现在卖报纸利润很少。
pinyin: xiàn zài mài bào zhǐ lì rùn hěn shǎo。

english: Each row of tiles laps the one below.
chinese: 每一排瓦都搭在下面的一排上.
pinyin: měi yī pǎi wǎ dōu dā zài xià miàn de yī pái shàng.

english: Few of the early manuscripts have been preserved.
chinese: 早期的手稿保存下来的不多.
pinyin: zǎo qī de shǒu gǎo bǎo cún xia lai de bù duō.

english: Though very intelligent, she is nevertheless rather modest.
chinese: 她很聪明, 倒也很谦虚.
pinyin: tā hěn cōng míng,  dào yě hěn qiān xū.

english: These curtains won't match your carpet.
chinese: 这窗帘和你那块地毯不相配.
pinyin: zhè chuāng lián huò nǐ nà kuài dì tǎn bù xiāng pèi.

english: This word denotes a certain kind of animal.
chinese: 这个词是一种野兽的名称。
pinyin: zhè gè cí shì yī zhòng yě shòu de míng chēng。

english: A formal assertion of validity.
chinese: 确定，鉴定对效力的正式断言
pinyin: què dìng， jiàn dìng duì xiào lì de zhèng shì duàn yán

english: The whale thrashed the water with its tail.
chinese: 那条鲸鱼不住地用尾巴击水.
pinyin: nà tiáo jīng yú bú zhù de yòng wěi ba jī shuǐ.

english: This transaction is nothing less than a miracle.
chinese: 这笔交易完全是一个奇迹。
pinyin: zhè bǐ jiāo yì wán quán shì yī gè qí jì。

english: My wife has a whim of iron.
chinese: 我老婆有一般铁一般的任性脾气。
pinyin: wǒ lǎo pó yǒu yì bān tiě yì bān de rèn xìng pí qì。

english: At the age of sixty he took up the study of Russian.
chinese: 六十岁时, 他开始学俄语。
pinyin: liù shí suì shí,  tā kāi shǐ xué é yǔ。

english: My friend is farming in Wales.
chinese: 我的朋友在威尔士的农场种地。
pinyin: wǒ de péng you zài wēi ěr shì de nóng chǎng zhòng dì。

english: He tasted the soup to see if he had put enough salt in it.
chinese: 他尝尝汤, 看是否够咸.
pinyin: tā cháng cháng tāng,  kàn shì fǒu gòu xián.

english: The patient's condition worsened during the night.
chinese: 病人的情况在夜间恶化了.
pinyin: bìng rén de qíng kuàng zài yè jiān è huà le.

english: This transaction is nothing less than a miracle.
chinese: 这笔交易完全是一个奇迹。
pinyin: zhè bǐ jiāo yì wán quán shì yī gè qí jì。

english: A diadem was worn as sign of royal power.
chinese: 戴着的皇冠是王权的象征。
pinyin: dài zhuó de huáng guān shì wáng quán de xiàng zhēng。

english: His hasty temper made him offensive.
chinese: 他的急躁的脾气使他令人讨厌。
pinyin: tā de jí zào de pí qì shǐ tā lìng rén tǎo yàn。

english: The astronauts have special breathing apparatus.
chinese: 宇航员有特殊的呼吸装置。
pinyin: yǔ háng yuán yǒu tè shū de hū xī zhuāng zhì。

english: The cigarette burnt a hole in the carpet.
chinese: 香烟在地毯上烧了一个窟窿.
pinyin: xiāng yān zài dì tǎn shàng shāo le yī gè kū long.

english: My wife has a whim of iron.
chinese: 我老婆有一般铁一般的任性脾气。
pinyin: wǒ lǎo pó yǒu yì bān tiě yì bān de rèn xìng pí qì。

english: The water soon evaporated in the sunshine.
chinese: 水在阳光下不久就蒸发了。
pinyin: shuǐ zài yáng guāng xià bù jiǔ jiù zhēng fā le。

english: A cloud is a condensation of water vapour.
chinese: 云是由水蒸汽凝缩而成的。
pinyin: yún shì yóu shuǐ zhēng qì níng suō ér chéng de。

english: The equipment of the photographic studio was expensive.
chinese: 装备摄影室的开支很大.
pinyin: zhuāng bèi shè yǐng shì de kāi zhī hěn dà.

english: The supermarket sells goods of all descriptions.
chinese: 超级市场销售各种货物。
pinyin: chāo jí shì chǎng xiāo shòu gè zhǒng huò wù。

english: Nobody can prevent him from running the risk.
chinese: 没有人能够阻止他去冒险。
pinyin: méi yǒu rén néng gòu zǔ zhǐ tā qù mào xiǎn。

english: I would like some temperance drinks.
chinese: 我想要一些没有酒精的饮料。
pinyin: wǒ xiǎng yào yī xiē méi yǒu jiǔ jīng de yǐn liào。

english: His representation influenced them to investigate.
chinese: 他的陈述促使他们去调查。
pinyin: tā de chén shù cù shǐ tā men qù diào chá。

english: He screwed the others out of their share of the money.
chinese: 他侵吞了其他人应得的钱。
pinyin: tā qīn tūn le qí tā rén yīng dé de qián。

english: He switched on the light and plumped up the cushions.
chinese: 他打开了灯，拍松了靠垫。
pinyin: tā dǎ kāi le dēng， pāi sōng le kào diàn。

english: I would rather die than live in disgrace.
chinese: 我宁可死，也不愿忍辱偷生。
pinyin: wǒ nìng kě sǐ， yě bù yuàn rěn rǔ tōu shēng。

english: I'm no sailor and I couldn't wait to reach dry land.
chinese: 我晕船, 恨不得立刻上岸.
pinyin: wǒ yùn chuán,  hèn bù dé lì kè shàng àn.

english: Your sorrow will wear off in time.
chinese: 日子久了, 你的悲哀是会消失的。
pinyin: rì zi jiǔ le,  nǐ de bēi āi shì kuài xiāo shī de。

english: Please guard against pickpockets on the bus.
chinese: 在公共汽车上要谨防扒手。
pinyin: zài gōng gòng qì chē shàng yào jǐn fáng pá shǒu。

english: I will visit you around Christmas.
chinese: 我将在圣诞节前后去拜访你。
pinyin: wǒ jiàng zài Shèng dàn jié qián hòu qù bài fǎng nǐ。

english: France was once a colonial power.
chinese: 法国一度是占有殖民地的强国.
pinyin: fǎ guó yī dù shì zhàn yǒu zhí mín dì de qiáng guó.

english: The police scuffled with the demonstrators.
chinese: 警察和示威群众混战起来。
pinyin: jǐng chá huò shì wēi qún zhòng hùn zhàn qǐ lai。

english: She painted the window sills a bright colour.
chinese: 她把窗台漆上鲜艳的颜色。
pinyin: tā bǎ chuāng tái qī shàng xiān yàn de yán sè。

english: The holed tanker was disgorging oil.
chinese: 撞了个窟窿的油船正在喷油。
pinyin: zhuàng le gè kū long de yóu chuán zhèng zài pèn yóu。

english: The dismissals led to a strike.
chinese: 雇主解雇工人导致了罢工事件。
pinyin: gù zhǔ jiě gù gōng rén dǎo zhì le bà gōng shì jiàn。

english: A crowd soon gathered round him.
chinese: 一群人很快便聚集在他的周围。
pinyin: yī qún rén hěn kuài pián jù jí zài tā de zhōu wéi。

english: He looked at his children with evident pride.
chinese: 他看著自己的孩子, 充满自豪.
pinyin: tā kàn著 zì jǐ de hái zi,  chōng mǎn zì háo.

english: He intends to transfer the property to his son.
chinese: 他打算把财产转让给儿子。
pinyin: tā dǎ suàn bǎ cái chǎn zhuǎn ràng jǐ ér zi。

english: Cooking smells wafted along the hall.
chinese: 做饭的味道顺着走廊飘过来。
pinyin: zuò fàn de wèi dao shùn zhuó zǒu láng piāo guò lai。

english: Peter applied for British citizenship last year.
chinese: 彼得去年申请了英国国籍。
pinyin: Bǐ dé qù nián shēn qǐng le Yīng guó guó jí。

english: Most of the province is as flat as a pancake.
chinese: 那省的大部分地区地势平坦。
pinyin: nà xǐng de dà bù fen dì qū dì shì píng tǎn。

english: The river had burst its banks and flooded the valley.
chinese: 河水冲破堤岸, 淹没了山谷.
pinyin: hé shuǐ chōng pò dī àn,  yān mò le shān gǔ.

english: She found a lot of dust underneath the carpet.
chinese: 她发觉地毯下面有许多尘土.
pinyin: tā fā jué dì tǎn xià mian yǒu xǔ duō chén tǔ.

english: I suspect, nay, I am certain, that he is wrong.
chinese: 我怀疑，不，我肯定他错了。
pinyin: wǒ huái yí， bù， wǒ kěn dìng tā cuò le。

english: A section or piece of such a tube.
chinese: 截导管这种管子的一部分或一段
pinyin: jié dǎo guǎn zhè zhǒng guǎn zi de yī bù fen huò yī duàn

english: They raised their fists in salute to their leader.
chinese: 他们举起拳头向领袖致敬.
pinyin: tā men jǔ qǐ quán tou xiàng lǐng xiù zhì jìng.

english: Looking farther forward to the end of the century...
chinese: 再向前展望到本世纪末....
pinyin: zài xiàng qián zhǎn wàng dào běn shì jì mò....

english: These pillars carry the weight of the roof.
chinese: 这些柱子支撑著屋顶的重量.
pinyin: zhè xie zhù zi zhī chēng著 wū dǐng de zhòng liàng.

english: Complications set in, and the patient died.
chinese: 病人因出现并发症而死亡。
pinyin: bìng rén yīn chū xiàn bìng fā zhèng ér sǐ wáng。

english: Sound waves are measured by their amplitude.
chinese: 声波是根据其振幅来测量的.
pinyin: shēng bō shì gēn jù qí zhèn fú lái cè liàng de.

english: This liquid gels faster in cold weather.
chinese: 这种液体天冷时凝结得快些.
pinyin: zhè zhǒng yè tǐ tiān lěng shí níng jié de kuài xiē.

english: Having a luster resembling that of pearls.
chinese: 珠母般的具有珍珠般的光泽的
pinyin: zhū mǔ bān de jù yǒu zhēn zhū bān de guāng zé de

english: Animal dung may be used as manure.
chinese: 动物的粪便可以作为肥料使用。
pinyin: dòng wù de fèn biàn kě yǐ zuò wéi féi liào shǐ yòng。

english: The car is whizzing along the motorway.
chinese: 那车在高速公路上飞速行驶。
pinyin: nà jū zài gāo sù gōng lù shàng fēi sù xíng shǐ。

english: In England traffic must keep to the left.
chinese: 在英国，车辆必须靠左行驶。
pinyin: zài Yīng guó， chē liàng bì xū kào zuǒ xíng shǐ。

english: He rocked back and forth in his rocking chair.
chinese: 他坐在摇椅里前后摇晃着。
pinyin: tā zuò zài yáo yǐ lǐ qián hòu yáo huàng zhuó。

english: He should listen to his intimate feelings.
chinese: 人应当倾听自己的内心感觉。
pinyin: rén yīng dāng qīng tīng zì jǐ de nèi xīn gǎn jué。

english: The scene is very beautiful in this glen.
chinese: 这条峡谷里的景色非常美丽。
pinyin: zhè tiáo xiá gǔ lǐ de jǐng sè fēi cháng měi lì。

english: This illustration shows a section through the timber.
chinese: 本图所示为木材的纵剖面.
pinyin: běn tú suǒ shì wèi mù cái de zòng pōu miàn.

english: His name has becomea byword for cruelty.
chinese: 他的名字成了残酷无情的别称.
pinyin: tā de míng zi chéng le cán kù wú qíng de bié chēng.

english: The artist's smock was covered in paint.
chinese: 那艺术家的罩衣上沾满了颜料.
pinyin: nà yì shù jiā de zhào yì shàng zhān mǎn le yán liào.

english: He squinted in the bright sunlight.
chinese: 他在很亮的阳光下眯起了眼睛。
pinyin: tā zài hěn liàng de yáng guāng xià mǐ qǐ le yǎn jīng。

english: She is a very discerning art critic.
chinese: 她是位眼光敏锐的艺术评论家.
pinyin: tā shì wèi yǎn guāng mǐn ruì de yì shù píng lùn jiā.

english: They would stop the rich from robbing the poor.
chinese: 他们要制止富人掠夺穷人。
pinyin: tā men yào zhì zhǐ fù rén lu:è duó qióng rén。

english: The artist's smock was covered in paint.
chinese: 那艺术家的罩衣上沾满了颜料.
pinyin: nà yì shù jiā de zhào yì shàng zhān mǎn le yán liào.

english: They coupled the carriages of the train together.
chinese: 他们把火车的车厢连接好。
pinyin: tā men bǎ huǒ chē de chē xiāng lián jiē hào。

english: He was charged obstructing the highway.
chinese: 他因阻碍公路交通而受控告。
pinyin: tā yīn zǔ ài gōng lù jiāo tōng ér shòu kòng gào。

english: He has become famous in his own field.
chinese: 他在自己的领域里已经出名了。
pinyin: tā zài zì jǐ de lǐng yù lǐ yǐ jīng chū míng le。

english: You could hear the quaver in her voice.
chinese: 她的声音中能听出有些颤抖.
pinyin: tā de shēng yīn zhòng néng tìng chū yǒu xiē chàn dǒu.

english: The plant has a brilliant purple floweret.
chinese: 那棵植物开着鲜艳的小紫花。
pinyin: nà kē zhí wù kāi zhuó xiān yàn de xiǎo zǐ huā。

english: The novel contains more narrative than dialogue.
chinese: 这部小说里的叙述比对话多.
pinyin: zhè bù xiǎo shuō lǐ de xù shù bì duì huà duō.

english: He went against the advice of his colleagues and resigned.
chinese: 他不顾同事的劝告辞了职.
pinyin: tā bù gù tóng shì de quàn gào cí le zhí.

english: The power of the landowners waned during this period.
chinese: 这一时期地主的势力削弱了.
pinyin: zhè yī shí qī dì zhǔ de shì li xuē ruò le.

english: The shot panned slowly across the room.
chinese: 镜头慢慢移动拍摄房间全景.
pinyin: jìng tóu màn màn yí dòng pāi shè fáng jiān quán jǐng.

english: I nominate her to present us at the meeting.
chinese: 我推荐她代表我们出席会议。
pinyin: wǒ tuī jiàn tā dài biǎo wǒ men chū xí huì yì。

english: That motorbike will be the death of you.
chinese: 那辆摩托车就会要了你的命。
pinyin: nà liàng mó tuō chē jiù kuài yào le nǐ de mìng。

english: This type of bicycle is up to date.
chinese: 这种款式的脚踏车是最新式的。
pinyin: zhè zhǒng kuǎn shì de jué tà jū shì zuì xīn shì de。

english: The news was blazed all over the daily papers.
chinese: 所有日报都刊登了这条消息.
pinyin: suǒ yǒu rì bào dōu kān dēng le zhè tiáo xiāo xi.

english: Cypress branches used as a symbol of mourning.
chinese: 柏枝作为悲哀象征的柏树枝
pinyin: bò zhī zuò wéi bēi āi xiàng zhēng de bǎi shù zhī

english: We are painting the exterior wall of the house.
chinese: 我们正在给房子的外墙涂漆。
pinyin: wǒ men zhèng zài jǐ fáng zi de wài qiáng tú qī。

english: We must gauge the diameter of wire first.
chinese: 我们必须先测量电线的直径。
pinyin: wǒ men bì xū xiān cè liàng diàn xiàn de zhí jìng。

english: The lock was rusty, so we had to smash the door open.
chinese: 锁锈住了，我们得把门砸开。
pinyin: suǒ xiù zhù le， wǒ men de bǎ mén zá kāi。

english: A free flow of water came from the pipe.
chinese: 水从管道里通畅地流了出来。
pinyin: shuǐ zòng guǎn dào lǐ tōng chàng de liú le chū lai。

english: A large multitude had assembled to hear him preach.
chinese: 一大群人聚集起来听他布道.
pinyin: yī dà qún rén jù jí qǐ lai tìng tā bù dào.

english: I think this worm is a larva of a butterfly.
chinese: 我觉得这虫子是蝴蝶的幼虫。
pinyin: wǒ jué de zhè chóng zi shì hú dié de yòu chóng。

english: Loaded or burdened too heavily.
chinese: 超载的装载过多的或负担过重的
pinyin: chāo zài de zhuāng zài guò duō de huò fù dān guò zhòng de

english: The lock was rusty, so we had to smash the door open.
chinese: 锁锈住了，我们得把门砸开。
pinyin: suǒ xiù zhù le， wǒ men de bǎ mén zá kāi。

english: The infantry began to deploy at dawn.
chinese: 步兵黎明时开始进入战斗位置.
pinyin: bù bīng lí míng shí kāi shǐ jìn rù zhàn dòu wèi zhi.

english: The insurance company will recompense his loss.
chinese: 保险公司将赔偿他的损失。
pinyin: bǎo xiǎn gōng sī jiàng péi cháng tā de sǔn shī。

english: The house is for sale with vacant possession.
chinese: 该房供出售并能立即占有。
pinyin: gāi fáng gòng chū shòu bìng néng lì jí zhàn yǒu。

english: The danger recalled him to a sense of duty.
chinese: 这危险的事唤起了他的责任感。
pinyin: zhè wēi xiǎn de shì huàn qǐ le tā de zé rèn gǎn。

english: Because of misuse of power, he was dismissed.
chinese: 因为滥用权力，他被开除了。
pinyin: yīn wèi làn yòng quán lì， tā bèi kāi chú le。

english: We walked around the beach barefoot.
chinese: 我们赤着脚在海滩上走来走去。
pinyin: wǒ men chì zhuó jué zài hǎi tān shàng zǒu lái zǒu qù。

english: I supervised the workers loading the lorry.
chinese: 我监督工人把货物装上卡车.
pinyin: wǒ jiān dū gōng rén bǎ huò wù zhuāng shàng kǎ chē.

english: The plant is not susceptible to disease.
chinese: 这种植物不容易受病害侵袭。
pinyin: zhè zhǒng zhí wù bù róng yì shòu bìng hài qīn xí。

english: He was bound to a chair and left.
chinese: 他被绑在一把椅子上, 就那样待著.
pinyin: tā bèi bǎng zài yī bǎ yǐ zi shàng,  jiù nà yàng dài著.

english: He burned his tongue with red pepper.
chinese: 他的舌头被红辣椒辣得好难受。
pinyin: tā de shé tóu bèi hóng là jiāo là de hào nán shòu。

english: He turned on the torch to look for his keys.
chinese: 他打开了手电筒，寻找钥匙。
pinyin: tā dǎ kāi le shǒu diàn tǒng， xún zhǎo yào shi。

english: His special interest lies in the area of literature.
chinese: 他对文学领域特别感兴趣。
pinyin: tā duì wén xué lǐng yù tè bié gǎn xìng qu。

english: The air seemed to pulsate with the bright light.
chinese: 空气似乎随着亮光而颤动。
pinyin: kōng qì sì hu suí zhe liàng guāng ér zhàn dòng。

english: You cannot afford to relax your vigilance for a moment.
chinese: 警惕性是万万不可放松的.
pinyin: jǐng tì xìng shì wàn wàn bù kě fàng sōng de.

english: The vertical line meets the horizontal one here.
chinese: 垂直线与水平线在此相交.
pinyin: chuí zhí xiàn yù shuǐ píng xiàn zài cǐ xiāng jiāo.

english: The piles of books tottered and then fell.
chinese: 这堆书晃了几下，然后就倒了。
pinyin: zhè duī shū huàng le jǐ xià， rán hòu jiù dào le。

english: It's easy to sell insurance to a pessimist.
chinese: 向悲观的人推销保险很容易.
pinyin: xiàng bēi guān de rén tuī xiāo bǎo xiǎn hěn róng yì.

english: They loaded the carts with plunder.
chinese: 他们把掠夺来的东西装进大车里.
pinyin: tā men bǎ lu:è duó lái de dōng xi zhuāng jìn dà jū lǐ.

english: It was a warm climb to the summit.
chinese: 向顶峰攀登时身上都热起来了。
pinyin: xiàng dǐng fēng pān dēng shí shēn shàng dōu rè qǐ lai le。

english: You cannot afford to relax your vigilance for a moment.
chinese: 警惕性是万万不可放松的.
pinyin: jǐng tì xìng shì wàn wàn bù kě fàng sōng de.

english: He was cruel to make them work overtime.
chinese: 他要他们加班工作, 真是残酷。
pinyin: tā yào tā men jiā bān gōng zuò,  zhēn shì cán kù。

english: Water is channelled through a series of irrigation canals.
chinese: 把水引入一系列灌溉渠中.
pinyin: bǎ shuǐ yǐn rù yī xì liè guàn gài qú zhòng.

english: A crowd soon collected at the scene of the accident.
chinese: 群众迅速聚集在出事现场.
pinyin: qún zhòng xùn sù jù jí zài chū shì xiàn chǎng.

english: You cannot afford to relax your vigilance for a moment.
chinese: 警惕性是万万不可放松的.
pinyin: jǐng tì xìng shì wàn wàn bù kě fàng sōng de.

english: In spite of the bad weather, we went fishing.
chinese: 我们不顾恶劣的天气而去钓鱼。
pinyin: wǒ men bù gù è liè de tiān qì ér qù diào yú。

english: The newspapers glorified their heroic deeds.
chinese: 报纸称颂了他们的英雄事迹。
pinyin: bào zhǐ chèng sòng le tā men de yīng xióng shì jī。

english: I cut out the paragraph in this article.
chinese: 我删除了这篇文章的一个段落。
pinyin: wǒ shān chú le zhè piān wén zhāng de yī gè duàn luò。

english: She fought like a tiger to get what she wanted.
chinese: 她竭力争取自己想要的东西。
pinyin: tā jié lì zhēng qǔ zì jǐ xiǎng yào de dōng xi。

english: The missiles were shot at the aircraft from a ship.
chinese: 从军舰上向飞机发射导弹.
pinyin: zòng jūn jiàn shàng xiàng fēi jī fā shè dǎo dàn.

english: Much as I like her, I won't marry her.
chinese: 我虽然很喜欢她，却不打算娶她。
pinyin: wǒ suī rán hěn xǐ huan tā， què bù dǎ suàn qǔ tā。

english: In spite of the bad weather, we went fishing.
chinese: 我们不顾恶劣的天气而去钓鱼。
pinyin: wǒ men bù gù è liè de tiān qì ér qù diào yú。

english: In desperation I pleaded with the attackers.
chinese: 绝望之下，我向攻击者哀求。
pinyin: jué wàng zhī xià， wǒ xiàng gōng jī zhě āi qiú。

english: They called for the peaceful dispersal of the demonstrators.
chinese: 他们要求示威者和平解散.
pinyin: tā men yāo qiú shì wēi zhě hé píng jiě sàn.

english: I managed to scrounge the materials to build a shed.
chinese: 我设法弄来点材料搭个棚子.
pinyin: wǒ shè fǎ nòng lái diǎn cái liào dā gè péng zi.

english: His illness was fatal to our plan.
chinese: 他的患病给我们的计划带来灾难。
pinyin: tā de huàn bìng jǐ wǒ men de jì huà dài lái zāi nàn。

english: That old book is my most precious possession.
chinese: 那本旧书是我最珍贵的财产。
pinyin: nà běn jiù shū shì wǒ zuì zhēn guì de cái chǎn。

english: I have an insane desire to finish that thing.
chinese: 我疯狂地渴望去完成那件事。
pinyin: wǒ fēng kuáng de kě wàng qù wán chéng nà jiàn shì。

english: Cancer carried his sister off last year.
chinese: 去年癌症夺走了他姐姐的生命。
pinyin: qù nián ái zhèng duó zǒu le tā jiě jie de shēng mìng。

english: The police watched the bars which he was known to resort.
chinese: 警方监视著他常去的酒吧.
pinyin: jǐng fāng jiān shì著 tā cháng qù de jiǔ bā.

english: It's strange for her to be so rude.
chinese: 真奇怪，她竟然会如此粗暴无礼。
pinyin: zhēn qí guài， tā jìng rán kuài rú cǐ cū bào wú lǐ。

english: He always bemoans the shortage of funds for research.
chinese: 他总是叹息研究经费不足。
pinyin: tā zǒng shì tàn xí yán jiū jīng fèi bù zú。

english: The play was shortened by the omission of two scenes.
chinese: 该剧经删去两场而缩短了.
pinyin: gāi jù jīng shān qù liǎng chǎng ér suō duǎn le.

english: Their speculative buying of grain is illegal.
chinese: 他们投机购买谷物是不合法的。
pinyin: tā men tóu jī gòu mǎi gǔ wù shì bù hé fǎ de。

english: The maximum load for this lorry is one ton.
chinese: 这辆卡车最大载重量是一吨。
pinyin: zhè liàng kǎ chē zuì dà zài zhòng liàng shì yī dùn。

english: The high price is a balk to me.
chinese: 对我来说，价格太高是一个障碍。
pinyin: duì wǒ lái shuō， jià gé tài gāo shì yī gè zhàng ài。

english: I saw two small camels in the zoo.
chinese: 在动物园我看见了两只小骆驼。
pinyin: zài dòng wù yuán wǒ kàn jiàn le liǎng zhǐ xiǎo luò tuo。

english: They should try to keep prices from rising.
chinese: 他们应该设法阻止价钱上涨。
pinyin: tā men yīng gāi shè fǎ zǔ zhǐ jià qian shàng zhǎng。

english: Her partner tried to trick her out of her share.
chinese: 她的合伙人企图骗走她的股份。
pinyin: tā de hé huǒ rén qǐ tú piàn zǒu tā de gǔ fèn。

english: Living conditions in the camp were pretty primitive.
chinese: 营地的生活条件甚为原始.
pinyin: yíng dì de shēng huó tiáo jiàn shèn wèi yuán shǐ.

english: She married the rich man out of vanity.
chinese: 她出于虚荣心而嫁给了那个富人。
pinyin: tā chū yú xū róng xīn ér jià jǐ le nèi gè fù rén。

english: Something, especially a muscle, that contracts.
chinese: 收缩物收缩的事物，尤指肌肉
pinyin: shōu suō wù shōu suō de shì wù， yóu zhǐ jī ròu

english: A canyon usually has a river flowing through it.
chinese: 峡谷常常有河流经过其中。
pinyin: xiá gǔ cháng cháng yǒu hé liú jīng guò qí zhōng。

english: The whole city was immersed in a festival atmosphere.
chinese: 全城沉浸在节日的气氛中。
pinyin: quán chéng chén jìn zài jié rì de qì fēn zhòng。

english: This misprint led to great confusion.
chinese: 这个印刷错误造成很大的混淆。
pinyin: zhè gè yìn shuà cuò wù zào chéng hěn dà de hùn xiáo。

english: The grease from pork can be used for frying.
chinese: 猪肉炼出的油可用来煎炸食物.
pinyin: zhū ròu liàn chū de yóu kě yòng lái jiān zhà shí wù.

english: Some metals weld better than others.
chinese: 有些金属容易焊，有的不容易焊。
pinyin: yǒu xiē jīn shǔ róng yì hàn， yǒu de bù róng yì hàn。

english: The grease from pork can be used for frying.
chinese: 猪肉炼出的油可用来煎炸食物.
pinyin: zhū ròu liàn chū de yóu kě yòng lái jiān zhà shí wù.

english: Some people prefer sitting up to going to bed early.
chinese: 有些人宁可熬夜，而不早睡。
pinyin: yǒu xiē rén nìng kě áo yè， ér bù zǎo shuì。

english: You can plug into the national computer network.
chinese: 你可以接通全国计算机网络。
pinyin: nǐ kě yǐ jiē tōng quán guó jì suàn jī wǎng luò。

english: Doing crosswords gives the mind some exercise.
chinese: 做纵横字谜游戏能锻炼脑筋.
pinyin: zuò zòng héng zì mí yóu xì néng duàn liàn nǎo jīn.

english: He laughed to cover (ie hide) his nervousness.
chinese: 他哈哈大笑以遮掩紧张的心情.
pinyin: tā hā hā dà xiào yǐ zhē yǎn jǐn zhāng de xīn qíng.

english: The hotel is closed until mid- July.
chinese: 这个饭店要到七月中旬才营业。
pinyin: zhè gè fàn diàn yào dào qī yuè zhōng xún cái yíng yè。

english: The priest blessed the ship before it left port.
chinese: 牧师在船离港之前为其祝福。
pinyin: mù shī zài chuán lí gǎng zhī qián wèi qí zhù fú。

english: Her lazy husband is a millstone round her neck.
chinese: 她的懒丈夫成了她的一个包袱。
pinyin: tā de lǎn zhàng fu chéng le tā de yī gè bāo fu。

english: Britain concluded a trade agreement with China.
chinese: 英国和中国签署了贸易协定.
pinyin: Yīng guó huò Zhōng guó qiān shǔ le mào yì xié dìng.

english: Nothing but a miracle can save her now.
chinese: 现在只有出现奇迹她才能得救。
pinyin: xiàn zài zhǐ yǒu chū xiàn qí jì tā cái néng de jiù。

english: He is an expert on the world's mystical religions.
chinese: 他精通世界上的神秘宗教。
pinyin: tā jīng tōng shì jiè shàng de shén mì zōng jiào。

english: The car raised quite a dust as we drove off.
chinese: 我们走时车子扬起了一阵尘土。
pinyin: wǒ men zǒu shí jū zi yáng qǐ le yī zhèn chén tǔ。

english: He is remembered for the nobility of his character.
chinese: 他因品质高尚而被人怀念。
pinyin: tā yīn pǐn zhì gāo shàng ér bèi rén huái niàn。

english: It was a warm climb to the summit.
chinese: 向顶峰攀登时身上都热起来了。
pinyin: xiàng dǐng fēng pān dēng shí shēn shàng dōu rè qǐ lai le。

english: Water is channelled through a series of irrigation canals.
chinese: 把水引入一系列灌溉渠中.
pinyin: bǎ shuǐ yǐn rù yī xì liè guàn gài qú zhòng.

chinese: 这次爆炸把那个旧烟囱给炸倒了.
pinyin: zhè cì bào zhà bǎ nèi gè jiù yān cōng jǐ zhà dào le.

english: She looked with pride at the result of her work.
chinese: 她自豪地看著自己的工作成果.
pinyin: tā zì háo de kàn著 zì jǐ de gōng zuò chéng guǒ.

english: Our class presented the school with a picture.
chinese: 我们班向学校赠送了一幅画。
pinyin: wǒ men bān xiàng xué xiào zèng sòng le yī fú huà。

chinese: 她的勤奋为其他人树立了榜样。
pinyin: tā de qín fèn wèi qí tā rén shù lì le bǎng yàng。
